Exodus9:4 Jehova gākpa ókè n'etiti anu-ulo Israel na anu-ulo Ijipt: ọ dighi ihe gānwupu n'ihe nile umu Israel nwere.
Exodus9:5 Jehova we debe mb͕e akara àkà
Exodus9:6 Jehova we me ihe ahu n'echi-ya
Exodus9:7 Fero we ziga
Exodus9:8 Jehova we si Moses na Eron
Exodus9:9 Ọ gāghọ uzuzu ntà n'elu ala Ijipt nile
Exodus9:10 Ha we kporo ntu oké ọku
Exodus9:11 Ndi-ode-akwukwọ di nsọ apughi kwa iguzo n'iru Moses
Exodus9:12 Jehova we me ka obi Fero di ike
Exodus9:13 Jehova we si Moses
Exodus9:14 N'ihi na ọ bu na mb͕e a ka Mu gaje izite ihe-otitim nile n'obi-gi
Exodus9:15 N'ihi na ub͕u a M'gēsetipuwori akam
Exodus9:16 ma otú ọ di ọ bu n'ihi nka ka M'guzoworo gi
Exodus9:17 Ì nọ nātuli onwe-gi elu dika obo-ihe imegide ndim rue ub͕u a
Exodus9:18 Le
Exodus9:19 Ma ub͕u a
Exodus9:20 Onye nātu egwu okwu Jehova n'etiti ndi-orù Fero mere ndi-orù-ya na anu-ulo-ya ka ha b͕aghachi n'ulo:
Exodus9:21 ma onye nētiyeghi obi-ya n'okwu Jehova rapuru ndi-orù-ya na anu-ulo-ya n'ọhia.
Exodus9:22 Jehova we si Moses
Exodus9:23 Moses we setipu nkpa-n'aka-ya n'iru elu-igwe: Jehova we nye éb͕è-elu-igwe na ákú-miri-ígwé
Exodus9:24 Ákú-miri-ígwé we di
Exodus9:25 Ákú-miri-ígwé ahu we tib͕ue ihe nile nke di n'ọhia
Exodus9:26 Nání n'ala Goshen
Exodus9:27 Fero we zìe
Exodus9:28 Riọnu Jehova; n'ihi na o zuwo
Exodus9:29 Moses we si ya
Exodus9:30 Ma gi onwe-gi na ndi-orù-gi
Exodus9:31 Eti-kwa-ra flax na ọka barley: n'ihi na ọka barley nāra oko
Exodus9:32 Ma etighi ọka wheat na ọka spelt: n'ihi na ihe ahu etoghi.
Exodus9:33 Moses we si n'ebe Fero nọ
Exodus9:34 Fero we hu na miri-ozuzo na ákú-miri-ígwé na éb͕è-elu-igwe kwusiri
Exodus9:35 Ewe me ka obi Fero di ike

Exodus10:2 ka i we kọ kwa na nti nwa-gi na nwa nwa-gi akukọ bayere emò M'kwara ndi Ijipt

Exodus10:4 N'ihi na
Exodus10:5 ha gēkpuchi kwa iru ala

Exodus10:7 Ndi-orù Fero we si ya

Exodus10:10 Ọ si ha
Exodus10:11 Ọ gaghi-ndi otú a: biko

Exodus12:1 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu n'ala Ijipt
Exodus12:2 Ọnwa nka gāburu unu isi ọnwa nile: ọnwa mbu nime ọnwa nile nke arọ ka ọ gāburu unu.
Exodus12:3 Gwanu nzukọ nile nke Israel okwu
Exodus12:4 ma ọ buru na ulo ahu dikari ntà iri nwa-aturu
Exodus12:5 Nwa-aturu unu nwere gābu nke zuru okè
Exodus12:6 ọ gābu-kwa-ra unu ihe-ndebe rue ubọchi nke-iri-na-anọ nke ọnwa nka: nkpọkọta nile nke nzukọ Israel gēb͕u ya n'etiti ehihie na anyasi.
Exodus12:7 Ha gēwere ufọdu nime ọbara-ya
Exodus12:8 Ha gēri anu-aru-ya n'abali ahu
Exodus12:9 Unu erila ihe nime ya na ndu
Exodus12:10 Unu agaghi-eme ka ihe ọ bula fọdu site na ya rue ututu; ma ihe fọduru site na ya rue ututu
Exodus12:11 Otú a ka unu gēri ya; n'iji ihe-ọkiké ke n'úkwù-unu
Exodus12:12 M'gāgabiga kwa n'ala Ijipt n'abali ahu
Exodus12:13 Ọbara ahu gāburu unu ihe-iriba-ama n'aru ulo nile ebe unu onwe-unu nọ: mb͕e M'huru ọbara ahu
Exodus12:14 Ubọchi a gāburu unu ihe-ncheta
Exodus12:15 Ubọchi asa ka unu gēri achicha ekoghi-eko; ọ buná n'ubọchi mbu ka unu gēme ka ihe nēko achicha ghara idi n'ulo nile unu: n'ihi na onye ọ bula nke nēri achicha koro eko site n'ubọchi mbu rue ubọchi nke-asa
Exodus12:16 N'ubọchi mbu nkpọkọta di nsọ gādi
Exodus12:17 Unu gēdebe kwa ememe achicha ekoghi-eko; n'ihi na ọ bu nime otù ubọchi a ka M'meworo ka usu nile nke ndi-agha-unu si n'ala Ijipt puta: unu gēdebe kwa ubọchi a rue ọb͕ọ nile unu site n'ukpuru ebighi-ebi.
Exodus12:18 N'onwa mbu
Exodus12:19 Ubọchi asa ka anāgaghi-ahu ihe nēko achicha n'ulo nile unu: n'ihi na onye ọ bula nke nēri achicha koro eko
Exodus12:20 Unu agaghi-eri achicha ọ bula koro eko; n'ebe-obibi-unu nile ka unu gēri achicha ekoghi-eko.
Exodus12:21 Moses we kpọ ndi-okenye nile nke Israel
Exodus12:22 Unu gēwere kwa ùkwù hyssop
Exodus12:23 N'ihi na Jehova gāgabiga iti ndi Ijipt ihe; ma mb͕e Ọ huru ọbara ahu n'elu elu-uzọ na n'elu awara-uzọ abua
Exodus12:24 Unu gēdebe kwa ihe a ka ọ buru ukpuru n'ebe i nọ na n'ebe umu-gi nọ rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi.
Exodus12:25 O gēru kwa
Exodus12:26 O gēru kwa
Exodus12:27 na unu gāsi
Exodus12:28 Umu Israel we je me ya; dika Jehova nyere Moses na Eron iwu
Exodus12:29 O rue
Exodus12:30 Fero we bilie n'abali
Exodus12:31 O we kpọ Moses na Eron n'abali
Exodus12:32 Chirinu ma ìgwè ewu na aturu-unu ma ìgwè ehi-unu
Exodus12:33 Ndi Iiipt we di ike n'aru ndi Israel izipu ha n'ala-ha ngwa ngwa; n'ihi na ha siri
Exodus12:34 Ndi Israel we buru utu ọka flour-ha agwọrọ agwọ tutu o ko
Exodus12:35 Umu Israel me-kwa-ra dika okwu Moses si di; ha we riọ n'aka ndi Ijipt ihe ọla-ọcha
Exodus12:36 Jehova we nye ndi Israel amara n'iru ndi Ijipt
Exodus12:37 Umu Israel we bulie ije site na Rameses rue Sukot
Exodus12:38 Ọzọ kwa
Exodus12:39 Ha we were utu ọka flour agwọrọ agwọ
Exodus12:40 Ma obibi umu Israel
Exodus12:41 O rue
Exodus12:42 Abali nche ka ọ buru Jehova ime ka ha si n'ala Ijipt puta: otù abali ahu bu abali nche diri Jehova nke umu Israel nile nwere rue ọb͕ọ nile ha.
Exodus12:43 Jehova we si Moses na Eron
Exodus12:44 ma orù ọ bula nke onye ọ bula
Exodus12:45 Onye-nnọdu na onye egoro ọlu agaghi-eri ya.
Exodus12:46 N'otù ulo ka agēri ya; i gaghi-esi n'ulo wepu ihe ọ bula n'anu-aru-ya n'èzí; ọ dighi kwa ọkpukpu unu gētiji nime ya.
Exodus12:47 Nzukọ nile nke Israel gēme ya.
Exodus12:48 Ma mb͕e ọbìa gānọ n'ala-gi dika ọbìa
Exodus12:49 Otù iwu ka ha gēnwe
Exodus12:50 Umu Israel nile we me ya; dika Jehova nyere Moses na Eron iwu
Exodus12:51 O rue

Exodus20:1 Chineke we kwue okwu ndia nile
Exodus20:2 Mu onwem bu Jehova Chineke-gi
Exodus20:3 Gi enwela Chi ọzọ tiyerem.
Exodus20:4 Gi emerela onwe-gi arusi apiri api
Exodus20:5 gi akpọla isi ala nye ha
Exodus20:6 ma anamemere nnù umu-umu abua na ọgu iri ebere
Exodus20:7 Gi eburula aha Jehova
Exodus20:8 Cheta ubọchi-izu-ike
Exodus20:9 Ubọchi isi ka i gālu ọlu
Exodus20:10 ma ubọchi nke-asa bu ubọchi-izu-ike nke Jehova
Exodus20:11 n'ihi na n'ubọchi isi ka Jehova mere elu-igwe na uwa
Exodus20:12 Sọpuru nna-gi na nne-gi: ka ubọchi-gi we di anya n'elu ala ahu nke Jehova
Exodus20:13 Gi eb͕ula madu.
Exodus20:14 Gi akwala iko.

Exodus21:4 Ọ buru na onye-nwe-ya enye ya nwunye
Exodus21:5 Ma ọ buru na orù ahu asi n'ezie
Exodus21:6 onye-nwe-ya gēme kwa ka ọ biakute Chineke nso

Exodus21:8 Ọ buru na ọ jọ njọ n'anya onye-nwe-ya
Exodus21:9 Ma ọ buru na ọ kwere na nwa-ya nwoke gālu ya
Exodus21:10 Ọ buru na ọ lutara ya nwunye ọzọ; ọ gaghi-ewebì anu-oriri-ya

Exodus21:28 Mb͕e ehi gāsọ nwoke ma-ọbu nwayi mpì

Exodus23:1 Gi eburula akukọ efu: esola onye nēmebi iwu tiye aka-gi ibu onye-àmà nke ihe-ike.

Exodus23:6 Ewezugala ikpé nke ob͕eye-gi n'ise-okwu-ya.

Exodus23:8 Anara-kwa-la ihe-iri-ngo: n'ihi na ihe-iri-ngo nēme ka ndi nāhu uzọ kpu ìsì

Exodus23:16 i gēdebe kwa ememe nke owuwe-ihe-ubi
Exodus23:17 Ub͕ò atọ n'arọ ka agāhu ndikom-i nile n'iru Onye-nwe-unu

Exodus25:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Exodus25:2 Gwa umu Israel ka ha wetara m àjà-nbuli: n'aka nwoke ọ bula nke obi-ya nēme ya ka ọ nwe afọ-ofufo ka unu gānara àjà-nbulim.
Exodus25:3 Nka bu kwa àjà-nbuli ahu nke unu gānara n'aka ha; ọla-edo
Exodus25:4 na ogho anunu
Exodus25:5 na akpukpọ ebulu esijiri ọbara-ọbara
Exodus25:6 na manu itiye n'ihe nēnye ìhè
Exodus25:7 na nkume onyx
Exodus25:8 Ka ha me-kwa-ram ebe nsọ; ka M'we biri n'etiti ha.
Exodus25:9 Dika ihe nile Mu onwem nēme ka i hu
Exodus25:10 Ha gēme kwa ib͕e osisi acacia: cubit abua na nkera ka ogologo-ya gādi
Exodus25:11 I gāmachita kwa ya ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa
Exodus25:12 I gāwu-kwa-ra ya nb͕a-aka ọla-edo anọ
Exodus25:13 I gēme kwa nkpa-n'aka osisi acacia
Exodus25:14 I gēme kwa ka nkpa-n'aka ahu ba na nb͕a-aka ahu n'elu akuku ib͕e ahu
Exodus25:15 Nime nb͕a-aka nke ib͕e ahu ka nkpa-n'aka ahu ganādi: agaghi-ewepu ha nime ya.
Exodus25:16 I gētiye kwa n'ib͕e ahu ihe-àmà M'gēnye gi.
Exodus25:17 I gēme kwa ebe-nkpuchi-nmehie nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa: cubit abua na nkera ka ogologo-ya gādi
Exodus25:18 I gēme kwa cherubim ọla-edo abua; ihe akpuru akpu ka i gēme ha
Exodus25:19 Gi me otù cherub n'otù nsọtu
Exodus25:20 Cherubim ahu ganāb͕asa kwa nkù-ha n'elu
Exodus25:21 I gātukwasi kwa ebe-nkpuchi-nmehie ahu n'ib͕e ahu
Exodus25:22 M'gēzute kwa gi n'ebe ahu
Exodus25:23 I gēme kwa table osisi acacia: cubit abua ka ogologo-ya gādi
Exodus25:24 I gāmachita kwa ya ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa
Exodus25:25 I gēme-kwa-ra ya ihe-njikọ buruburu nke ra ka otù ọbu-aka
Exodus25:26 I gēme-kwa-ra ya nb͕a-aka ọla-edo anọ
Exodus25:27 Na nso ihe-njikọ ahu ka nb͕a-aka gādi
Exodus25:28 I gēji kwa osisi acacia me nkpa-n'aka ahu
Exodus25:29 I gēme kwa afere-ya nile
Exodus25:30 I gādọba kwa achicha nke iru Chineke n'elu table ahu n'irum mb͕e dum.
Exodus25:31 I gēme kwa ihe-idọba-oriọna nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa: ihe akpuru akpu ka agēme ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu
Exodus25:32 alaka isi ganēsi n'akuku-ya abua waputa; alaka atọ nke ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu n'otù akuku-ya
Exodus25:33 iko atọ emere dika ifuru osisi almond gādi n'otù alaka
Exodus25:34 iko anọ emere dika ifuru osisi almond gādi kwa n'ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu
Exodus25:35 otù isi gādi kwa n'okpuru alaka abua site na ya
Exodus25:36 Isi-ha alaka-ha gēsite na ya; ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu nile gābu otù ihe eji ọla-edo nke anāgwaghi agwa kpu.
Exodus25:37 I gēme kwa oriọna-ya
Exodus25:38 Nkpa-ya nile na ihe-ikpakepu-ọku-ya nile gābu ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa.
Exodus25:39 Otù talent nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa ka agēji ma ya
Exodus25:40 Ma le anya ka i me ha dika ihe-atù-ha si di
Exodus26:1 Ebe-obibim ka i gēme kwa: were ákwà-nkwuba iri me ya; ezi ákwà ọcha akpara nke-ọma
Exodus26:2 Ogologo nke otù ákwà-nkwuba gādi orú cubit na asatọ
Exodus26:3 Ákwà-nkwuba ise ganējikọta onwe-ha
Exodus26:4 I gēji kwa ogho anunu me anya-nko n'elu ọnu-ọnu nke otù ákwà-nkwuba
Exodus26:5 Ọgu anya-nko abua na iri ka i gēme n'otù ákwà-nkwuba
Exodus26:6 I gēme kwa ọgu nko ọla-edo abua na iri
Exodus26:7 I gēme kwa ákwà-nkwuba aji ewu
Exodus26:8 Ogologo nke otù ákwà-nkwuba gādi orú cubit na iri
Exodus26:9 I gējikọta kwa ákwà-nkwuba ise iche
Exodus26:10 I gēme kwa ọgu anya-nko abua na iri n'elu ọnu-ọnu nke otù ákwà-nkwuba ahu dipuru adipu nime njikọta ahu
Exodus26:11 I gēme kwa ọgu nko ọla abua na iri
Exodus26:12 Ma nkwupu nke fọduru nime ákwà-nkwuba nke ulo-ikwū ahu
Exodus26:13 Cubit ahu nke di n'otù akuku
Exodus26:14 I gēme-kwa-ra ulo-ikwū ahu ihe-nkpuchi akpukpọ ebulu esijiri ọbara-ọbara
Exodus26:15 I gēme-kwa-ra ebe-obibi ahu ibo osisi acacia
Exodus26:16 Cubit iri ka ogologo nke otù ibo gādi
Exodus26:17 Otù ibo gēnwe ihe-nhiọye abua
Exodus26:18 I gēme-kwa-ra ebe-obibi ahu ibo ahu
Exodus26:19 Ọgu ukwu ọla-ọcha abua ka i gēme kwa n'okpuru orú ibo ahu; ukwu abua n'okpuru otù ibo inara ihe-nhiọye-ya abua
Exodus26:20 I gēme-kwa-ra akuku nke-abua nke ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus26:21 na ọgu ukwu ọla-ọcha ha abua; ukwu abua n'okpuru otù ibo
Exodus26:22 Isi ebe-obibi ahu nke chere iru n'Ọdida-anyanwu ka i gēme-kwa-ra ibo isi.
Exodus26:23 Ibo abua ka i gēme-kwa-ra nkuku ebe-obibi ahu n'isi-ya.
Exodus26:24 Ha gābu ihe abua ejikọtara n'otù n'okpuru
Exodus26:25 Ha gādi kwa ibo asatọ
Exodus26:26 I gēme kwa nkpọrọ osisi acacia; ise ka i gēmere ibo otù akuku nke ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus26:27 nkpọrọ ise ka i gēme-kwa-ra ibo akuku nke-ọzọ nke ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus26:28 Nkpọrọ etiti nke di n'etiti ibo
Exodus26:29 I gāmachita kwa ibo nile ọla-edo
Exodus26:30 I gēwuli kwa ebe-obibi ahu elu dika ọdidi-ya ekpere n'ikpe si di nke emeworo ka i hu ya anya n'ugwu a.
Exodus26:31 I gēme kwa ákwà-nb͕ochi nke ogho anunu
Exodus26:32 i gētiye ya n'elu ide acacia anọ amachitara ọla-edo
Exodus26:33 I gētiye kwa ákwà-nb͕ochi ahu n'okpuru nko ahu
Exodus26:34 I gētiye kwa ebe-nkpuchi-nmehie ahu n'elu ib͕e ihe-àmà nime ebe nsọ ahu kachasi ebe nsọ nile.
Exodus26:35 I gādọba table ahu n'èzí ákwà-nb͕ochi ahu
Exodus26:36 I gēme-kwa-ra ọnu-uzọ Ulo-ikwū ahu ákwá-nkwuchi
Exodus26:37 I gēme-kwa-ra ákwà-nkwuchi ahu ide acacia ise
Exodus27:1 I gēme kwa ebe-ichu-àjàm ahu; ọ gābu osisi acacia
Exodus27:2 I gēme kwa mpì-ya n'elu nkuku anọ ya: mpì-ya gēsite na ya: i gāmachita kwa ya ọla.
Exodus27:3 I gēme kwa ite-ya nile inara ntu-ya
Exodus27:4 I gēme-kwa-ra ya ihe-ọkpukpa
Exodus27:5 I gētiye ya n'okpuru ebe dipuru adipu buruburu ebe-ichu-àjà ahu n'okpuru
Exodus27:6 I gēme-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-àjà ahu nkpa-n'aka
Exodus27:7 Agēme ka nkpa-n'aka ahu ba na nb͕a-aka ahu
Exodus27:8 I gēwere ibo me ya ka ọ di ka ib͕e: dika emeworo ka i hu ya anya n'ugwu a
Exodus27:9 I gēme kwa ogige ebe-obibi ahu: akuku Ndida nke chere iru na Ndida gēnwe ákwà-ngechi igechi ogige ahu nke ezi ákwà ọcha akpara nke-ọma
Exodus27:10 ide-ya gādi orú
Exodus27:11 Otú a akuku Ugwu gēnwe kwa n'ogologo-ya ákwà-ngechi ọgu cubit ise n'ogologo
Exodus27:12 Obo-sara ogige ahu n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu gēnwe kwa ákwà-ngechi nke ọgu cubit abua na iri: ide-ha gādi iri
Exodus27:13 Obosara ogige ahu n'akuku Iru-anyanwu nke chere iru n'ọwuwa-anyanwu gādi ọgu cubit abua na iri.
Exodus27:14 Ákwà-ngechi cubit iri na ise ka otù akuku ọnu-uzọ-ama-ya gēnwe: ide-ha gādi atọ
Exodus27:15 Akuku nke-ọzọ nke ọnu-uzọ-ama-ya gēnwe kwa ákwà-ngechi cubit iri na ise: ide-ha gādi atọ
Exodus27:16 Ọnu-uzọ-ama nke ogige ahu gēnwe kwa ákwà-nkwuchi orú cubit
Exodus27:17 Ide nile nke ogige ahu buruburu gabu ihe egegidere ngegide n'ọla-ọcha; nkpọye-ha gābu ọla-ọcha; ma ukwu-ha gābu ọla.
Exodus27:18 Ogologo nke ogige ahu gābu ọgu cubit ise
Exodus27:19 Ihe nile nke ebe-obibi ahu n'òfùfè-ya nile
Exodus27:20 Ma gi onwe-gi
Exodus27:21 N'ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus28:1 Ma gi onwe-gi
Exodus28:2 I gēme-kwa-ra Eron
Exodus28:3 Gi onwe-gi gāgwa kwa ndi nile nwere obi amam-ihe
Exodus28:4 Ndia bu uwe ha gēme; ihe-ib͕ochi-obi
Exodus28:5 Ndi ahu gēwere kwa ọla-edo ahu
Exodus28:6 Ha gēme kwa ephod ahu; ọ gābu ọla-edo
Exodus28:7 Ọ gēnwe kwa ubu abua ejikọtara na nsọtu-ya abua; ka ewe jikọta ya n'otù.
Exodus28:8 Ihe-ọkiké nke onye-ọ̀kà kpara
Exodus28:9 I gēwere kwa nkume onyx abua
Exodus28:10 itinye aha ha n'elu otù nkume
Exodus28:11 Ọlu nke onye-ọ̀kà na nkume ka a gēji b͕u eb͕ub͕u nkume abua ahu
Exodus28:12 I gētiye kwa nkume abua ahu n'elu ubu ephod
Exodus28:13 I gēme kwa ihe ọla-edo akpara akpà:
Exodus28:14 na iyab͕a abua nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa; dika eriri-nma ka i gēme ha
Exodus28:15 I gēme kwa ihe-ib͕ochi-obi nke ikpé
Exodus28:16 Ihe nwere akuku anọ ra nrata ka ọ gābu
Exodus28:17 I gāhiọgide kwa nime ya nhiọgide nkume
Exodus28:18 eriri nke-abua gābu emerald na sapphire na diamond;
Exodus28:19 eriri nke-atọ gābu jacinth na agate na amethyst:
Exodus28:20 eriri nke-anọ gābu beryl na onyx na jasper: agētiye ha n'ọla-edo akpara akpà n'ebe-nhiọgide-ha.
Exodus28:21 Nkume ahu gādi ka aha umu Israel si di

Exodus36:19 O were mere ulo-ikwū ahu ihe-nkpuchi akpukpọ ebulu esijiri ọbara-ọbara
Exodus36:20 O we mere ebe-obibi ahu ibo osisi acacia
Exodus36:21 Cubit iri ka ogologo nke otù ibo di
Exodus36:22 Otù ibo nwere ihe-nhiọye abua
Exodus36:23 O we mere ebe-obibi ahu ibo ahu; orú ibo ka ọ mere nye akuku Ndida chere iru na Ndida:
Exodus36:24 ọgu ukwu ọla-ọcha abua ka o me-kwa-ra n'okpuru orú ibo ahu; ukwu abua n'okpuru otù ibo inara ihe-nhiọye-ya abua
Exodus36:25 O we mere akuku nke-abua nke ebe-obibi ahu orú ibo
Exodus36:26 na ọgu ukwu ọla-ọcha ha abua; ukwu abua n'okpuru otù ibo
Exodus36:27 Isi ebe-obibi ahu nke chere iru n'Ọdida-anyanwu ka o me-kwa-ra ibo isi nye.
Exodus36:28 Ibo abua ka o me-kwa-ra nye nkuku ebe-obibi ahu n'isi-ya.
Exodus36:29 Ha bu ihe abua ejikọtara n'otù n'okpuru
Exodus36:30 Ha di kwa ibo asatọ
Exodus36:31 O me-kwa-ra nkpọrọ osisi acacia; ise ka o mere nye ibo otù akuku nke ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus36:32 nkpọrọ ise ka o me-kwa-ra nye ibo akuku nke-ọzọ nke ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus36:33 O we me ka nkpọrọ etiti gabiga n'etiti ibo ahu
Exodus36:34 Ọ machita-kwa-ra ibo nile ọla-edo
Exodus36:35 O we me ákwà-nb͕ochi ahu nke ogho anunu
Exodus36:36 O we mere ya ide acacia anọ
Exodus36:37 O we mere ọnu-uzọ Ulo-ikwū ahu ákwà-nkwuchi
Exodus36:38 o me-kwa-ra ide ise ya na nkpọye-ha
Exodus37:1 Bezalel me-kwa-ra ib͕e osisi acacia: cubit abua na nkera ka ogologo-ya di
Exodus37:2 ọ machita ya ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa
Exodus37:3 O we wuara ya nb͕a-aka ọla-edo anọ
Exodus37:4 O me-kwa-ra nkpa-n'aka osisi acacia
Exodus37:5 O we me ka nkpa-n'aka ahu ba na nb͕a-aka ahu n'elu akuku ib͕e ahu
Exodus37:6 O me-kwa-ra ebe-nkpuchi-nmehie nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa: cubit abua na nkera ka ogologo-ya di
Exodus37:7 O me-kwa-ra cherubim ọla-edo abua; ihe akpuru akpu ka o mere ha
Exodus37:8 otù cherub n'otù nsọtu
Exodus37:9 Cherubim ahu nāb͕asa kwa nkù-ha n'elu
Exodus37:10 O me-kwa-ra table osisi acacia ahu: cubit abua ka ogologo-ya di
Exodus37:11 ọ machita ya ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa
Exodus37:12 O me-kwa-ra ya ihe-njìkọ buruburu nke ra ka otù ọbu-aka
Exodus37:13 Ọ wuara ya nb͕a-aka ọla-edo anọ
Exodus37:14 Na nso ihe-njikọ ahu ka nb͕a-aka di
Exodus37:15 O ji kwa osisi acacia me nkpa-n'aka ahu
Exodus37:16 O me-kwa-ra ihe nile nke di n'elu table
Exodus37:17 O me-kwa-ra ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa: ihe akpuru akpu ka o mere ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu
Exodus37:18 alaka isi nēsi n'akuku-ya abua waputa; alaka atọ nke ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu n'otù akuku-ya
Exodus37:19 iko atọ emere dika ifuru osisi almond di n'otù alaka
Exodus37:20 iko anọ emere dika ifuru osisi almond di kwa n'ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu
Exodus37:21 otù isi di kwa n'okpuru alaka abua site na ya
Exodus37:22 Isi-ha na alaka-ha sitere na ya; ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu nile bu otù ihe eji ọla-edo nke anāgwaghi agwa kpu.
Exodus37:23 O me-kwa-ra oriọna-ya
Exodus37:24 Otù talent nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa ka o ji me ya
Exodus37:25 O me-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-àjà ahu nke ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ
Exodus37:26 Ọ machita ya ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa
Exodus37:27 Nb͕a-aka ọla-edo abua ka o me-kwa-ra nye ya n'okpuru mpempe-ya
Exodus37:28 O ji kwa osisi acacia me nkpa-n'aka ahu
Exodus37:29 O me-kwa-ra manu otite-manu ahu di nsọ
Exodus38:1 O me-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-aja nke àjà-nsure-ọku ahu
Exodus38:2 O me-kwa-ra mpi-ya n'elu nkuku anọ ya; mpi-ya sitere na ya: ọ machita ya ọla.
Exodus38:3 O me-kwa-ra ihe nile nke ebe-ichu-aja ahu
Exodus38:4 O we mere ebe-ichu-àjà ahu ihe-ọkpukpa
Exodus38:5 O we wuara nsọtu anọ nke ihe-ọkpukpa ọla ahu nb͕a-aka anọ
Exodus38:6 O me-kwa-ra nkpa-n'aka osisi acacia
Exodus38:7 O me ka nkpa-n'aka ahu ba na nb͕a-aka ahu n'elu akuku abua nke ebe-ichu-àjà ahu
Exodus38:8 O me-kwa-ra ite ọsisa-miri
Exodus38:9 O me-kwa-ra ogige ahu: akuku Ndida nke chere iru na Ndida nwere ákwà-ngechi ogige ahu nke ezi ákwà ọcha akpara nke-ọma
Exodus38:10 ide-ha di orú
Exodus38:11 Akuku Ugwu nwe-kwa-ra ọgu cubit ise
Exodus38:12 Akuku Ọdida-anyanwu nwe-kwa-ra ákwà-ngechi nke ọgu cubit abua na iri
Exodus38:13 Akuku Iru-anyanwu chere iru n'ọwuwa-anyanwu
Exodus38:14 Ákwà-ngechi cubit iri na ise ka otù akuku ọnu-uzọ-ama-ya nwere; ide-ha di atọ
Exodus38:15 akuku nke-ọzọ nke ọnu-uzọ-ama-ya nwekwara: n'aka-nri na n'aka-ekpe nke ọnu-uzọ-ama ogige ahu ka ákwà-ngechi cubit iri na ise di; ide-ha di atọ
Exodus38:16 Ákwà-ngechi nile nke ogige ahu buruburu bu ezi ákwà ọcha akpara nke-ọma.
Exodus38:17 Ukwu nile nke ide ahu nwere bu ọla; nkpọye nile nke ide na ngegide nile ha bu ọla-ọcha; ihe amachitara isi-ha bu kwa ọla-ọcha; ihe ahu bu kwa ihe egegidere ngegide ọla-ọcha
Exodus38:18 Ákwà-nkwuchi nke ọnu-uzọ-ama ogige ahu bu ọlu onye-ọdudu-ákwà
Exodus38:19 Ide-ha di anọ
Exodus38:20 Ma ǹtú nile ebe-obibi ahu nwere
Exodus38:21 Ndia bu ngukọta ihe ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus38:22 Ma Bezalel nwa Uri
Exodus38:23 Ma onye soro ya n'ọlu ahu bu Ọhọliab
Exodus38:24 Ọla-edo nile nke ejiri je ozi ahu n'ije-ozi nile nke ebe nsọ ahu
Exodus38:25 Ọla-ọcha nke ndi agukọtara agukọta n'etiti nzukọ Israel di ọgu talent ise
Exodus38:26 otù beka otù isi
Exodus38:27 Ọgu talent ọla-ọcha ise ahu we buru iwu ukwu nile nke ibo nke ebe nsọ ahu
Exodus38:28 Nnù shekel anọ na ọgu asatọ na iri na ise ahu ka o ji kwa mere ide ahu nile nkpọye
Exodus38:29 Ọla nke àjà-ofufé ahu di kwa ọgu talent atọ na iri
Exodus38:30 O ji ya me ukwu nile nke ide ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus38:31 na ukwu nile nke ide ogige ahu buruburu
Exodus39:1 Ha site-kwa-ra n'ogho anunu ahu
Exodus39:2 Ọ mekwara ephod ahu
Exodus39:3 Ha we tisa mbadamba ihe ọla-edo ahu
Exodus39:4 Ha we mere ya ubu abua ejikọtara: na nsọtu-ya abua ka ejikọtara ya.
Exodus39:5 Ihe-ọkiké ahu nke onye-ọ̀kà kpara
Exodus39:6 Ha mekwara nkume onyx ahu
Exodus39:7 O tiye ha n'elu ubu ephod
Exodus39:8 Ọ mekwara ihe-ib͕ochi-obi ahu
Exodus39:9 Ihe nwere akuku anọ ra nrata ka o bu; ha mere ihe-ib͕ochi-obi ahu ka ọ buru ihe apiajiri apiaji: ntù-aka ka ogologo-ya di
Exodus39:10 Ha hiọgide-kwa-ra nime ya ariri nkume anọ: ariri sardius na topaz na carbuncle bu ariri mbu.
Exodus39:11 Ariri nke-abua bu emerald na sapphire na diamond.
Exodus39:12 Ariri nke-atọ bu jacinth na agate na amethyst.
Exodus39:13 Ariri nke-anọ bu beryl na onyx na jasper: etiyere ha n'ọla-edo akpara akpà n'ebe-nhiọgide-ha.
Exodus39:14 Nkume ahu di ka aha umu Israel si di
Exodus39:15 Ha mekwara n'elu ihe-ib͕ochi-obi ahu iyab͕a emere dika eriri-nma
Exodus39:16 Ha me-kwa-ra ihe ọla-edo abua akpara akpà
Exodus39:17 Ha tiye-kwa-ra iyab͕a ọla-edo abua ahu aturu atu dika udọ̀ n'elu nb͕a-aka abua ahu di na nsọtu abua nke ihe-ib͕ochi-obi ahu.
Exodus39:18 Nsọtu abua ọzọ nke iyab͕a abua ahu aturu atu dika udọ̀
Exodus39:19 Ha mekwara nb͕a-aka ọla-edo abua
Exodus39:20 Ha mekwara nb͕a-aka ọla-edo abua
Exodus39:21 Ha were kwa eriri-nma ogho anunu ke ihe-ib͕ochi-obi ahu na nb͕a-aka ephod site na nb͕a-aka-ya
Exodus39:22 Ó mekwara uwe-nwuda ephod
Exodus39:23 ọnu uwe-nwuda ahu di n'etiti ya
Exodus39:24 Ha mekwara n'ọnu-ọnu-ala uwe-nwuda ahu pomegranate nke ogho anunu
Exodus39:25 Ha mekwara ataṅu ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa
Exodus39:26 otù ataṅu na otù pomegranate
Exodus39:27 Ha we mere Eron
Exodus39:28 na ákwà-nkukù-isi ahu
Exodus39:29 na ihe ahu ike n'úkwù
Exodus39:30 Ha mekwara ihe di mbara nke okpu nsọ ahu nke onye-nchu-àjà
Exodus39:31 Ha tiye-kwa-ra n'elu ya eriri-nma ogho anunu
Exodus39:32 Ewe me ka òfùfè nile nke ebe-obibi nke ulo-ikwū nzute gwusia: umu Israel we me dika ihe nile si di nke Jehova nyere Moses n'iwu
Exodus39:33 Ha we butere Moses ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus39:34 na ihe-nkpuchi akpukpọ ebulu esijiri ọbara-ọbara
Exodus39:35 na ib͕e ihe-àmà ahu
Exodus39:36 na table ahu
Exodus39:37 na ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu nke bu ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa
Exodus39:38 na ebe-ichu-àjà ọla-edo ahu
Exodus39:39 na ebe-ichu-àjà ọla ahu
Exodus39:40 na ákwà-ngechi nile nke ogige ahu
Exodus39:41 na uwe nile akpara nke-ọma
Exodus39:42 Dika ihe nile Jehova nyere Moses n'iwu si di
Exodus39:43 Moses we hu ojije-ozi ahu nile
Exodus40:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Exodus40:2 N'ubọchi mbu nke ọnwa mbu ka i gēguzo ebe-obibi nke ulo-ikwū nzute ahu ọtọ.
Exodus40:3 I gādọba kwa n'ebe ahu ib͕e ihe-àmà ahu
Exodus40:4 I gēwebata kwa table ahu
Exodus40:5 I gētiye kwa ebe-ichu-àjà ọla-edo isure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'iru ib͕e ihe-àmà ahu
Exodus40:6 I gētiye kwa ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku ahu n'iru ọnu-uzọ nke ebe-obibi nke ulo-ikwū nzute ahu.
Exodus40:7 I gētiye kwa ite ọsisa-miri ahu n'etiti ulo-ikwū nzute ahu na ebe-ichu-àjà ahu
Exodus40:8 I gēdebe kwa ogige ahu buruburu
Exodus40:9 I gēwere kwa manu otite-manu ahu te ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus40:10 I gēte kwa ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku ahu manu
Exodus40:11 I gēte kwa ite ọsisa-miri ahu na ukwu-ala-ya manu
Exodus40:12 I gēme kwa Eron na umu-ya ndikom ka ha biarue ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute ahu nso
Exodus40:13 I gēyikwasi kwa Eron uwe nsọ ahu; i gēte kwa ya manu
Exodus40:14 Ọ bu kwa umu-ya ndikom ka i gēme ka ha biarue nso
Exodus40:15 i gēte kwa ha manu
Exodus40:16 Moses we me ya: dika ihe nile si di nke Jehova nyere ya n'iwu
Exodus40:17 O rue n'ọnwa mbu n'arọ nke-abua
Exodus40:18 Moses we guzo ebe-obibi ahu ọtọ
Exodus40:19 Ọ we b͕asa ulo-ikwū ahu n'elu ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus40:20 O were ihe-àmà ahu tiye n'ib͕e ahu
Exodus40:21 o webata ib͕e ahu n'ebe-obibi ahu
Exodus40:22 O tiye table ahu n'ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus40:23 O do usoro achicha n'usoro n'elu-ya n'iru Jehova; dika Jehova nyere Moses iwu.
Exodus40:24 Ọ dọba ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu nime ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus40:25 O welie oriọna ahu nile n'iru Jehova; dika Jehova nyere Moses iwu.
Exodus40:26 O tiye ebe-ichu-àjà ọla-edo ahu n'ulo-ikwū nzute n'iru ákwà-nb͕ochi ahu:
Exodus40:27 o we sure n'elu ya ihe-nsure-oku nēsì ísì utọ eji uda utọ di iche iche me; dika Jehova nyere Moses iwu.
Exodus40:28 Ọ tukwasi ákwà-nkwuchi nke ọnu-uzọ n'ebe-obibi ahu.
Exodus40:29 Ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku ka ọ dọba-kwa-ra n'ọnu-uzọ ebe-obibi nke ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus40:30 Ọ dọba ite ọsisa-miri ahu n'etiti ulo-ikwū nzute na ebe-ichu-àjà
Exodus40:31 Moses na Eron na umu-ya ndikom we sa aka-ha na ukwu-ha site na ya:
Exodus40:32 mb͕e ha nābà n'ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus40:33 O guzo-kwa-ra ogige ahu ọtọ buru-buru ebe-obibi ahu na ebe-ichu-àjà ahu
Exodus40:34 Igwe-oji ahu we kpuchie ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus40:35 Moses apughi kwa ibà n'ulo-ikwū nzute
Exodus40:36 Mb͕e ọ bula emere ka igwe-oji ahu si n'elu ebe-obibi ahu rigo
Exodus40:37 ma ọ buru na emeghi ka igwe-oji ahu rigo
Exodus40:38 N'ihi na igwe-oji nke Jehova di n'elu ebe-obibi ahu n'ehihie
Leviticus1:1 Jehova we kpọ Moses òkù
Leviticus1:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus1:3 Ọ buru na onyinye-ya iji biaru nso bu àjà-nsure-ọku sitere n'ìgwè ehi
Leviticus1:4 O gēbikwasi aka-ya n'isi àjà-nsure-ọku ahu; agānara kwa ya nke-ọma n'ọnọdu ya iji kpuchiri ya nmehie-ya.
Leviticus1:5 Ọ gēb͕u kwa nwa-ehi ahu n'iru Jehova: umu-ndikom Eron
Leviticus1:6 Ọ gāb͕a kwa ehi àjà-nsure-ọku ahu akpukpọ
Leviticus1:7 Umu-ndikom Eron
Leviticus1:8 umu-ndikom Eron
Leviticus1:9 ma ihe-ime-ya na ọlu-ukwu na ọlu-aka-ya ka ọ gāsa miri: onye-nchu-àjà gēsuresi kwa anu ahu nile ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ n'ebe-ichu-àjà
Leviticus1:10 Ma ọ buru na onyinye-ya iji biaru nso sitere n'ìgwè ewu na aturu
Leviticus1:11 Ọ gēb͕u kwa ya n'iru Jehova n'akuku ebe-ichu-àjà chere iru n'Ugwu: umu-ndikom Eron
Leviticus1:12 Ọ gābọ kwa ya n'ọbubọ-ya nile
Leviticus1:13 ma ihe-ime-ya na ọlu-ukwu na ọlu-aka-ya ka ọ gāsa miri: onye-nchu-àjà gēweta anu ahu nile nso
Leviticus1:14 Ma ọ buru na onyinye-ya iji biaru nso Jehova bu àjà-nsure-ọku sitere n'anu-ufe
Leviticus1:15 Onye-nchu-àjà gēweta ya nso ebe-ichu-aja
Leviticus1:16 ọ gēwezuga kwa àkpà-nri-ya na ihe di nime ya
Leviticus1:17 ọ gāb͕ọwa kwa ya na nkù-ya abua
Leviticus2:1 Ma mb͕e madu gēweta nso onyinye-ya iji biaru nso
Leviticus2:2 ọ gēweta-kwa-ra umu-ndikom Eron ya
Leviticus2:3 ma nke fọduru site n'onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu bu ihe Eron na umu-ya ndikom gēnwe: ọ bu ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile sitere n'àjà-ọku nile anāchuru Jehova.
Leviticus2:4 Ma mb͕e i gēweta nso onyinye iji biaru nso
Leviticus2:5 Ma ọ buru na onyinye-gi iji biaru nso bu onyinye-inata-iru-ọma eghere n'ite eji eghe ihe
Leviticus2:6 Nyawa ya na nnyawa-ya nile
Leviticus2:7 Ma ọ buru na onyinye-gi iji biaru nso bu onyinye-inata-iru-ọma eghere n'ihe ighe ihe
Leviticus2:8 I gēweta-kwa-ra Jehova onyinye-inata-iru-ọma nke eji ihe ndia me: agēweta kwa ya nso onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus2:9 Onye-nchu-àjà gēsi kwa n'onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu bulie ihe-ncheta-ya
Leviticus2:10 Ma nke fọduru site n'onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu Bu ihe Eron na umu-ya ndikom gēnwe: ọbu ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile sitere n'àjà-ọku nile anāchuru Jehova.
Leviticus2:11 Ọ dighi onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ọ bula nke unu gēweta nso Jehova agēji ihe nēko achicha me: n'ihi na ọ dighi ihe ọ bula nke nēko achicha
Leviticus2:12 Dika onyinye iji biaru nso
Leviticus2:13 Onyinye ọ bula iji biaru nso nke onyinye-inata-iru-ọma-gi
Leviticus2:14 Ma ọ buru na i weta nso onyinye-inata-iru-ọma
Leviticus2:15 I gētiye manu n'elu ya
Leviticus2:16 Onye-nchu-àjà gēsure ihe-ncheta-ya ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ
Leviticus3:1 Ma ọ buru na onyinye-ya iji biaru nso bu ihe àjà nke àjà-udo; ọ buru na ọ bu ihe si n'ìgwè ehi puta ka ya onwe-ya nēweta nso
Leviticus3:2 O gēbikwasi aka-ya n'isi onyinye-ya iji biaru nso
Leviticus3:3 O gēsi kwa n'ihe àjà nke àjà-udo weta nso àjà-ọku ichuru Jehova; bú abuba nke nēkpuchi ihe-ime
Leviticus3:4 na akọrọ abua
Leviticus3:5 Umu-ndikom Eron gēsure ya ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ n'ebe-ichu-àjà n'elu àjà-nsure-ọku
Leviticus3:6 Ma ọ buru na onyinye-ya iji biaru nso
Leviticus3:7 Ọ buru na ọ bu aturu ka ya onwe-ya nēweta nso ibu onyinye-ya iji biaru nso
Leviticus3:8 ọ gēbikwasi aka-ya n'isi onyinye-ya iji biaru nso
Leviticus3:9 O gēsi kwa n'ihe àjà nke àjà-udo weta nso àjà-ọku ichuru Jehova: bú abuba-ya
Leviticus3:10 na akọrọ abua
Leviticus3:11 Onye-nchu-àjà gēsure ya ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ n'ebe-ichu-àjà: ọ bu nri àjà-ọku anāchuru Jehova.
Leviticus3:12 Ma ọ buru na onyinye-ya iji biaru nso bu ewu
Leviticus3:13 O gēbikwasi aka-ya n'isi-ya
Leviticus3:14 O gēsi kwa nime ya weta nso onyinye-ya iji biaru nso
Leviticus3:15 na akọrọ abua
Leviticus3:16 Onye-nchu-àjà gēsure ha ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ n'ebe-ichu-àjà: ọ bu nri àjà-ọku
Leviticus3:17 Ọ gābu ukpuru ebighi-ebi rue ọb͕ọ-unu nile n'ebe-obibi-unu nile
Leviticus4:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus4:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus4:3 ọ buru na onye-nchu-àjà etere manu emehie dika ikpe-ọmuma ndim si di; ọ gēweta kwa nso nwa-oke-ehi zuru okè bayere nmehie-ya
Leviticus4:4 Ọ gēme ka oke-ehi ahu biarute ọnu-uzọ nke ulo-ikwū nzute n'iru Jehova; ọ gēbikwasi aka-ya n'isi oke-ehi ahu
Leviticus4:5 Onye-nchu-àjà etere manu gēwere ufọdu nime ọbara oké-ehi
Leviticus4:6 onye-nchu-àjà ahu gēdeye nkpisi-aka-ya n'ọbara ahu
Leviticus4:7 Onye-nchu-àjà gēwere kwa ufọdu nime ọbara ahu tiye n'elu mpi nile nke ebe-ichu-àjà nke ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ eji uda utọ di iche iche me n'iru Jehova
Leviticus4:8 Ọ gēsi kwa nime ya welie abuba nile nke oke-ehi nke àjà-nmehie; bú abuba nke nēkpuchi ihe-ime
Leviticus4:9 na akọrọ abua
Leviticus4:10 dika esi n'oké-ehi nke ihe àjà nke àjà-udo eweli ya: onye-nchu-àjà gēsure kwa ha ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku.
Leviticus4:11 Ma akpukpọ oke-ehi ahu
Leviticus4:12 ọbuná oke-ehi ahu nile ka o gēbupu je n'azu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū rue ebe di ọcha
Leviticus4:13 Ma ọ buru na nzukọ nile nke Israel eme ihe n'amaghi-ama
Leviticus4:14 mb͕e amara nmehie nke ha mehieworo nime ya
Leviticus4:15 Ndi-okenye nzukọ ahu gēbikwasi aka-ha n'isi oke-ehi ahu n'iru Jehova: agēb͕u kwa oke-ehi ahu n'iru Jehova.
Leviticus4:16 Onye-nchu-aja etere manu gēwebata ufọdu nime ọbara oke-ehi ahu n'ulo-ikwū nzute:
Leviticus4:17 onye-nchu-aja gēdeye nkpisi-aka-ya nime ọbara ahu
Leviticus4:18 Ọ gēwere kwa ufọdu nime ọbara ahu tiye n'elu mpi nile nke ebe-ichu-aja nke di n'iru Jehova
Leviticus4:19 O gēsi kwa nime ya welie abuba-ya nile
Leviticus4:20 Ọ gēme kwa oke-ehi ahu dika ọ mere oke-ehi nke àjà-nmehie
Leviticus4:21 O gēbupu kwa oke-ehi ahu je n'azu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū
Leviticus4:22 Mb͕e onye-isi nēmehie
Leviticus4:23 ọ buru kwa na eme ka ọ mara nmehie-ya nke ọ mehieworo nime ya
Leviticus4:24 o gēbikwasi aka-ya n'isi nkpi ahu
Leviticus4:25 Onye-nchu-aja gēwere kwa ufọdu nime ọbara nke àjà-nmehie na nkpisi-aka-ya
Leviticus4:26 Abuba-ya nile ka o gēsure ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'ebe-ichu-aja
Leviticus4:27 Ma ọ buru na otù madu n'etiti ndi ala emehie n'amaghi-ama
Leviticus4:28 ọ buru kwa na eme ka ọ mara nmehie-ya nke ọ mehieworo
Leviticus4:29 Ọ gēbi-kwasi aka-ya n'isi ihe àjà-nmehie ahu
Leviticus4:30 Onye-nchu-àjà gēwere ufọdu nime ọbara-ya na nkpisi-aka-ya
Leviticus4:31 Abuba-ya nile ka ọ gēwezuga
Leviticus4:32 Ma ọ buru na ọ weta nwa-aturu dika onyinye-ya iji biaru nso ka ọ buru àjà-nmchie
Leviticus4:33 O gēbikwasi aka-ya n'isi ihe àjà-nmehie ahu
Leviticus4:34 Onye-nchu-àjà gēwere ufọdu nime ọbara àjà-nmehie ahu na nkpisi-aka-ya
Leviticus4:35 abuba-ya nile ka ọ gēwezuga
Leviticus5:1 Mb͕e madu gēmehie
Leviticus5:2 ma-ọbu mb͕e madu gēmetu ihe ọ bula ruru árú aru
Leviticus5:3 ma-ọbu mb͕e ọ gēmetu ihe ruru árú nke madu
Leviticus5:4 ma-ọbu mb͕e madu gāṅu iyi
Leviticus5:5 o gēru kwa
Leviticus5:6 ọ gēweta-kwa-ra Jehova àjà-ikpe-ọmuma-ya bayere nmehie-ya nke ọ mehieworo
Leviticus5:7 Ma ọ buru na aka-ya erughi ihe gēzù nwa-aturu
Leviticus5:8 Ọ gāchitara ha onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus5:9 Ọ gēfesa ufọdu nime ọbara àjà-nmehie ahu n'elu akuku ebe-ichu-àjà; ma nke fọduru nime ọbara ka agāgbasa na ntọ-ala ebe-ichu-aja: àjà-nmehie ka ọ bu.
Leviticus5:10 Ọ gēme nke-abua ka ọ buru àjà-nsure-ọku dika ikpé ahu si di: onye-nchu-àjà gēkpuchi-kwa-ra ya nmehie-ya ahu nke ọ mehieworo
Leviticus5:11 Ma ọ buru na aka-ya erughi na nduru abua ma-ọbu n'umu-kpalakwu-kwu abua
Leviticus5:12 Ọ gēweta-kwa-ra ya onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus5:13 Onye-nchu-àjà gēkpuchi-kwa-ra ya nmehie-ya ahu nke ọ mehieworo n'otù nime ihe ndia
Leviticus5:14 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus5:15 Mb͕e madu gēmekpu ihe-nmekpu
Leviticus5:16 ma ihe nke ọ mehieworo megide ihe nsọ ahu
Leviticus5:17 Ma ọ buru si na madu emehie
Leviticus5:18 Ọ gēweta-kwa-ra onye-nchu-àjà ebulu zuru okè si n'ìgwè ewu na aturu puta
Leviticus5:19 Àjà-ikpe-ọmuma ka ọ bu: ikpe mara ya n'ezie n'iru Jehova.
Leviticus6:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus6:2 Mb͕e madu gēmehie
Leviticus6:3 ma-ọbu mb͕e ọ hutaworo ihe furu efu
Leviticus6:4 o gēru kwa
Leviticus6:5 ma-ọbu ihe ọ bula nke ọ ṅuru iyi bayere ya n'ugha; o gākwughachi kwa ya na nkwuzu-ya
Leviticus6:6 Ọ gēweta-kwa-ra Jehova àjà-ikpe-ọmuma-ya
Leviticus6:7 onye-nchu-àjà gēkpuchi-kwa-ra ya nmehie-ya n'iru Jehova
Leviticus6:8 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus6:9 Nye Eron na umu-ya ndikom iwu
Leviticus6:10 Onye-nchu-àjà gēyiri kwa uwe-nwuda ákwà ọcha ya
Leviticus6:11 O gēyipu uwe-ya
Leviticus6:12 Agēme kwa ka ọku nke di n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nēre ere n'elu ya
Leviticus6:13 Mb͕e dum ka agēme ka ọku nēre ere n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà; ọ gaghi-anyu anyu.
Leviticus6:14 Nka bu kwa iwu onyinye-inata-iru-ọma: umu-ndikom Eron gēweta ya nso n'iru Jehova
Leviticus6:15 O gēsite nime ya weju nweju-aka-ya weli
Leviticus6:16 Ma ihe fọduru nime ya
Leviticus6:17 Agaghēwere ihe nēko achicha sie ya. Enyewom ya ka ọ buru òkè-ha sitere n'àjà-ọkum nile; ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile ka ọ bu
Leviticus6:18 Nwoke ọ bula n'etiti umu Eron gēri ya
Leviticus6:19 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus6:20 Nka bu onyinye iji biaru nso nke Eron na umu-ya ndikom
Leviticus6:21 N'ite isi ihe ka agēwere manu me ya; mb͕e ọ deworo edè i gēwebata ya: iberibe achicha esiri esi nke onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ka i gēweta nso ibu ihe ísì utọ anēsurere Jehova.
Leviticus6:22 Onye-nchu-aja etere manu nke gānọchi ya site n'umu-ya ndikom gēme ya: ọ bu ukpuru ebighi-ebi Jehova nwere; agēsuresi ya ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ.
Leviticus6:23 Onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ọ bula nke onye-nchu-àjà ka agēsuresi kwa oku: agaghi-eri ya.
Leviticus6:24 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus6:25 Gwa Eron
Leviticus6:26 Onye-nchu-àjà nke nāchu ya bayere nmehie gēri ya; n'ebe di nsọ ka agēri ya
Leviticus6:27 Ihe ọ bula nke nēmetu anu-ya aru gādi nsọ: mb͕e efesara ufọdu nime ọbara-ya n'uwe ọ bula
Leviticus6:28 Ma agētiwa ihe ájá nke esiri ya nime ya: ma ọ buru na n'ihe ọla ka esiri ya
Leviticus6:29 Nwoke ọ bula n'etiti ndi-nchu-àjà gēri ya: ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile ka ọ bu.
Leviticus6:30 Ọ dighi kwa àjà-nmehie ọ bula agēri
Leviticus7:1 Nka bu kwa iwu àjà-ikpe-ọmuma: ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile ka ọ bu.
Leviticus7:2 N'ebe ha nēb͕u ihe àjà-nsure-ọku ka ha gēb͕u ihe àjà-ikpe-ọmuma; ọ gāwusa kwa ọbara-ya n'ebe-ichu-àjà buruburu.
Leviticus7:3 Abuba-ya nile ka ọ gēsi nime ya weta nso; bú akuku ọdudu-ya nwere abuba
Leviticus7:4 na akọrọ abua
Leviticus7:5 onye-nchu-àjà gēsure ha ọku ibu ihe nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ n'ebe-ichu-àjà ka ọ buru àjà-ọku anāchuru Jehova: àjà-ikpe-ọmuma ka ọ bu.
Leviticus7:6 Nwoke ọ bula n'etiti ndi-nchu-àjà gēri ya: n'ebe di nsọ ka agēri ya: ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile ka ọ bu.
Leviticus7:7 Dika àjà-nmehie si di
Leviticus7:8 Onye-nchu-àjà nke nēweta nso àjà-nsure-ọku nke onye ọ bula
Leviticus7:9 Ọzọ
Leviticus7:10 Ọzọ onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ọ bula
Leviticus7:11 Nka bu kwa iwu nke ihe àjà nke àjà-udo nke madu gēweta nso Jehova.
Leviticus7:12 Ọ buru na ọ weta ya nso ka ọ buru àjà-ekele
Leviticus7:13 N'elu ob͕e achicha koro eko ufọdu ka ọ gēweta nso onyinye-ya iji biaru nso tiyere àjà-ekele nke àjà-udo-ya.
Leviticus7:14 O gēsi kwa na ya weta nso otù nime onyinye ọ bula iji biaru nso ka ọ buru àjà-nbuli ibuliri Jehova; onye-nchu-aja nke nāwusa ọbara àjà-udo
Leviticus7:15 Agēri kwa anu nke àjà-ekele nke àjà-udo-ya n'ubọchi nke onyinye-ya iji biaru nso; ọ gaghi-adọba ufọdu nime ya rue ututu.
Leviticus7:16 Ma ọ buru na àjà nke onyinye-ya iji biaru nso bu nkwa ma-ọbu àjà-afọ-ofufo
Leviticus7:17 ma nke fọduru nime anu nke àjà ahu
Leviticus7:18 Ma ọ buru na erie ufọdu nime anu nke ihe àjà nke àjà-udo-ya n'ubọchi nke-atọ n'uzọ ọ bula
Leviticus7:19 Anu nke meturu ihe ọ bula ruru árú
Leviticus7:20 ma madu nke nēri anu sitere n'ihe àjà nke-udo
Leviticus7:21 Ma mb͕e madu gēmetu ihe ọ bula ruru árú aru
Leviticus7:22 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus7:23 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus7:24 Abuba nke anumanu nwuru onwe-ya
Leviticus7:25 N'ihi na onye ọ bula nke nēri abuba sitere n'anumanu nke madu si nime ya eweta nso àjà-ọku ichuru Jehova
Leviticus7:26 Ọ dighi kwa ọbara ọ bula unu gēri n'ebe-ọbibi-unu nile
Leviticus7:27 Madu ọ bula nke gēri ọbara ọ bula
Leviticus7:28 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus7:29 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus7:30 aka ya gēweta àjà-ọku nke Jehova; abuba di n'akuku okpukpu-obi ka ọ gēweta
Leviticus7:31 Onye-nchu-àjà gēsure kwa abuba ahu ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísi utọ n'ebe-ichu-àjà: ma okpukpu-obi ahu ka Eron na umu-ya ndikom gēnwe.
Leviticus7:32 Utaku-ukwu aka-nri ka unu gēnye kwa onye-nchu-àjà ibu àjà-nbuli sitere n'ihe àjà nile nke àjà-udo-unu.
Leviticus7:33 Onye ahu n'etiti umu-ndikom Eron nke nēweta nso ọbara nke àjà-udo nile
Leviticus7:34 N'ihi na okpukpu-obi nke àjà-ofufé na utaku-ukwu nke àjà-nbuli ka M'naraworo n'aka umu Israel site n'ihe àjà nile nke àjà-udo-ha nile
Leviticus7:35 Nka bu òkè otite-manu Eron
Leviticus7:36 bú nke Jehova nyere iwu ka enye ha site n'aka umu Israel
Leviticus7:37 Nka bu iwu diri àjà-nsure-ọku
Leviticus7:38 nke Jehova nyere Moses n'iwu n'ugwu Sainai
Leviticus8:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus8:2 Chiri Eron na umu-ya ndikom tiyere ya
Leviticus8:3 kpọkọta kwa nzukọ Israel nile n'ọnu-uzọ nke ulo-ikwū nzute.
Leviticus8:4 Moses we me dika Jehova nyere ya iwu; ewe kpọkọta nzukọ ahu n'ọnu-uzọ nke ulo-ikwū nzute.
Leviticus8:5 Moses we si nzukọ ahu
Leviticus8:6 Moses we me ka Eron na umu-ya ndikom biaru nso
Leviticus8:7 O tiye n'aru ya uwe-ime ahu
Leviticus8:8 Ọ tukwasi n'aru ya ihe-ib͕ochi-obi; tiye kwa n'elu ihe-ib͕ochi-obi Ìhè ahu na Izu-okè ahu.
Leviticus8:9 Ọ tukwasi ákwà-nkukù-isi n'isi-ya; tukwasi kwa n'ákwà-nkukù-isi ahu
Leviticus8:10 Moses we were manu otite-manu ahu
Leviticus8:11 Ọ we fesa ufọdu nime ya n'ebe-ichu-àjà ub͕ò asa
Leviticus8:12 Ọ wukwasi kwa ufọdu nime manu otite-manu ahu n'isi Eron
Leviticus8:13 Moses we me ka umu-ndikom Eron biaru nso
Leviticus8:14 Ọ kputa oke-ehi nke àjà-nmehie nso: Eron na umu-ya ndikom we bikwasi aka-ha n'oke-ehi nke àjà-nmehie.
Leviticus8:15 O b͕ue ya; Moses we were ọbara-ya
Leviticus8:16 Ọ were abuba nile nke di n'elu ihe-ime
Leviticus8:17 Ma oke-ehi ahu
Leviticus8:18 Ọ weta nso ebulu nke àjà-nsure-ọku: Eron na umu-ya ndikom we bikwasi aka-ha n'isi ebulu ahu.
Leviticus8:19 O b͕ue ya: Moses we wusa ọbara-ya n'ebe-ichu-àjà ahu buruburu.
Leviticus8:20 Ọ bọ ebulu ahu n'ọbubọ-ya; Moses we sure isi-ya na ọbubọ-ya nile na abuba-ya ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ.
Leviticus8:21 Ọ were miri sa ihe-ime-ya na ọlu-ukwu na ọlu-aka-ya; Moses we sure ebulu ahu nile ọku ibu ihe-nsure-ọku nēsi ísì utọ n'ebe-ichu-àjà: àjà-nsure-ọku ka ọ bu ibu ihe ísì utọ: àjà-ọku anāchuru Jehova ka ọ bu; dika Jehova nyere Moses iwu.
Leviticus8:22 Ọ we weta nso ebulu nke-ọzọ
Leviticus8:23 O b͕ue ya; Moses we were ufọdu nime ọbara-ya
Leviticus8:24 Ọ me ka umu-ndikom Eron biaru nso
Leviticus8:25 Ọ were abuba-ya
Leviticus8:26 o si na nkata achicha ekoghi-eko ahu nke di n'iru Jehova were otù ob͕e achicha ekoghi-eko
Leviticus8:27 o tiye ha nile n'elu ọbu-aka abua nke Eron
Leviticus8:28 Moses we wepu ha n'elu ọbu-aka-ha
Leviticus8:29 Moses were kwa okpukpu-obi-ya
Leviticus8:30 Moses were kwa ufọdu nime manu otite-manu ahu
Leviticus8:31 Moses we si Eron na umu-ya ndikom
Leviticus8:32 Ma ihe nke fọduru nime anu ahu na nime achicha ahu
Leviticus8:33 Unu esi-kwa-la n'ọnu-uzọ nke ulo-ikwū nzute pua ubọchi asa
Leviticus8:34 Dika emere ta
Leviticus8:35 Ọ bu kwa n'ọnu-uzọ nke ulo-ikwū nzute ka unu gānọgide ehihie na abali ubọchi asa
Leviticus8:36 Eron na umu-ya ndikom we me ihe nile Jehova nyere n'iwu site n'aka Moses.
Leviticus9:1 O rue
Leviticus9:2 ọ si Eron
Leviticus9:3 Umu Israel ka i gāgwa kwa okwu
Leviticus9:4 chiri kwa ehi na ebulu ka ha buru àjà-udo
Leviticus9:5 Ha we weta ihe Moses nyere n'iwu n'iru ulo-ikwū nzute: nzukọ Israel nile we biaru nso guzo kwa n'iru Jehova.
Leviticus9:6 Moses we si
Leviticus9:7 Moses we si Eron
Leviticus9:8 Eron we biarue ebe-ichu-àjà nso
Leviticus9:9 Umu-ndikom Eron we wetara ya nso ọbara-ya: ọ we deye nkpisi-aka-ya n'ọbara ahu
Leviticus9:10 ma abuba
Leviticus9:11 Ma anu-ya na akpukpọ-ya
Leviticus9:12 Ọ we b͕ue ihe àjà-nsure-ọku: umu-ndikom Eron we me ka ọbara-ya rue ya aka
Leviticus9:13 Àjà-nsure-ọku ka ha me-kwa-ra ka o rue ya aka
Leviticus9:14 Ọ we sa ihe-ime-ya na ọlu-ukwu na ọlu-aka-ya
Leviticus9:15 Ọ we weta nso onyinye iji biaru nso nke ndi Israel
Leviticus9:16 Ọ weta kwa àjà-nsure-ọku nso
Leviticus9:17 Ọ weta kwa nso onyinye-inata-iru-ọma
Leviticus9:18 O b͕u-kwa-ra ehi ahu na ebulu ahu
Leviticus9:19 ha me-kwa-ra ka abuba nile nke putara n'ehi ahu rue ya aka; na ihe putara n'ebulu ahu
Leviticus9:20 ha we tukwasi abuba ahu n'okpukpu-obi
Leviticus9:21 ma okpukpu-obi-ha na utaku-ukwu aka-nri ka Eron fere ka ha buru àjà-ofufé n'iru Jehova; dika Moses nyere iwu.
Leviticus9:22 Eron we chilie aka-ya n'ebe ndi Israel nọ
Leviticus9:23 Moses na Eron we ba n'ulo-ikwū nzute

Leviticus10:1 Ma umu-ndikom Eron
Leviticus10:2 Ọku we si n'iru Jehova puta
Leviticus10:3 Moses we si Eron
Leviticus10:4 Moses we kpọ Mishael na Elzafan
Leviticus10:5 Ha we biaru nso
Leviticus10:6 Moses we si Eron
Leviticus10:7 Unu esi-kwa-la n'ọnu-uzọ nke ulo-ikwū nzute pua
Leviticus10:8 Jehova we gwa Eron okwu
Leviticus10:9 Aṅula manya-vine ma-ọbu ihe-ọṅuṅu nābà n'anya
Leviticus10:10 ka unu we kpa kwa ókè n'etiti ihe nsọ na ihe nādighi nsọ
Leviticus10:11 ka unu we zí kwa umu Israel ukpuru nile nke Jehova gwaworo ha site n'aka Moses.
Leviticus10:12 Moses we gwa Eron okwu
Leviticus10:13 Unu gēri kwa ya n'ebe di nsọ
Leviticus10:14 Okpukpu-obi nke àjà-ofufé na utaku-ukwu nke àjà-nbuli ka unu gēri kwa n'ebe di ọcha; gi onwe-gi
Leviticus10:15 Utaku-ukwu nke àjà-nbuli na okpukpu-obi nke àjà-ofufé ka ha gēweta n'elu àjà-ọku nile nke abuba nile
Leviticus10:16 Moses we chọsie nkpi nke àjà-nmehie ike
Leviticus10:17 Gini mere unu erighi àjà-nmehie n'ebe nke ebe nsọ ahu? n'ihi na ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile ka ọ bu

Leviticus11:1 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu
Leviticus11:2 Gwanu umu Israel okwu
Leviticus11:3 Anu ọ bula nke ukwu-ya wara njakpa
Leviticus11:4 Otú ọ di
Leviticus11:5 Coney kwa
Leviticus11:6 Hare kwa
Leviticus11:7 Ezì kwa
Leviticus11:8 Unu erila ihe sitere n'anu-ha
Leviticus11:9 Ndia ka unu gēri n'etiti ihe nile nke di na miri: ihe ọ bula nke nwere ntù na akpilikpa nime miri
Leviticus11:10 Ma ihe ọ bula nke nēnweghi ntù na akpilikpa n'oké osimiri nile
Leviticus11:11 ihe-árú ka ha gābu-kwa-ra unu; unu erila ihe sitere n'anu-ha
Leviticus11:12 Ihe ọ bula nke nēnweghi ntù na akpilikpa nime miri
Leviticus11:13 Ndia ka unu gāgu kwa n'ihe-árú n'etiti anu-ufe; agaghi-eri ha
Leviticus11:14 na ndab͕u
Leviticus11:15 ugolo-ọma ọ bula di iche iche;
Leviticus11:16 na enyi-nnunu
Leviticus11:17 na okwukwu ntà
Leviticus11:18 na okwukwu nwere mpi
Leviticus11:19 na ub͕ala
Leviticus11:20 Anu-ufe ọ bula nke nēnuputa enuputa
Leviticus11:21 Ma otú ọ di
Leviticus11:22 ndia ka unu gēri n'etiti ha; igurube di iche iche
Leviticus11:23 Ma anu-ufe ọ bula nke nēnuputa enuputa
Leviticus11:24 N'ihi ihe ndia ka unu gēme onwe-unu ndi ruru árú: onye ọ bula nke nēmetu ozu-ha aka gāru árú rue anyasi:
Leviticus11:25 onye ọ bula nke nēbu ihe sitere n'ozu-ha gāsu uwe-ya
Leviticus11:26 Anumanu ọ bula nke bu ihe ukwu-ya wara njakpa
Leviticus11:27 Ihe ọ bula kwa nke nēje ije n'ọbu-aka-ya
Leviticus11:28 Onye nēbu ozu-ha gāsu uwe-ya
Leviticus11:29 Ndia bu-kwa-ra unu ihe ruru árú n'etiti ihe nēnuputa enuputa
Leviticus11:30 na ọba-miri
Leviticus11:31 Ndia buru unu ihe ruru árú n'etiti ihe nile nēnuputa enuputa: onye ọ bula nke nēmetu ha aka mb͕e ha nwuru anwu gāru árú rue anyasi.
Leviticus11:32 Ihe ọ bula nke otù nime ha gādakwasi
Leviticus11:33 Ihe ájá ọ bula nke otù nime ha gādabà nime ya
Leviticus11:34 Nime ihe-oriri nile nke anēri
Leviticus11:35 Ihe ọ bula nke ihe si n'ozu-ha gādakwasi gāru kwa árú; ma ọ bu ite-ọku
Leviticus11:36 Ma otú ọ di
Leviticus11:37 Ma mb͕e ihe nke si n'ozu-ha gādakwasi nkpuru-ọghigha ọ bula nke anāgha agha
Leviticus11:38 Ma mb͕e agētiye miri n'elu nkpuru-ọghigha
Leviticus11:39 Ọzọ
Leviticus11:40 Onye nēri ufọdu nime ozu-ya gāsu uwe-ya
Leviticus11:41 Ọzọ ihe ọ bula nke nēnuputa enuputa nke nēnuputa n'elu uwa
Leviticus11:42 Ihe ọ bula nke nēje ije n'afọ-ya
Leviticus11:43 Unu ejila ihe-nnuputa ọ bula nke nēnuputa enuputa me onwe-unu ka unu buru ihe-árú
Leviticus11:44 N'ihi na Mu onwem bu Jehova Chineke-unu: unu gēdo kwa onwe-unu nsọ
Leviticus11:45 N'ihi na Mu onwem bu Jehova Nke nēme ka unu si n'ala Ijipt rigoputa
Leviticus11:46 Nka bu iwu nke anumanu
Leviticus11:47 ka ewe kpa ókè n'etiti ihe ruru árú na ihe di ọcha
Leviticus12:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus12:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus12:3 N'ubọchi nke-asatọ agēbì ya úgwù n'anu-aru nke api-ya.
Leviticus12:4 Orú ubọchi na iri na atọ ka nwayi ahu gānọgide n'ọbara nke ime ya ka ọ di ọcha; ọ dighi ihe nsọ ọ bula ọ gēmetu aka
Leviticus12:5 Ma ọ buru na ọ mua nwa-nwayi
Leviticus12:6 N'ozuzù ubọchi nile nke ime ya ka ọ di ọcha bayere nwa-nwoke
Leviticus12:7 ọ gēweta kwa ya nso n'iru Jehova
Leviticus12:8 Ma ọ buru na aka-ya erughi ihe gēzù nwa-aturu
Leviticus13:1 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu
Leviticus13:2 Madu
Leviticus13:3 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ihe-otiti ahu di n'akpukpọ nke anu-aru-ya: ma ọ buru na aji nke di n'ihe-otiti ahu ab͕anwewo ọchā
Leviticus13:4 Ma ọ buru na ntupọ ahu nke nēke uke di ọcha n'akpukpọ anu-aru-ya
Leviticus13:5 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya anya n'ubọchi nke-asa: ma
Leviticus13:6 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya n'ubọchi nke-asa ọzọ: ma
Leviticus13:7 Ma ọ buru na ọnya ahu aba aba nke-uku n'akpukpọ-aru-ya
Leviticus13:8 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya
Leviticus13:9 Mb͕e ihe-otiti ekpenta di n'aru madu
Leviticus13:10 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa
Leviticus13:11 ekpenta site na mb͕e ochie ka ọ bu n'akpukpọ anu-aru-ya
Leviticus13:12 Ọ buru kwa na ekpenta ab͕awaputa nke-uku n'akpukpọ-aru-ya
Leviticus13:13 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya: ma
Leviticus13:14 Ma n'ubọchi anāhu anu-aru ndu nime ya
Leviticus13:15 Onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa anu-aru ndu ahu
Leviticus13:16 Ma-ọbu mb͕e anu-aru ndu ahu gātughari
Leviticus13:17 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu ya: ma
Leviticus13:18 Ọzọ
Leviticus13:19 ihe-otutó ọcha we di n'ọnọdu ihe otiti ahu
Leviticus13:20 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya
Leviticus13:21 Ma ọ buru na onye-nchu-àjà ahú ya
Leviticus13:22 ma ọ buru na ọ ba aba nke-uku n'akpukpọ-aru-ya
Leviticus13:23 Ma ọ buru na ntupọ ahu nke nēke uke eguzo n'ọnọdu-ya
Leviticus13:24 Ma-ọbu anu-aru
Leviticus13:25 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu ya: ma
Leviticus13:26 Ma ọ buru na onye-nchu-àjà ahú ya
Leviticus13:27 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya n'ubọchi nke-asa: ọ buru na ọ ba aba nke-uku n'akpukpọ-aru-ya
Leviticus13:28 Ma ọ buru na ntupọ nke nēke uke eguzo n'ọnọdu-ya ma ọ baghi aba n'akpukpọ-aru-ya
Leviticus13:29 Ma nwoke ma-ọbu nwayi
Leviticus13:30 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu ihe-otiti ahu: ma
Leviticus13:31 Ma mb͕e onye-nchu-àjà gāhu ihe-otiti nke ọria-isi ahu
Leviticus13:32 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ihe-otiti ahu n'ubọchi nke-asa: ma
Leviticus13:33 agākọpu kwa isi-ya
Leviticus13:34 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ọria-isi ahu n'ubọchi nke-asa: ma
Leviticus13:35 Ma ọ buru na ọria-isi-ya aba aba nke-uku n'akpukpọ-aru-ya mb͕e emesiri ka ọ di ọcha;
Leviticus13:36 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya: ma
Leviticus13:37 Ma ọ buru na ọria-isi ahu eguzowo n'anya-ya
Leviticus13:38 Ma nwoke ma-ọbu nwayi
Leviticus13:39 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa: ma
Leviticus13:40 Ma onye ọ bula
Leviticus13:41 Ọ buru kwa na agiri-isi-ya akwọchapuwo n'isi-ya na nko iru-ya
Leviticus13:42 Ma mb͕e ihe-otiti nke di ọcha nācha ọbara di n'isi-nkwọcha ahu ma-ọbu n'egedege-iru ahu kwọchara akwọcha; ekpenta nke nāb͕awaputa n'isi-nkwọcha-ya
Leviticus13:43 Onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa ya: ma
Leviticus13:44 onye-ekpenta ka ọ bu
Leviticus13:45 Ma onye-ekpenta
Leviticus13:46 Ubọchi nile nke ihe-otiti ahu di n'aru ya ka ọ gāru árú; onye ruru árú ka ọ bu: ọ gēbi iche; n'azu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ka ebe-obibi-ya gābu.
Leviticus13:47 Uwe kwa
Leviticus13:48 ma ọ bu nke akpara ogologo
Leviticus13:49 ọ buru kwa na ihe-otiti ahu acha akwukwọ ndu akwukwọ ndu ma-ọbu ọbara-ọbara n'uwe
Leviticus13:50 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu ihe-otiti ahu
Leviticus13:51 ọ gāhu kwa ihe-otiti ahu n'ubọchi nke-asa: mb͕e ihe-otiti ahu baworo aba n'uwe
Leviticus13:52 O gēsure kwa uwe ahu ọku
Leviticus13:53 Ma ọ buru na onye-nchu-àjà ahú
Leviticus13:54 onye-nchu-àjà gēnye kwa iwu ka ha sua ihe ahu nke ihe-otiti ahu di nime ya
Leviticus13:55 onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa
Leviticus13:56 Ma ọ buru na onye-nchu-àjà ahú
Leviticus13:57 Ma ọ buru na anāhu ya n'uwe ub͕u a
Leviticus13:58 Uwe ahu kwa
Leviticus13:59 Nka bu iwu nke ihe-otiti ekpenta n'uwe aji-anu ma-ọbu nke flax
Leviticus14:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus14:2 Nka gābu iwu onye-ekpenta n'ubọchi anēme ya ka ọ di ọcha: na agēme ya ka ọ biakute onye-nchu-àjà:
Leviticus14:3 onye-nchu-àjà gāpu kwa je n'azu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū: onye-nchu-àjà gāhu kwa
Leviticus14:4 onye-nchu-àjà gēnye kwa iwu ka ewere nnunu abua di ndu di kwa ọcha
Leviticus14:5 onye-nchu-àjà gēnye kwa iwu ka eb͕ue otù nime nnunu ahu nime ihe ájá n'elu miri nērù erù:
Leviticus14:6 nnunu ahu nke di ndu
Leviticus14:7 ọ gēfesa kwa ya ub͕ò asa n'aru onye-ahu anēme ka ọ di ọcha n'ekpenta
Leviticus14:8 Onye ahu anēme ka ọ di ọcha gāsu kwa uwe-ya nile
Leviticus14:9 O gēru kwa n'ubọchi nke-asa
Leviticus14:10 Ma n'ubọchi nke-asatọ ọ gēwere umu-ebulu abua zuru okè
Leviticus14:11 Onye-nchu-àjà nke nēme ya ka ọ di ọcha gēguzo kwa nwoke ahu anēme ka ọ di ọcha
Leviticus14:12 onye-nchu-àjà gēwere kwa otù nime umu-ebulu ahu
Leviticus14:13 o gēb͕u kwa nwa-ebulu ahu n'ebe o nēb͕u àjà-nmehie na àjà-nsure-ọku
Leviticus14:14 onye-nchu-àjà gēwere kwa ufọdu nime ọbara nke àjà-ikpe-ọmuma ahu
Leviticus14:15 onye-nchu-àjà gēweta kwa ufọdu nime log nke manu ahu
Leviticus14:16 onye-nchu-àjà gēdeye kwa nkpisi-aka-nri-ya nime manu nke di n'ọbu-aka-ekpe-ya
Leviticus14:17 ufọdu nime manu nke fọduru n'ọbu-aka-ya ka onye-nchu-àjà gētiye kwa n'ọnu-ọnu nti aka-nri nke onye ahu anēme ka ọ di ọcha
Leviticus14:18 ma manu nke fọduru n'ọbu-aka nke onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus14:19 Onye-nchu-àjà gēme kwa àjà-nmehie
Leviticus14:20 onye-nchu-àjà gēsure kwa àjà-nsure-ọku na onyinye-inata-iru-ọma n'ebe-ichu-aja: onye-nchu-aja gēkpuchi-kwa-ra ya nmehie-ya
Leviticus14:21 Ma ọ buru na ob͕eye ka ọ bu
Leviticus14:22 na nduru abua
Leviticus14:23 Ọ gēweta-kwa-ra ha onye-nchu-aja n'ubọchi nke-asatọ ime ka ọ di ọcha
Leviticus14:24 Onye-nchu-aja gēwere kwa nwa-aturu ahu nke àjà-ikpe-ọmuma
Leviticus14:25 o gēb͕u kwa nwa-aturu àjà-ikpe-ọmuma ahu
Leviticus14:26 ọ bu kwa ufọdu nime manu ahu ka onye-nchu-aja gāwusi n'ọbu-aka-ekpe onye-nchu-aja ahu:
Leviticus14:27 onye-nchu-aja gēwere kwa nkpisi-aka-nri-ya fesa ufọdu nime manu nke di n'ọbu-aka-ekpe-ya ub͕ò asa n'iru Jehova:
Leviticus14:28 onye-nchu-aja gētiye kwa ufọdu nime manu nke di n'ọbu-aka-ya n'ọnu-ọnu nti aka-nri nke onye anēme ka ọ di ọcha
Leviticus14:29 ma nke fọduru nime manu nke di n'ọbu-aka onye-nchu-aja
Leviticus14:30 Ọ gāchu kwa otù nime nduru ahu n'àjà
Leviticus14:31 ọbuná ihe aka-ya ruru
Leviticus14:32 Nka bu iwu nke onye ahu ihe-otiti ekpenta di n'aru ya
Leviticus14:33 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu
Leviticus14:34 Mb͕e unu gābata n'ala Kenean
Leviticus14:35 onye nwe ulo ahu gābia kwa
Leviticus14:36 onye-nchu-aja gēnye kwa iwu ka akwapu ihe di n'ulo ahu
Leviticus14:37 ọ gāhu kwa ihe-otiti ahu anya
Leviticus14:38 onye-nchu-àjà gēsi kwa n'ulo ahu pua rue ọnu-uzọ ulo ahu
Leviticus14:39 onye-nchu-àjà gābiaghachi n'ubọchi nke-asa
Leviticus14:40 onye-nchu-àjà gēnye kwa iwu ka ha dọpu nkume nile nke ihe-otiti ahu di nime ha
Leviticus14:41 ọ gēme kwa ka akpucha ulo ahu nime buruburu
Leviticus14:42 ha gēweta kwa nkume ọzọ
Leviticus14:43 Ma ọ buru na ihe-otiti ahu alaghachi
Leviticus14:44 onye-nchu-àjà gābata kwa
Leviticus14:45 Ọ gākwatu kwa ulo ahu
Leviticus14:46 Ọzọ
Leviticus14:47 Onye nēdina kwa n'ulo ahu gāsu uwe-ya nile; ọzọ
Leviticus14:48 Ma ọ buru na onye-nchu-àjà abata nime
Leviticus14:49 Ọ gēwere kwa nnunu abua
Leviticus14:50 ọ gēb͕u kwa otù nime nnunu ahu n'ihe ájá n'elu miri nērù erù:
Leviticus14:51 ọ gēwere kwa osisi cedar ahu
Leviticus14:52 Ọ gēwepu kwa nmehie n'ulo ahu site n'ọbara nnunu ahu
Leviticus14:53 ma ọ gēzilaga nnunu ahu di ndu n'azu obodo n'ọhia sara iru: ọ gēkpuchi-kwa-ra ulo ahu nmehie-ya: ọ gādi kwa ọcha.
Leviticus14:54 Nka bu iwu diri ihe-otiti ekpenta ọ bula
Leviticus14:55 di-kwa-ra ekpenta uwe
Leviticus14:56 di-kwa-ra ihe-otutó
Leviticus14:57 izi ihe n'ubochi nke iru-árú-ya na n'ubọchi nke idi-ọcha-ya: nka bu iwu ekpenta.
Leviticus15:1 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu
Leviticus15:2 Gwanu umu Israel okwu
Leviticus15:3 Nka gābu kwa ọrurú n'orùrù-ya: ma ọ bu na anu-aru-ya nērù n'orùrù-ya
Leviticus15:4 Ihe-ndina ọ bula nke onye nwere orùrù ahu nēdinakwasi gāru árú: ihe ọ bula kwa nke ọ nānọkwasi gāru árú.
Leviticus15:5 Onye ọ bula nke nēmetu ihe-ndina-ya aru gāsu uwe-ya nile
Leviticus15:6 Onye nānọkwasi n'ihe nke onye nwere orùrù nānọkwasi gāsu kwa uwe-ya nile
Leviticus15:7 Onye nēmetu anu-aru nke onye ahu nwere orùrù gāsu kwa uwe-ya nile
Leviticus15:8 Ọzọ
Leviticus15:9 Ihe ọ bula eji anọkwasi anumanu nke onye nwere orùrù nānọkwasi gāru kwa árú.
Leviticus15:10 Onye ọ bula nke nēmetu ihe ọ bula di n'okpuru ya aru gāru árú rue anyasi: onye nēbu kwa ha gāsu uwe-ya nile
Leviticus15:11 Onye ọ bula nke onye nwere orùrù nēmetu aka
Leviticus15:12 Ihe ájá kwa
Leviticus15:13 Ma mb͕e emeworo onye nwere orùrù ka ọ di ọcha site n'orùrù-ya
Leviticus15:14 Ma n'ubọchi nke-asatọ ọ gēwere n'onwe-ya nduru abua
Leviticus15:15 onye-nchu-àjà gēme kwa ha
Leviticus15:16 Nwoke ọ bula
Leviticus15:17 Uwe ọ bula
Leviticus15:18 Nwayi kwa
Leviticus15:19 Ọzọ
Leviticus15:20 Ihe ọ bula nke o nēdinakwasi n'idi-na-nsọ-ya gāru kwa árú: ihe ọ bula kwa nke ọ nānọkwasi gāru árú.
Leviticus15:21 Onye ọ bula nke nēmetu ihe-ndina-ya aru gāsu uwe-ya nile
Leviticus15:22 Onye ọ bula nke nēmetu ihe ọ bula ọ nānọkwasi aru gāsu kwa uwe-ya nile
Leviticus15:23 Ọ buru kwa na ọ bu n'ihe-ndina ka ọ dikwasi
Leviticus15:24 Ọ buru kwa na ya nwoke edina ma-ọli
Leviticus15:25 Nwayi ọ bula kwa
Leviticus15:26 Ihe-ndina ọ bula nke o nēdinakwasi ubọchi nile nke orùrù-ya gādi ya ka ihe-ndina idi-na-nsọ-ya: ihe ọ bula nke ọ nānọkwasi gāru kwa árú
Leviticus15:27 Onye ọ bula nke nēmetu ha aru gāru kwa árú
Leviticus15:28 Ma ọ buru na emewo ka nwayi ahu di ọcha site n'orùrù-ya
Leviticus15:29 N'ubọchi nke-asatọ ọ gēwere n'onwe-ya nduru abua
Leviticus15:30 Onye-nchu-àjà gēme kwa otù nime ha ka ọ buru àjà-nmehie
Leviticus15:31 Unu gēkewapu kwa umu Israel n'ọrurú-ha; ka ha we ghara inwu n'ọrurú-ha
Leviticus15:32 Nka bu iwu nke onye nwere orùrù
Leviticus15:33 na nke nwayi nke aru nādighi ya ike n'idi-na-nsọ-ya
Leviticus16:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus16:2 Jehova we si Moses
Leviticus16:3 Nka ka Eron gēwere bata n'ebe nsọ a: ọ gēwere nwa-oke-ehi ka ọ buru àjà-nmehie
Leviticus16:4 Uwe-ime di nsọ nke ákwà ọcha ka o gēyiri
Leviticus16:5 N'aka nzukọ umu Israel ka ọ gānara kwa nkpi abua ka ha buru àjà-nmehie
Leviticus16:6 Eron gēweta kwa nso oké-ehi àjà-nmehie ahu
Leviticus16:7 Ọ gēwere kwa nkpi abua ahu
Leviticus16:8 Eron gēfe kwa nzà n'elu nkpi abua ahu; otù nzà diri Jehova
Leviticus16:9 Eron gēweta kwa nso nkpi ahu nke nzà nke diri Jehova mara
Leviticus16:10 Ma nkpi ahu
Leviticus16:11 Eron gēweta kwa nso oke-ehi àjà-nmehie ahu
Leviticus16:12 ọ gēwere kwa ihe-igu-ọku juputara n'icheku-ọku site n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà
Leviticus16:13 ọ gētiye kwa ihe-nsure-ọku ahu nēsì ísì utọ n'elu ọku n'iru Jehova
Leviticus16:14 ọ gēwere kwa ufọdu nime ọbara oke-ehi ahu
Leviticus16:15 Ọ gēb͕u kwa nkpi àjà-nmehie ahu
Leviticus16:16 ọ gēkpuchi-kwa-ra ebe nsọ a nmehie-ya
Leviticus16:17 Ọ dighi kwa madu ọ bula gānọ n'ulo-ikwū nzute mb͕e ọ nābà ikpuchi nmehie n'ebe nsọ a
Leviticus16:18 Ọ gāpu kwa je n'ebe-ichu-àjà nke di n'iru Jehova
Leviticus16:19 Ọ gēwere kwa nkpisi-aka-ya fesa ufọdu nime ọbara ahu n'elu ya ub͕ò asa
Leviticus16:20 Mb͕e o kpuchibiri nmehie ebe nsọ a
Leviticus16:21 Eron gēbikwasi kwa aka-ya abua n'isi nkpi ahu di ndu
Leviticus16:22 nkpi ahu gēbu kwa n'aru ya ajọ omume-ha nile rue ala nkewapu: o gēzilaga kwa nkpi ahu n'ọzara.
Leviticus16:23 Eron gābata kwa n'ulo-ikwū nzute
Leviticus16:24 ọ gēwere kwa miri sa anu-aru-ya n'ebe di nsọ
Leviticus16:25 Abuba àjà-nmehie ahu
Leviticus16:26 Onye nēzilaga nkpi ka ọ buru ewu-ọpupu gāsu uwe-ya nile
Leviticus16:27 Oke-ehi àjà-nmehie ahu kwa
Leviticus16:28 Onye nēsure ha ọku gāsu uwe-ya nile
Leviticus16:29 Ọ gābu-kwa-ra unu ukpuru ebighi-ebi: n'ọnwa nke-asa
Leviticus16:30 n'ihi na n'ubọchi a ka agēkpuchiri unu nmehie-unu
Leviticus16:31 Ubọchi-izu-ike nke idebe-ubọchi-izu-ike ka ọ buru unu
Leviticus16:32 Onye-nchu-àjà ahu
Leviticus16:33 o gēkpuchi kwa nmehie nke ebe nsọ a di nsọ
Leviticus16:34 Nka gābu-kwa-ra unu ukpuru ebighi-ebi
Leviticus17:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus17:2 Gwa Eron
Leviticus17:3 Nwoke ọ bula nke ulo Israel
Leviticus17:4 ma ọ wetaghi ya n'ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute
Leviticus17:5 ka umu Israel we weta àjà nile ha
Leviticus17:6 Onye-nchu-àjà gāwusa ọbara-ha n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke Jehova n'ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute
Leviticus17:7 Ha agaghi-achu-kwa-ra nkpi àjà-ha ọzọ
Leviticus17:8 I gāsi kwa ha
Leviticus17:9 ma ọ wetaghi ya n'ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute imere ya Jehova
Leviticus17:10 Ọzọ
Leviticus17:11 N'ihi na ndu nke anu-aru
Leviticus17:12 N'ihi nka ka M'siri umu Israel
Leviticus17:13 Ọzọ nwoke ọ bula nke sitere n'umu Israel
Leviticus17:14 N'ihi na ọ bu ndu nke anu-aru ọ bula; ọbara-ya
Leviticus17:15 Madu ọ bula nke nēri ihe nwuru onye-ya
Leviticus17:16 Ma ọ buru na ọ sughi ha
Leviticus18:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus18:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus18:3 Unu emela dika omume ala Ijipt
Leviticus18:4 Ikpém nile ka unu gēme
Leviticus18:5 Unu gēdebe kwa ukpurum nile na ikpém nile: nke madu gēme
Leviticus18:6 Nwoke ọ bula abiarula nso onye-aru-ya ọ bula
Leviticus18:7 Ekpughela ọtọ nna-gi
Leviticus18:8 Ekpughela ọtọ nwunye nna-gi: ọtọ nna-gi ka ọ bu.
Leviticus18:9 Ọtọ nwa-nne-gi nwayi
Leviticus18:10 Ọtọ nwa-nwayi nke nwa-gi nwoke
Leviticus18:11 Ọtọ nwa-nwayi nke nwunye nna-gi
Leviticus18:12 Ekpughela ọtọ nwa-nne-nwan yi nke nna-gi: onye-aru nna-gi ka ọ bu.
Leviticus18:13 Ekpughela ọtọ nwa-nne-nwan yi nke nne-gi: n'ihi na onye-aru nne-gi ka ọ bu.
Leviticus18:14 Ekpughela ọtọ nwa-nne-nwoke nke nna-gi
Leviticus18:15 Ekpughela ọtọ nwunye nwa-gi: nwunye nwa-gi ka ọ bu; ekpughela ọtọ-ya.
Leviticus18:16 Ekpughela ọtọ nwunye nwa-nne-gi: ọtọ nwa-nne-gi ka ọ bu.
Leviticus18:17 Ekpughela ọtọ nwanyi na nwa ya nwanyi; ekurula nwa-nwanyi nke nwa-ya nwoke
Leviticus18:18 Ekuru-kwa-la nwayi tiyere nwa-nne-ya nwayi
Leviticus18:19 Abiarula nso nwayi ikpughe ọtọ-ya n'idi-na-nsọ nke ọrurú-ya.
Leviticus18:20 Gi na nwunye madu-ibe-gi edinala ka i ra aru n'aru-ya
Leviticus18:21 Enye-kwa-la onye ọ bula nime nkpuru-gi ime ka ha gabiga rue Molek
Leviticus18:22 Gi na nwoke edinala dika nwoke na nwayi nēdina ihe-árú ka ọ bu.
Leviticus18:23 Gi na anumanu ọ bula edina-kwa-la ka i ra aru n'aru-ya
Leviticus18:24 Unu ewerela ihe ndia nile meru onwe-unu: n'ihi na ewere ihe ndia nile me ka mb͕a nile rua árú
Leviticus18:25 ala ahu ru-kwa-ra árú: M'nēwere kwa ajọ emume-ya leta ya
Leviticus18:26 Unu onwe-unu gēdebe kwa ukpurum nile na ikpém nile
Leviticus18:27 (n'ihi na ihe-áru ndia nile ka ndikom nke ala ahu meworo
Leviticus18:28 ka ala ahu we ghara ib͕ọputa unu mb͕e unu nēmeru ya
Leviticus18:29 N'ihi na onye ọ bula nke nēme ihe ọ bula nime ihe-árú ndia nile
Leviticus18:30 Unu gēdebe kwa ihe-ndebem
Leviticus19:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus19:2 Gwa nzukọ nile nke umu Israel okwu
Leviticus19:3 Unu gātu egwu
Leviticus19:4 Unu echela ihe-efu ọ bula iru
Leviticus19:5 Ma mb͕e unu gāchuru Jehova àjà nké àjà-udo
Leviticus19:6 N'ubọchi unu churu ya ka agēri ya
Leviticus19:7 Ma ọ buru na erie ya ma-ọli n'ubọchi nke-atọ
Leviticus19:8 ma onye nēri ya gēbu ajọ omume-ya
Leviticus19:9 Ma mb͕e unu nēwe ihe-ubi nke ala-unu
Leviticus19:10 Atutukọ-kwa-la nkpuru ubi-vine-gi fọduru
Leviticus19:11 Unu ezula ori; unu aghọ-kwa-la aghughọ
Leviticus19:12 Unu ewe-kwa-la aham ṅu iyi n'okwu-ugha
Leviticus19:13 Emeb͕ula madu-ibe-gi
Leviticus19:14 Akọchala onye nti chiri
Leviticus19:15 Unu emela ajọ omume n'ikpé: ahụla onye nēnweghi ike ikpemara iru ọma
Leviticus19:16 Ejegharila n'etiti umu-nna-gi dika onye nāb͕a àmà ọjọ: eguzola imegide ọbara madu-ibe-gi: Mu onwem bu Jehova.
Leviticus19:17 Akpọla nwa-nne-gi asi n'obi-gi: i ghaghi ibara madu-ibe-gi nba
Leviticus19:18 Abọla ọ́bọ̀
Leviticus19:19 Unu gēdebe ukpurum nile. Emela ka anu-ulo-gi di iche iche nāb͕a onwe-ha: aghala uzọ nkpuru abua n'ubi-gi: uwe nke eji uzọ ihe abua kpakọta agaghi-abia n'aru-gi.
Leviticus19:20 Ma mb͕e nwoke soro nwayi dina ka ọ ra aru n'aru-ya
Leviticus19:21 O gēweta-kwa-ra Jehova àjà-ikpe-ọmuma-ya
Leviticus19:22 Onye-nchu-àjà gēwere kwa ebulu àjà-ikpe-ọmuma ahu kpuchiri ya nmehie-ya n'iru Jehova bayere nmehie-ya nke o mehieworo: agāb͕aghara kwa ya nmehie-ya nke o mehieworo.
Leviticus19:23 Ma mb͕e unu gābà n'ala ahu
Leviticus19:24 Ma n'arọ nke-anọ nkpuru-ya nile gādi nsọ
Leviticus19:25 Ma n'arọ nke-ise unu gēri nkpuru-ya
Leviticus19:26 Unu erila ihe ọ bula ya na ọbara-ya: unu ab͕ala afa
Leviticus19:27 Unu akọpula usọ isi-unu buruburu
Leviticus19:28 Unu eb͕ula eb͕ub͕u n'anu-aru-unu n'ihi nkpuru-obi madu
Leviticus19:29 Emela ka nwa-gi nwayi ghara idi nsọ
Leviticus19:30 Unu gēdebe ubọchi-izu-ikem nile
Leviticus19:31 Unu echela ndi nāju mọ ihe iru
Leviticus19:32 I gēbili ọtọ n'iru onye-isi-awọ
Leviticus19:33 Mb͕e ọbìa gānoyere gi dika ọbìa n'ala-unu
Leviticus19:34 Dika onye amuru n'ala site n'aru unu ka ọbìa gādiri unu
Leviticus19:35 Unu emela ajọ omume-n'ikpé
Leviticus19:36 Ihe-osìsì ziri ezi
Leviticus19:37 Unu gēdebe kwa ukpurum nile na ikpém nile
Leviticus20:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus20:2 I gāsi kwa umu Israel
Leviticus20:3 Mu onwem gēche kwa irum megide nwoke ahu
Leviticus20:4 Ma ọ buru na ndi ala-unu ezopu anya-ha n'aru nwoke ahu ma-ọli
Leviticus20:5 Mu onwem gēdo kwa irum megide nwoke ahu
Leviticus20:6 Madu ahu kwa nke nēche ndi nāju mọ ihe iru
Leviticus20:7 Unu gēdo kwa onwe-unu nsọ we di nsọ; n'ihi na Mu onwem bu Jehova
Leviticus20:8 Unu gēdebe ukpurum nile
Leviticus20:9 N'ihi na onye ọ bula nke nākọcha nna-ya ma-ọbu nne-ya

Leviticus20:17 Nwoke ọ bula nke nēkuru nwa-nne-ya nwayi
Leviticus20:18 Nwoke ọ bula nke ya na nwayi nke nāsọ uba nēdina
Leviticus20:19 Ekpughela ọtọ nwa-nne-nwayi nke nne-gi
Leviticus20:20 Nwoke ọ bula nke ya na nwunye nwa-nne nke nna-ya nēdina

Leviticus20:26 Unu gābu-kwa-ram ndi nsọ: n'ihi na nsọ ka Mu onwem
Leviticus20:27 Ma nwoke ma-ọbu nwayi
Leviticus21:1 Jehova we si Moses
Leviticus21:2 ma-ọbughi nání n'ihi onye-aru-ya
Leviticus21:3 na n'ihi nwa-nne-ya nwayi
Leviticus21:4 Ọ gaghi-emeru onwe-ya
Leviticus21:5 Ha agaghi-eme onwe-ha isi-nkwọcha n'isi-ha
Leviticus21:6 Ndi nsọ ka ha gāburu Chineke-ha
Leviticus21:7 Ha agaghi-aluru nwayi nākwa iko na nwunye
Leviticus21:8 I gēdo kwa ya nsọ; n'ihi na nri Chineke-gi ka ya onwe-ya nēweta nso: nsọ ka ọ gādi n'ebe i nọ: n'ihi na nsọ ka Mu onwem
Leviticus21:9 Nwa-nwayi nke onye-nchu-aja ọ bula kwa
Leviticus21:10 Ma onye-nchu-àjà n'etiti umu-nna-ya
Leviticus21:11 ọ gaghi-abakuru kwa madu nwuru anwu
Leviticus21:12 ọ gaghi-esi kwa n'ebe nsọm pua
Leviticus21:13 Ya onwe-ya gāluru nwunye mb͕e ọ di na nwa-ab͕ọghọ nāmaghi nwoke.
Leviticus21:14 Nwayi-di-ya nwuru
Leviticus21:15 Ọ gaghi-eme kwa ka nkpuru-ya ghara idi nsọ n'etiti umu-nna-ya: n'ihi na Mu onwem bu Jehova nēdo ya nsọ.
Leviticus21:16 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus21:17 Gwa Eron okwu
Leviticus21:18 N'ihi na nwoke ọ bula nke ọlu di n'aru ya
Leviticus21:19 ma-ọbu nwoke nke ukwu kpajiri
Leviticus21:20 ma-ọbu onye-nkpunkpu-azu
Leviticus21:21 ọ dighi nwoke ọ bula nke nkpuru Eron onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus21:22 Nri Chineke-ya
Leviticus21:23 Nání na ọ gaghabà rue ákwà-nb͕ochim
Leviticus21:24 Moses we gwa Eron
Leviticus22:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus22:2 Gwa Eron na umu-ya ndikom okwu
Leviticus22:3 Si ha

Leviticus22:5 ma-ọbu nwoke nke nēmetu ihe ọ bula nēnuputa enuputa aru
Leviticus22:6 madu nke nēmetu ya aru gāru árú rue anyasi
Leviticus22:7 Ma mb͕e anyanwu daworo
Leviticus22:8 Ihe nwuru onwe-ya
Leviticus22:9 Ha gēdebe kwa ihe-ndebem
Leviticus22:10 Ọ dighi onye ala ọzọ ọ bula gēri ihe nsọ ahu: onye nānọdu n'ulo onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus22:11 Ma mb͕e onye-nchu-àjà gāb͕ata madu
Leviticus22:12 Ma nwa-nwanyi onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus22:13 Ma nwa-nwanyi onye-nchu-àjà
Leviticus22:14 Ma mb͕e onye ọ bula gēri ihe nsọ n'amaghi-ama
Leviticus22:15 Ha agaghi-eme kwa ka ihe nsọ nke umu Israel ghara idi nsọ
Leviticus22:16 ha we ghara ime ka ha nēbu ajọ omume nke ikpe-ọmuma
Leviticus22:17 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus22:18 Gwa Eron
Leviticus22:19 unu gēweta nso oké nke zuru okè n'etiti ìgwè ehi
Leviticus22:20 Ihe ọ bula nke ọlu di n'aru ya
Leviticus22:21 Ọzọ mb͕e onye ọ bula nēweta nso Jehova ihe àjà nke àjà-udo imezu nkwa
Leviticus22:22 Ihe kpuru ìsì
Leviticus22:23 Oke-ehi ma-ọbu nwa-aturu nke nwere n'aru-ya ihe ibe-ya nēnweghi
Leviticus22:24 Ihe nke nkpuru-amu-ya chipiara echipia
Leviticus22:25 Unu esite-kwa-la n'aka onye ala ọzọ weta nso nri Chineke-unu site n'ihe ndia nile; n'ihi na nbibi-ha di nime ha
Leviticus22:26 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus22:27 Oke-ehi
Leviticus22:28 Ehi ma-ọbu aturu
Leviticus22:29 Ma mb͕e unu gāchuru Jehova àjà-ekele
Leviticus22:30 N'otù ubọchi ahu ka agēri ya; unu emela ka ihe fọdu nime ya rue ututu: Mu onwem bu Jehova.
Leviticus22:31 Unu gēdebe kwa ihe nile M'nyere n'iwu

Leviticus23:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus23:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus23:3 Ubọchi isi ka agēje ozi: ma n'ubọchi nke-asa
Leviticus23:4 Ndia bu mb͕e akara àkà nke Jehova
Leviticus23:5 N'ọnwa mbu
Leviticus23:6 N'ubọchi nke-iri-na-ise nke ọnwa ahu ka ememe achicha ekoghi-eko gādi-kwa-ra Jehova: ubọchi asa ka unu gēri achicha ekoghi-eko.
Leviticus23:7 N'ubọchi mbu unu gēnwe nkpọkọta nsọ: ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje.
Leviticus23:8 Ma unu gēweta nso àjà-ọku anāchuru Jehova ubọchi asa: n'ubọchi nke-asa nkpọkọta nsọ gādi; ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje.
Leviticus23:9 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus23:10 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus23:11 ọ gēfé kwa ùkwù ahu n'iru Jehova
Leviticus23:12 N'ubọchi unu nēfé ùkwù ahu
Leviticus23:13 Onyinye-inata-iru-ọma-ya gābu uzọ abua n'uzọ iri nke ephah utu ọka flour agwara manu
Leviticus23:14 Unu eri-kwa-la achicha
Leviticus23:15 Unu gāgu-kwa-ra onwe-unu site n'echi nke ubọchi-izu-ike ahu
Leviticus23:16 rue echi nke ubọchi-izu-ike nke-asa ka unu gāgu ọgu ubọchi abua na iri
Leviticus23:17 Unu gēsite n'ebe-obibi-unu weta ob͕e achicha abua nke àjà-ofufé
Leviticus23:18 Unu gēweta kwa nso umu-aturu asa ndi zuru okè nke b͕ara otù arọ
Leviticus23:19 Unu gēme kwa otù nkpi ka ọ buru àjà-nmehie
Leviticus23:20 Onye-nchu-àjà gēfé kwa ha tiyere achicha nke nkpuru mbu ka ha buru àjà-ofufé n'iru Jehova tiyere umu-aturu abua ahu: nsọ ka ha gādiri Jehova n'ebe onye-nchu-àjà nọ.
Leviticus23:21 Unu gākpọsa kwa òkù n'otù ubọchi ahu; nkpọkọta nsọ gādiri unu: ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje: ukpuru ebighi-ebi ka ọ bu n'ebe-obibi-unu nile rue ọbọ-unu nile.
Leviticus23:22 Mb͕e unu nēwe ihe-ubi nke ala-unu ewesila ihe di n'akuku ubi-gi mb͕e i nēwe ihe-ubi-gi
Leviticus23:23 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus23:24 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus23:25 Ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje: unu gēweta kwa nso àjà-ọku ichuru Jehova.
Leviticus23:26 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus23:27 Otú ọ di
Leviticus23:28 Ọ dighi kwa ozi ọ bula unu gēje n'otu ubọchi ahu: n'ihi na ubọchi nkpuchi-nmehie ka ọ bu
Leviticus23:29 N'ihi na madu ọ bula nke anewedaghi n'ala n'otù ubọchi ahu
Leviticus23:30 Ma madu ọ bula nke nēje ozi ọ bula n'otù ubọchi ahu
Leviticus23:31 Ọ dighi ozi ọ bula unu gēje: ọ bu ukpuru ebighi-ebi rue ọb͕ọ-unu nile n'ebe-obibi-unu nile.
Leviticus23:32 Ubọchi-izu-ike nke idebe-ubọchi-izu-ike ka ọ gāburu unu
Leviticus23:33 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus23:34 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus23:35 N'ubọchi mbu nkpọkọta nsọ gādi: ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje.
Leviticus23:36 Ubọchi asa unu gēweta nso àjà-ọku ichuru Jehova: n'ubọchi nke-asatọ nkpọkọta nsọ gādiri unu; unu gēweta kwa nso àjà-ọku ichuru Jehova: ubọchi nb͕ochi ka ọ bu; ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje.
Leviticus23:37 Ndia bu mb͕e akara àkà nke Jehova
Leviticus23:38 nāgughi ubọchi-izu-ike nile nke Jehova
Leviticus23:39 Otú ọ di
Leviticus23:40 Unu gāchiri kwa n'onwe-unu n'ubọchi mbu nkpuru nke osisi ọma
Leviticus23:41 Unu gēme kwa ya dika ememe emere Jehova ubọchi asa n'arọ: ọ bu ukpuru ebighi-ebi rue ọb͕ọ-unu nile: n'ọnwa nke-asa ka unu gēme ya.
Leviticus23:42 N'ulo-ntu ka unu gēbi ubọchi asa; ndi nile amuru n'ala n'Israel gēbi n'ulo-ntu:
Leviticus23:43 ka ọb͕ọ-unu nile we mara na ọ bu n'ulo-ntu ka M'mere umu Israel ka ha biri
Leviticus23:44 Moses we gwa umu Israel mb͕e nile akara àkà nke Jehova.
Leviticus24:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus24:2 Nye umu Israel iwu
Leviticus24:3 N'èzí ákwà-nb͕ochi nke ihe-àmà
Leviticus24:4 N'elu ihe-idọba-oriọna nke ọla-edo anāgwaghi agwa ka ọ gēdo oriọna nile n'usoro n'iru Jehova mb͕e dum.
Leviticus24:5 Ọzọ
Leviticus24:6 I gēdo kwa ha n'usoro abua
Leviticus24:7 I gētiye kwa frankincense anāgwaghi agwa n'elu usoro ọ bula
Leviticus24:8 Kwa-ubọchi-izu-ike o gēdo ya n'usoro n'iru Jehova mb͕e dum; o sitere n'umu Israel
Leviticus24:9 Ọ gādiri Eron na umu-ya ndikom; ha gēri ya n'ebe di nsọ n'ihi na ihe nsọ kachasi ihe nsọ nile ka ọ buru ya sitere n'àjà-ọku nile nke Jehova

Leviticus24:11 nwa-nwoke nke nwayi Israel ahu we kpọlu Aha ahu

Leviticus24:13 Jehova we gwa Moses
Leviticus24:14 Me onye ahu nākọcha akọcha ka ọ pua je n'azu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū; ndi nile nke nuru olu-ya gēbikwasi aka-ha n'isi-ya
Leviticus24:15 I gāgwa kwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus24:16 Onye nākpọlu kwa aha Jehova
Leviticus24:17 Onye ọ bula mb͕e ọ gētipu ndu madu
