Leviticus25:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu n'ugwu Sainai
Leviticus25:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus25:3 Arọ isi ka i gāgha nkpuru n'ubi-gi
Leviticus25:4 ma n'arọ nke-asa ubọchi-izu-ike nke idebe-ubọchi-izu-ike gādiri ala ahu
Leviticus25:5 Ewela ihe-ubi-gi nke nēpu n'onwe-ya
Leviticus25:6 Ubọchi-izu-ike nke ala ahu gābu-kwa-ra unu ihe-oriri; ọ gāburu gi
Leviticus25:7 anu-ulo-gi
Leviticus25:8 I gāgu-kwa-ra onwe-gi ubọchi-izu-ike asa
Leviticus25:9 I gēme kwa ka opì-ike nke nādasi uda ike gābiga rue ebe nile n'ọnwa nke-asa
Leviticus25:10 Unu gēdo kwa arọ nke-ọgu-abua-na-iri ahu nsọ
Leviticus25:11 Jubile ka arọ nke-ọgu-abua-na-iri ahu gāburu unu: unu aghala nkpuru
Leviticus25:12 N'ihi na jubile ka ọ bu; nsọ ka ọ gādiri unu: unu gēsite n'ubi rie ihe-ọmume-ya.
Leviticus25:13 N'arọ jubile a ka unu gālaghachi
Leviticus25:14 Mb͕e i gērenye madu-ibe-gi ihe-orire
Leviticus25:15 dika ọnu-ọgugu arọ si di site n'arọ jubile
Leviticus25:16 Dika iba-uba nke arọ si di ka i gēme ka ọnu-ahia-ya ba uba
Leviticus25:17 Unu emerita-kwa-la onwe-unu ihe-ike; ma i gātu egwu Chineke-gi: n'ihi na Mu onwem bu Jehova
Leviticus25:18 Unu gēme kwa ukpurum nile
Leviticus25:19 Ala ahu gāmi nkpuru-ya
Leviticus25:20 Ma mb͕e unu gāsi
Leviticus25:21 M'gēnye kwa ngọzim iwu idakwasi unu n'arọ nke-isi
Leviticus25:22 Unu gāgha kwa nkpuru n'arọ nke-asatọ
Leviticus25:23 Agaghi-ere ala ahu rue mb͕e ọ gādiru n'ihi na Mu nwe ala ahu: n'ihi na ndi-ọbìa na ndi-nnọdu ka unu bu n'alam.
Leviticus25:24 N'ala nile nke ihe-onwunwe-unu unu gēnye kwa ihe-nb͕aputa bayere ala ahu.
Leviticus25:25 Mb͕e nwa-nne-gi gāda ob͕eye
Leviticus25:26 Onye ọ bula
Leviticus25:27 ya gu kwa arọ nile nke orire-ya
Leviticus25:28 Ma mb͕e aka-ya achọtaghi ihe gēzu inweghachi ya n'onwe-ya
Leviticus25:29 Ọzọ
Leviticus25:30 Ma ọ buru na ab͕aputaghi ya rue mb͕e ọ nwezuru arọ zuru okè
Leviticus25:31 Ma ulo nile nke obodo ntà nēnweghi mb͕idi buruburu
Leviticus25:32 Ma obodo nile nke ndi Livai
Leviticus25:33 Ma asi na ọnye ọ bula nime ndi Livai ab͕aputa ihe
Leviticus25:34 Ma agaghi-ere ọhia nke ebe-ita-nri nke obodo-ha; n'ihi na ihe-onwunwe ebighi-ebi ka ọ buru ha.
Leviticus25:35 Ọzọ
Leviticus25:36 Anarala ya uma ma-ọbu ọmuru-nwa; ma tua egwu Chineke-gi: ka nwa-nne-gi we biyere gi.
Leviticus25:37 Enyela ya ego-gi n'uma
Leviticus25:38 Mu onwem bu Jehova
Leviticus25:39 Ọzọ
Leviticus25:40 dika onye egoro ọlu
Leviticus25:41 o gēsi kwa n'aka-gi pua
Leviticus25:42 N'ihi na ndi-orùm ka ha bu
Leviticus25:43 Ewela nkpab͕u zọda ya; ma tua egwu Chineke-gi.
Leviticus25:44 Ma orù-gi ndikom na orù-gi ndinyom
Leviticus25:45 Ọzọ kwa
Leviticus25:46 Unu gēme ha ka ha buru ihe-nketa umu-unu ndi gānochi unu gēnwe
Leviticus25:47 Ọzọ
Leviticus25:48 mb͕e eresiri ya
Leviticus25:49 ma-ọbu nwa-nne nna-ya
Leviticus25:50 Ya na onye b͕aworo ya gāgu kwa site n'aro ọ were onwe-ya renye ya rue arọ jubile: ego orire-ya gādi kwa ka ọnu-ọgugu arọ; dika ubọchi nile nke onye egoro ọlu ka ọ gānọ n'aka-ya.
Leviticus25:51 Ọ buru na ọtutu arọ fọduru
Leviticus25:52 Ma ọ buru na ole-na-ole fọduru n'arọ rue arọ jubile
Leviticus25:53 Dika onye egoro ọlu kwa-arọ ka ọ gānọ n'aka-ya
Leviticus25:54 Ma ọ buru na ab͕aputaghi ya n'arọ ndia
Leviticus25:55 N'ihi na Mu ka umu Israel buru ndi-orù; ndi-orùm ka ha bu ndi M'mere ka ha si n'ala Ijipt puta: Mu onwem bu Jehova
Leviticus26:1 Unu emerela onwe-unu ihe-efu ọ bula
Leviticus26:2 Unu gēdebe ubọchi-izu-ikem nile
Leviticus26:3 Ọ buru na unu ejeghari n'ukpurum nile
Leviticus26:4 M'gēnye kwa miri-ozuzo-unu na mb͕e-ha
Leviticus26:5 Nzọcha-ọka-unu gēru ọghughọ-nkpuru-vine
Leviticus26:6 M'gēnye udo n'ala
Leviticus26:7 Unu gāchu ndi-iro-unu
Leviticus26:8 Madu ise n'etiti unu gāchu ọgu madu ise
Leviticus26:9 M'gēche unu iru
Leviticus26:10 Unu gēri ihe ochie nke anēdebe site na mb͕e ochie
Leviticus26:11 M'gētiye ebe-obibim n'etiti unu: nkpuru-obim agaghi-asọ kwa unu oyi.
Leviticus26:12 M'ganējeghari n'etiti unu
Leviticus26:13 Mu onwem bu Jehova
Leviticus26:14 Ma ọ buru na unu egeghm nti
Leviticus26:15 ọ buru kwa na unu aju ukpurum nile
Leviticus26:16 Mu onwem gēme kwa unu nka; M'gēme obi-ọlulọ-miri ka ọ buru onye-nlekọta-unu
Leviticus26:17 M'gēche irum imegide unu
Leviticus26:18 Ma ọ buru na unu agaghi-egem nti rue ihe ndia
Leviticus26:19 M'egetiji nweli-elu nke ike-unu; M'gēme kwa elu-igwe-unu ka ọ di ka ígwè
Leviticus26:20 ike-unu gāgwu kwa n'efu: ala-unu agaghi-ami kwa ihe-ọmume-ya
Leviticus26:21 Ma ọ buru na unu ejeghari n'imegidem
Leviticus26:22 M'gēzite anu-ohia n'etiti unu
Leviticus26:23 Ma ọ buru na adọghi unu aka na nti n'ebe M'nọ site n'ihe ndia
Leviticus26:24 Mu onwem gējeghari kwa n'imegide unu; M'gēti kwa unu ihe ub͕ò asa
Leviticus26:25 M'gēme kwa ka mma-agha biakwasi unu
Leviticus26:26 Mb͕e M'gākpajiri unu nkpa-n'aka-unu
Leviticus26:27 Ma ọ buru na unu agaghi-egem nti n'ihe a
Leviticus26:28 M'gējeghari kwa n'imegide unu n'ọnuma; M'gādọ kwa unu aka na nti ub͕ò asa
Leviticus26:29 Unu gēri anu-aru umu-unu ndikom
Leviticus26:30 M'gēme ka ebe di elu nke unu tọb͕ọrọ n'efu
Leviticus26:31 M'gēme obodo nile unu nkpọnkpọ ebe
Leviticus26:32 Mu onwem gēme kwa ala-unu ka ọ tọb͕ọrọ n'efu: ibobo ya gānwu kwa ndi-iro-unu n'aru
Leviticus26:33 Unu ka M'gēfesa kwa n'etiti mba nile
Leviticus26:34 Mb͕e ahu ka ubọchi-izu-ike-ya nile gātọ ala ahu utọ ubọchi nile nke itọb͕ọ-n'efu ahu
Leviticus26:35 Ubọchi nile nke itọb͕ọ-n'efu ahu ka ọ gākwusi n'ọlu: nke ọ nākwusighi n'ubọchi-izu-ike-unu
Leviticus26:36 Ma ndi nāfọdu n'etiti unu
Leviticus26:37 Ha gāsurita ngọngọ
Leviticus26:38 Unu gāla kwa n'iyì n'etiti mba nile ọzọ
Leviticus26:39 Ndi nāfọdu n'etiti unu gāta aru n'ajọ omume-ha n'ala nile nke ndi-iro-unu; ọzọ kwa
Leviticus26:40 Ha gēkwuputa ajọ omume-ha
Leviticus26:41 Mu onwem we nējeghari kwa n'imegide ha
Leviticus26:42 M'gēcheta kwa ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Mu na Jekob b͕ara; ọzọ kwa
Leviticus26:43 Ha gārapu kwa ala ahu
Leviticus26:44 Ma ọbuna n'ihe a kwa
Leviticus26:45 M'gēcheta kwa n'ihi ha ọb͕ub͕a-ndu nke ndi-mbu-ha
Leviticus26:46 Ndia bu ukpuru na ikpé na iwu
Leviticus27:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Leviticus27:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Leviticus27:3 Ọgugu ọnu gi gābu kwa nke nwoke site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ we rue onye b͕ara ọgu aro atọ
Leviticus27:4 Ma ọ buru na nwayi ka ọ bu
Leviticus27:5 Ma ọ buru na ọ bu site n'onye b͕ara arọ ise we rue onye b͕ara orú arọ
Leviticus27:6 Ma ọ buru na ọ bu site n'onye ruru otù ọnwa we rue onye b͕ara arọ ise
Leviticus27:7 Ma ọ buru na ọ bu site n'onye b͕ara ọgu arọ atọ we gaba n'iru; ọ buru na ọ bu nwoke
Leviticus27:8 Ma ọ buru na onye dara ob͕eye ka ọ bu kari ọ̀rùrù-ọnu-gi
Leviticus27:9 Ma ọ buru na ọ bu anu-ulo
Leviticus27:10 Ọ gaghāb͕anwe ya
Leviticus27:11 Ma ọ buru na ọ bu anu-ulo ọ bula ruru árú
Leviticus27:12 onye-nchu-àjà gārù kwa ya ọnu
Leviticus27:13 Ma ọ buru na ọ gāb͕aputa ya n'ezie
Leviticus27:14 Ọzọ
Leviticus27:15 Ọ buru kwa na onye ahu nke nēdo ya nsọ ab͕aputa ulo-ya
Leviticus27:16 Ma ọ buru na onye ọ bula ewere ufọdu nime ala-ubi nke ihe-onwunwe-ya doro Jehova nsọ
Leviticus27:17 Ọ buru na o sitere n'arọ jubile do ala-ubi-ya nsọ
Leviticus27:18 Ma ọ buru na o do ala-ubi-ya nsọ mb͕e jubile gasiri
Leviticus27:19 Ma ọ buru na onye ahu nke nēdo ala-ubi nsọ ab͕aputa ya n'ezie
Leviticus27:20 Ma ọ buru na ọ b͕aputaghi ala-ubi ahu
Leviticus27:21 ma ala-ubi ahu
Leviticus27:22 Ma ọ buru na o doro Jehova ala-ubi ọ zuworo nsọ
Leviticus27:23 onye-nchu-àjà gāgu-kwa-ra ya ọgugu nke ọ̀rùrù-ọnu-gi rue arọ jubile: ọ gēnye kwa ọ̀rùrù-ọnu-gi n'ubọchi ahu
Leviticus27:24 N'arọ jubile ala-ubi ahu gālaghachiri onye azutara ya n'aka-ya
Leviticus27:25 Ọ̀rùrù-ọnu-gi nile gādi kwa ka shekel nke ebe nsọ si di: orú gerah gābu shekel ahu.
Leviticus27:26 Nání nwa eburu uzọ mu n'etiti anu-ulo
Leviticus27:27 Ma ọ buru na ọ di n'etiti anu-ulo ruru árú
Leviticus27:28 Nání
Leviticus27:29 Ọ dighi onye ọ bula agāb͕aputa
Leviticus27:30 Otù uzọ n'uzọ iri ihe nile nke ala
Leviticus27:31 Ma ọ buru na onye ọ bula ab͕aputa ihe nime otù uzọ n'uzọ iri ihe-ya ma-ọli
Leviticus27:32 Otù uzọ kwa n'uzọ iri nke ìgwè ehi na ìgwè ewu na aturu nile
Leviticus27:33 Ọ gaghi-etucha n'etiti ezi anumanu na anumanu ọjọ ọ gaghi-enwo kwa ya: ma ọ buru na o nwo ya ma-ọli
Leviticus27:34 Ndia bu ihe enyere n'iwu
Numbers1:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu n'ọzara Sainai
Numbers1:2 Gutanu ọnu-ọgugu nzukọ nile nke umu Israel
Numbers1:3 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ we gaba n'iru
Numbers1:4 Madu ganọye-kwa-ra unu
Numbers1:5 Ndia bu kwa aha ndikom unu na ha gēguzo: nke Reuben; Elizua nwa Shedeua.
Numbers1:6 Nke Simeon; Shelumiel nwa Zurishadai.
Numbers1:7 Nke Juda
Numbers1:8 Nke Isaka; Netanel nwa Zua.
Numbers1:9 Nke Zebulun; Eliab nwa Hilon.
Numbers1:10 Nke umu Josef: nke Efraim; Elishama nwa Amihud: nke Manase; Gameliel nwa Pedahzua.
Numbers1:11 Nke Benjamin; Abidan nwa Gideoni.
Numbers1:12 Nke Dan; Ahieza nwa Amishadai.
Numbers1:13 Nke Asha; Pagiel nwa Ọkran.
Numbers1:14 Nke Gad; Eliasaf nwa Deuel.
Numbers1:15 Nke Naftali; Ahira nwa Inan.
Numbers1:16 Ndia bu ndi akpọrọ nke nzukọ Israel
Numbers1:17 Moses na Eron we chiri ndikom ndia nke akpọrọ n'aha n'aha:
Numbers1:18 ọ bu kwa nzukọ Israel nile ka ha kpọkọtara n'ubọchi mbu nke ọnwa nke-abua
Numbers1:19 Dika Jehova nyere Moses iwu
Numbers1:20 Ma umu Reuben
Numbers1:21 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:22 Nke umu Simeon
Numbers1:23 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:24 Nke umu Gad
Numbers1:25 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:26 Nke umu Juda
Numbers1:27 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:28 Nke umu Isaka
Numbers1:29 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:30 Nke umu Zebulun
Numbers1:31 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:32 Nke umu Josef
Numbers1:33 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:34 Nke umu Manase
Numbers1:35 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:36 Nke umu Benjamin
Numbers1:37 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:38 Nke umu Dan
Numbers1:39 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:40 Nke umu Asha
Numbers1:41 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:42 Nke umu Naftali
Numbers1:43 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:44 Ndia bu ndi agukọtara agukọta
Numbers1:45 Ndi nile nke umu Israel agukọtara agukọta we di
Numbers1:46 ọbuná ndi nile agukọtara agukọta we di orú nnù ọgu uzọ atọ na uzọ iri-na-ise
Numbers1:47 Ma ndi Livai
Numbers1:48 N'ihi na Jehova gwara Moses okwu
Numbers1:49 Nání
Numbers1:50 ma gi onwe-gi me ndi Livai ka ha buru ndi nēlekọta ebe-obibi ihe-àmà
Numbers1:51 Ma na nbuli-ije nke ebe-obibi ahu
Numbers1:52 Umu Israel gāma kwa ulo-ikwū-ha
Numbers1:53 Ma ndi Livai gāma ulo-ikwū-ha buruburu ebe-obibi ihe-àmà ahu
Numbers1:54 Umu Israel we me otú a; dika ihe nile nke Jehova nyere Moses n'iwu si di
Numbers2:1 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu
Numbers2:2 Umu Israel gāma ulo-ikwū-ha
Numbers2:3 Ndi nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'akuku. Iru-anyanwu chere iru n'ọwuwa-anyanwu bu ndi nke ọkọlọtọ ọmuma-ulo-i kwū Juda
Numbers2:4 Usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:5 Ndi nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'akuku-ya bu ebo Isaka: onye-isi umu Isaka nwere bu Netanel nwa Zua:
Numbers2:6 usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:7 ebo Zebulun kwa: onye-isi umu Zebulun nwere bu Eliab nwa Hilon:
Numbers2:8 usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:9 Ndi nile agukọtara agukọta nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Juda di orú nnù orú uzọ na uzọ atọ
Numbers2:10 Ọkọlọtọ nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Reuben di n'akuku Ndida
Numbers2:11 Usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:12 Ndi nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'akuku-ya bu ebo Simeon: onye-isi umu Simeon nwere bu Shelumiel nwa Zurishadai:
Numbers2:13 usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:14 ebo Gad kwa: onye-isi umu Gad nwere bu Eliasaf nwa Reuel:
Numbers2:15 usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:16 Ndi nile agukọtara agukọta nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Reuben di orú nnù uzọ iri na asatọ
Numbers2:17 Ulo-ikwū nzute gēbuli kwa ije
Numbers2:18 Ọkọlọtọ nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Efraim
Numbers2:19 Usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:20 N'akuku-ya ka ebo Manase di: onye-isi umu Manase nwere bu Gameliel nwa Pedahzua:
Numbers2:21 Usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:22 ebo Benjamin kwa: onye-isi umu Benjamin nwere bu Abidan nwa Gideoni:
Numbers2:23 Usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:24 Ndi nile agukọtara agukọta nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Efraim di orú nnù uzọ iri-na-atọ
Numbers2:25 Ọkọlọtọ nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Dan di n'akuku Ugwu
Numbers2:26 Usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:27 Ndi nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'akuku-ya bu ebo Asha: onye-isi umu Asha nwere bu Pagiel nwa Ọkran:
Numbers2:28 usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:29 ebo Naftali kwa: onye-isi umu Naftali nwere bu Ahira nwa Inan:
Numbers2:30 usu-ndi-agha-ya
Numbers2:31 Ndi nile agukọtara agukọta nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Dan di orú nnù uzọ iri-na-iteghete
Numbers2:32 Ndia bu ndi agukọtara agukọta nke umu Israel
Numbers2:33 Ma agukọtaghi ndi Livai n'etiti umu Israel; dika Jehova nyere Moses iwu
Numbers2:34 Umu Israel we me otú a; dika ihe nile Jehova nyere Moses n'iwu si di
Numbers3:1 Ma ndia bu osuso-ọmumu nile nke Eron na Moses n'ubọchi Jehova gwara Moses okwu n'ugwu Sainai.
Numbers3:2 Ndia bu kwa aha umu-ndikom Eron;ọkpara-ya
Numbers3:3 Ndia bu aha nke umu-ndikom Eron
Numbers3:4 Nedab na Abaihu we nwua n'iru Jehova
Numbers3:5 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers3:6 Me ka ebo Livai biaru nso
Numbers3:7 Ha gēdebe kwa ihe-ndebe-ya na ihe-ndebe nke nzukọ Israel nile n'iru ulo-ikwū nzute
Numbers3:8 Ha gēdebe kwa ihe nile nke ulo-ikwū nzute
Numbers3:9 I gēwere kwa ndi Livai nye Eron
Numbers3:10 I gēwere kwa Eron na umu-ya ndikom ka ha buru ndi-nlekọta
Numbers3:11 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers3:12 Ma Mu onwem
Numbers3:13 n'ihi na Mu nwe nwa ọ bula eburu uzọ mu; n'ubọchi M'tib͕uru umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'ala Ijipt ka M'doro umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'Israel nsọ nye onwem
Numbers3:14 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu n'ọzara Sainai
Numbers3:15 Gukọta umu Livai
Numbers3:16 Moses we gukọta ha n'okwu-ọnu Jehova
Numbers3:17 Ndia bu kwa umu-ndikom Livai n'aha-ha; Giashon
Numbers3:18 Ndia bu kwa aha umu-ndikom Giashon dika ab͕uru nile ha si di; Libni na Shimai.
Numbers3:19 Umu-ndikom Kohat kwa dika ab͕uru nile ha si di; Amram
Numbers3:20 Umu-ndikom Merari kwa dika ab͕uru nile ha si di; Mahli na Mushi. Ndia bu ab͕uru ndi Livai
Numbers3:21 Nke Giashon bu ab͕uru ndi Libni
Numbers3:22 Ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers3:23 Ab͕uru abua nke ndi Giashon nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'azu ebe-obibi ahu chere iru n'Ọdida-anyanwu.
Numbers3:24 Onye-isi ulo nna ndi Giashon nwere bu Eliasaf nwa Lael.
Numbers3:25 Ihe-ndebe nke umu-ndikom Giashon n'ulo-ikwū nzute bu ebe-obibi na Ulo-ikwū
Numbers3:26 na ákwà-ngechi nile nke ogige ahu
Numbers3:27 Nke Kohat bu ab͕uru ndi Amram
Numbers3:28 N'ọnu-ọgugu ndikom nile
Numbers3:29 Ab͕uru nile nke umu Kohat nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'isi ebe-obibi ahu chere iru na Ndida.
Numbers3:30 Onye-isi ulo nna ab͕uru ndi Kohat nwere bu Elizafan nwa Uziel.
Numbers3:31 Ihe-ndebe-ha bu ib͕e ahu
Numbers3:32 Onye-isi nke ndi-isi nke ndi Livai bu Eleeza nwa Eron onye-nchu-àjà
Numbers3:33 Nke Merari bu ab͕uru ndi Mahli
Numbers3:34 Ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers3:35 Onye-isi ulo nna nke ab͕uru abua Merari nwere bu Zuriel nwa Abihail: ha nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'isi ebe-obibi ahu chere iru n'Ugwu.
Numbers3:36 Nlekọta nke ihe-ndebe nke umu Merari bu ibo nile nke ebe-obibi ahu
Numbers3:37 na ide nile nke ogige ahu buruburu
Numbers3:38 Ndi nāma ulo-ikwū-ha n'iru ebe obibi ahu chere iru n'Iru-anyanwu
Numbers3:39 Ndi nile agukọtara agukọta nke ndi Livai
Numbers3:40 Jehova we si Moses
Numbers3:41 I gēwe-kwa-ram ndi Livai (Mu onwem bu Jehova) n'ọnọdu umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'etiti umu Israel; na anu-ulo ndi Livai n'ọnọdu umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'etiti anu-ulo umu Israel.
Numbers3:42 Moses we gukọta umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'etiti umu Israel
Numbers3:43 Ndikom nile eburu uzọ mu
Numbers3:44 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers3:45 Were ndi Livai n'ọnọdu umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'etiti umu Israel
Numbers3:46 Ma ndi anāb͕aputa
Numbers3:47 n'aka-ha ka i gānara shekel ise shekel ise n'isi n'isi; dika shekel nke ebe nsọ ahu si di ka i gēwere ha (shekel bu orú gerah):
Numbers3:48 i gēnye kwa Eron
Numbers3:49 Moses we nara ego nb͕aputa ahu n'aka ndi fọduru n'ọnu-ọgugu ndi ahu ndi Livai b͕aputara:
Numbers3:50 n'aka umu eburu uzọ mu nke umu Israel ka ọ nara ego ahu; nnù shekel atọ na ọgu asatọ na ise
Numbers3:51 Moses we nye Eron
Numbers4:1 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu
Numbers4:2 Guta ọnu-ọgugu umu Kohat site n'etiti umu Livai
Numbers4:3 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri we gaba n'iru we rue onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri
Numbers4:4 Nka bu òfùfè umu Kohat n'ulo-ikwū nzute
Numbers4:5 na nbuli-ije nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Eron gābà kwa nime
Numbers4:6 tiye kwa ihe-nkpuchi akpukpọ seal n'elu ya
Numbers4:7 N'elu table nke irum ka ha gāb͕akwasi ákwà anunu
Numbers4:8 ha gāb͕akwasi kwa n'elu ha ákwà uhie
Numbers4:9 Ha gēwere kwa ákwà anunu
Numbers4:10 ha gētiye kwa ya na ihe-ya nile nime ihe-nkpuchi akpukpọ seal
Numbers4:11 Ọ bu kwa n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà ọla-edo ahu ka ha gāb͕akwasi ákwà anunu
Numbers4:12 ha gēwere kwa ihe nile nke ije-ozi ahu
Numbers4:13 Ha gēkpopu kwa ntu n'ebe-ichu-àjà
Numbers4:14 ha gētiye kwa n'elu ya ihe nile ya
Numbers4:15 Ma mb͕e Eron na umu-ya ndikom kpuchisiri ebe nsọ ahu
Numbers4:16 Ihe-nlekọta Eleeza nwa Eron onye-nchu-àjà bu manu nke ihe nēnye ìhè
Numbers4:17 Jehova we gwa Moses na Eron okwu
Numbers4:18 Unu ebipula ebo nke ab͕uru nile nke ndi Kohat n'etiti ndi Livai:
Numbers4:19 ma menu ha nka
Numbers4:20 ma ha agaghi-abata ihu ebe nsọ ahu ọbuná na obere oge
Numbers4:21 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers4:22 Guta kwa ọnu-ọgugu umu Giashon. ha onwe-ha
Numbers4:23 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri we gaba n'iru rue onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri ka i gāgukọta ha; onye ọ bula nke nābà ibu agha
Numbers4:24 Nka bu òfùfè nke ab͕uru nile nke ndi Giashon
Numbers4:25 ha gēbu kwa ákwà-nkwuba nile nke ebe-obibim
Numbers4:26 na ákwà-ngechi nile nke ogige ahu
Numbers4:27 N'okwu-ọnu Eron na umu-ya ndikom ka òfùfè nile nke umu ndi Giashon gādi
Numbers4:28 Nka bu òfùfè nke ab͕uru nile nke umu ndi Giashon n'ulo-ikwū nzute: ihe-ndebe-ha gādi n'aka Itama nwa Eron
Numbers4:29 Umu Merari
Numbers4:30 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri we gaba n'iru we rue onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri ka i gāgukọta ha
Numbers4:31 Nka bu kwa ihe-ndebe nke ibu-ha
Numbers4:32 na ide nile nke ogige ahu buruburu
Numbers4:33 Nka bu òfùfè nke ab͕uru nile nke umu Merari
Numbers4:34 Moses na Eron na ndi-isi nzukọ Israel we gukọta umu ndi Kohat dika ab͕uru nile ha si di
Numbers4:35 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri gaba n'iru we rue onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri
Numbers4:36 ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers4:37 Ndia bu ndi agukọtara agukọta nke ab͕uru nile nke ndi Kohat
Numbers4:38 Ndi agukọtara agukọta nke umu Giashon
Numbers4:39 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri we gaba n'iru we rue onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri
Numbers4:40 ọbuná ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers4:41 Ndia bu ndi agukọtara agukọta nke ab͕uru nile nke umu Giashon
Numbers4:42 Ndi agukọtara agukọta nke ab͕uru nile nke umu Merari
Numbers4:43 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri we gaba n'iru we rue onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri
Numbers4:44 ọbuná ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers4:45 Ndia bu ndi agukọtara agukọta nke ab͕uru nile umu Merari
Numbers4:46 Ndi nile agukọtara agukọta nke ndi Livai
Numbers4:47 site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri we gaba n'iru we rue onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri
Numbers4:48 ọbuná ndi-ha agukọtara agukọta
Numbers4:49 N'okwu-ọnu Jehova ka agukọtara ha n'aka Moses
Numbers5:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers5:2 Nye umu Israel iwu
Numbers5:3 ma nwoke ma nwayi
Numbers5:4 Umu Israel we me otú a
Numbers5:5 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers5:6 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Numbers5:7 ha gēkwuputa kwa nmehie-ha nke ha meworo: ọ gēnyeghachi kwa ihe ikpe mara ya nime ya n'isi-ya
Numbers5:8 Ma ọ buru na nwoke ahu enweghi onye-nb͕aputa nke ọ gēnyeghachi ihe ahu nke ikpe mara ya nime ya
Numbers5:9 Ajà-nbuli ọ bula nke ihe nsọ nile nke umu Israel
Numbers5:10 Ihe nsọ nile nke nwoke ọ bula
Numbers5:11 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers5:12 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Numbers5:13 ya na nwoke ọzọ ewe dina ka ọ ra aru n'aru-ya
Numbers5:14 mọ ekworo ewe garue nwoke ahu aru
Numbers5:15 nwoke ahu gēme kwa ka nwunye-ya biakute onye-nchu-àjà
Numbers5:16 Onye-nchu-àjà gēme kwa ka ọ biarue nso
Numbers5:17 onye-nchu-àjà gēwere kwa miri nsọ n'iko ájá: ọ bu kwa ufọdu nime ájá nke di n'ala-ulo ebe-obibim ka onye-nchu-àjà gēwere
Numbers5:18 onye-nchu-àjà gēguzo kwa nwayi ahu n'iru Jehova
Numbers5:19 onye-nchu-àjà gēme kwa ka ọ ṅua iyi
Numbers5:20 ma asi na gi onwe-gi ejehiewo
Numbers5:21 onye-nchu-àjà gēwere kwa iyi nke ọb͕ub͕a-iyi ahu me ka nwayi ahu ṅua iyi
Numbers5:22 miri a nke nēweta ọbubu-ọnu gābà kwa na ngiri-afọ-gi
Numbers5:23 Onye-nchu-àjà gēde kwa ọb͕ub͕a-iyi ndia n'akwukwọ
Numbers5:24 ọ gēme kwa ka nwayi ahu ṅua miri ilu nke nēweta ọbubu-ọnu: miri ahu nke nēweta ọbubu-ọnu gābà kwa nime ya ighọ ihe-ilu.
Numbers5:25 Onye-nchu-àjà gānara kwa onyinye-inata-iru-ọma nke ekworo n'aka nwayi ahu
Numbers5:26 onye-nchu-àjà gēsi kwa n'onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu weju nweju-aka-ya
Numbers5:27 Ma mb͕e ọ meworo ka ọ ṅua miri ahu
Numbers5:28 Ma ọ buru na nwayi ahu arughi árú
Numbers5:29 Nka bu iwu ekworo
Numbers5:30 ma-ọbu mb͕e mọ ekworo gāgaru nwoke n'aru
Numbers5:31 Nwoke ahu gāpu kwa n'ajọ omume
Numbers6:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers6:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Numbers6:3 na manya-vine na ihe-ọṅuṅu nābà n'anya ka ọ gēkewaputa onwe-ya; ọ gaghi-aṅu manya-vine b͕ara uka
Numbers6:4 Ubọchi nile nke nkewaputa-ya ọ dighi ihe nime ihe ọ bula emere site n'osisi vine nke manya-vine o gēri
Numbers6:5 Ubọchi nile nke nkwa nkwaputa-ya ọ dighi aguba gāgabiga n'isi-ya: rue ozùzù ubọchi nile
Numbers6:6 Ubọchi nile ọ nēkewaputara Jehova onwe-ya ọ dighi madu nwuru anwu ọ gābiaru nso.
Numbers6:7 Ọ gaghi-emeru onwe-ya bayere nna-ya
Numbers6:8 Ubọchi nile nke nkewaputa-ya nsọ ka ọ diri Jehova.
Numbers6:9 Ma mb͕e onye nwuru anwu gānwu n'akuku-ya na ntabi-anya
Numbers6:10 N'ubọchi nke-asatọ ọ gēwetara onye-nchu-àjà nduru abua
Numbers6:11 Onye-nchu-àjà gēme otù ka ọ buru àjà-nmehie
Numbers6:12 Ọ gēkewaputa-kwa-ra Jehova ubọchi nile nke nkewaputa-ya
Numbers6:13 Nka bu kwa iwu onye-Nazirait
Numbers6:14 ọ gēweta kwa nso Jehova onyinye-ya iji biaru nso
Numbers6:15 na nkata achicha ekoghi-eko
Numbers6:16 Onye-nchu-àjà gēweta kwa ha nso n'iru Jehova
Numbers6:17 ọ gēme kwa ebulu ahu ka ọ buru ihe àjà nke àjà-udo anāchuru Jehova
Numbers6:18 Onye-Nazirait ahu gākọpu kwa isi nke nkewaputa-ya n'ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute
Numbers6:19 Onye-nchu-aja gēwere ọkwa-aka esiri esi nke ebulu ahu
Numbers6:20 onye-nchu-àjà gēfé kwa ha ibu àjà-ofufé n'iru Jehova; ihe nsọ ka ọ buru onye-nchu-àjà
Numbers6:21 Nka bu iwu onye-Nazirait onye nēkwe nkwa
Numbers6:22 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers6:23 Gwa Eron
Numbers6:24 Jehova gọzie gi
Numbers6:25 Jehova me iru-Ya ka ọ mukwasi gi
Numbers6:26 Jehova bulie iru-Ya n'aru gi
Numbers6:27 Ha gātukwasi kwa aham n'aru umu Israel; Mu onwem gāgọzi kwa ha.

Numbers8:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers8:2 Gwa Eron okwu
Numbers8:3 Eron we me otú a; na ncherita-iru nke iru ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu ka o weliri oriọna-ya nile
Numbers8:4 Nka bu otú emere ihe-idọba-oriọna ahu
Numbers8:5 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers8:6 Weputa ndi Livai n'etiti umu Israel
Numbers8:7 Otú a ka i gēme ha
Numbers8:8 Ka ha were kwa nwa-oke ehi
Numbers8:9 I gēme kwa ka ndi Livai biaru nso n'iru ulo-ikwū nzute: i gākpọkọta kwa nzukọ nile nke umu Israel:
Numbers8:10 i gēme kwa ka ndi Livai biaru nso n'iru Jehova: umu Israel gēbikwasi ndi Livai aka-ha:
Numbers8:11 Eron gēfé ndi Livai n'iru Jehova ibu àjà-ofufé sitere n'umu Israel
Numbers8:12 Ndi Livai gēbikwasi aka-ha n'isi oke-ehi abua ahu: gi me otù nime ha ka ọ buru àjà-nmehie
Numbers8:13 I gēguzo ndi Livai n'iru Eron
Numbers8:14 I gēkewaputa kwa ndi Livai n'etiti umu Israel
Numbers8:15 Emesia ndi Livai gābà ifè ulo-ikwū nzute òfùfè: i gēme ka ha di ọcha
Numbers8:16 N'ihi na ndi enyesiworom ha nile ka ha bu site n'etiti umu Israel; n'ọnọdu umu nile ọ bula meghere àkpà-nwa
Numbers8:17 N'ihi na Mu nwe umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'etiti umu Israel
Numbers8:18 Ewerewokwam ndi Livai n'ọnọdu umu nile eburu uzọ mu n'etiti umu Israel.
Numbers8:19 Ewerewom ndi Livai nye Eron
Numbers8:20 Moses
Numbers8:21 Ndi Livai we wepu nmehie n'onwe-ha
Numbers8:22 Emesia ndi Livai we ba ifè òfùfè-ha n'ulo-ikwū nzute n'iru Eron
Numbers8:23 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers8:24 Nka bu nke ndi Livai nwere: site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na ise we gaba n'iru ha gābà ibu agha n'òfùfè nke ulo-ikwū nzute:
Numbers8:25 ma site n'onye b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na iri we gaba n'iru ha gēsi n'ibu-agha nke òfùfè ahu laghachi
Numbers8:26 ma ha gēso umu-nne-ha je ozi n'ulo-ikwū nzute
Numbers9:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu n'ọzara Sainai
Numbers9:2 Ka umu Israel me kwa ememe ngabiga na mb͕e-ya akara àkà.
Numbers9:3 N'ubọchi nke-iri-na-anọ n'onwa nka
Numbers9:4 Moses we gwa umu Israel okwu
Numbers9:5 Ha we me ememe ngabiga ahu n'ọnwa mbu
Numbers9:6 Ma ndikom ufọdu di
Numbers9:7 ndikom ahu we si ya
Numbers9:8 Moses we si ha
Numbers9:9 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers9:10 Gwa umu Israel okwu
Numbers9:11 n'ọnwa nke-abua n'ubọchi nke-iri-na-anọ n'etiti ehihie na anyasi ka ha gēme ya; tiyere achicha ekoghi-eko na ihe di iche iche nēlu ilu ka ha gēri ya:
Numbers9:12 ha agaghi-eme ka ihe fọdu site na ya rue ututu
Numbers9:13 Ma nwoke nke di ọcha
Numbers9:14 Ma mb͕e ọbìa gānọ n'etiti unu dika ọbìa
Numbers9:15 N'ubọchi eguzoro ebe-obibi ahu ọtọ igwe-oji ahu kpuchiri ebe-obibi
Numbers9:16 Otú a ka ọ di mb͕e dum: igwe-oji ahu nēkpuchi ya
Numbers9:17 Ma ọ di ka nrigo nke igwe-oji ahu site n'elu Ulo-ikwū si di
Numbers9:18 N'okwu-ọnu Jehova ka umu Israel nēbuli ije
Numbers9:19 Mb͕e igwe-oji ahu nānọgide n'elu ebe-obibi ahu ọtutu ubọchi
Numbers9:20 Mb͕e ufọdu di mb͕e igwe-oji ahu nānọ ubọchi ole-na-ole n'elu ebe-obibi ahu; n'okwu-ọnu Jehova ka ha nānọdu n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū
Numbers9:21 Mb͕e ufọdu di kwa mb͕e igwe-oji ahu nānọ site n'anyasi rue ututu; ma mb͕e igwe-oji ahu rigoro n'ututu
Numbers9:22 Ma asi na ọ bu ubọchi abua
Numbers9:23 N'okwu-ọnu Jehova ha nāma ulo-ikwū-ha
Numbers10:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers10:2 Mere onwe-gi opì ọla ọcha abua; ihe akpuru akpu ka i gēme ha: ha gābu-kwa-ra gi ihe bayere nkpọkọta nzukọ Israel
Numbers10:3 Mb͕e ha gēwere ha fùa
Numbers10:4 Ma ọ buru na otù ka ha were fùa
Numbers10:5 Mb͕e unu gāfù opì ka ọ we dasie uda ike
Numbers10:6 Mb͕e unu gāfù opì ub͕ò nke-abua ka ọ we dasie uda ike
Numbers10:7 Ma n'ikpọkọta nkpọkọta Israel unu gāfù opì
Numbers10:8 Ọ bu umu-ndikom Eron
Numbers10:9 Ọzọ
Numbers10:10 Ọ bu kwa n'ubọchi ọṅu-unu
Numbers10:11 O rue n'arọ nke-abua
Numbers10:12 Umu Israel we si n'ọzara Sainai bulie ije dika nbuli-ije nile ha si di; igwe-oji ahu we nọdu n'ọzara Peran.
Numbers10:13 Ma ha buru uzọ bulie ije n'okwu-ọnu Jehova n'aka Moses.
Numbers10:14 Ọkọlọtọ nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū umu Juda buru uzọ bulie ije
Numbers10:15 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Isaka bu Netanel nwa Zua.
Numbers10:16 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Zebulun bu Eliab nwa Hilon.
Numbers10:17 Ewe weda ebe-obibi ahu; umu Giashon na umu Merari
Numbers10:18 Ọkọlọtọ nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Reuben we bulie ije
Numbers10:19 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Simeon bu Shelumiel nwa Zurishadai.
Numbers10:20 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Gad bu Eliasaf nwa Deuel.
Numbers10:21 Ndi Kohat we bulie ije
Numbers10:22 Ọkọlọtọ nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū umu Efraim we bulie ije
Numbers10:23 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Manase bu Gameliel nwa Pedahzua.
Numbers10:24 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Benjamin bu Abidan nwa Gideoni.
Numbers10:25 Ọkọlọtọ nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū umu Dan
Numbers10:26 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Asha bu Pagiel nwa Ọkran.
Numbers10:27 Onye nọ n'isi usu-ndi-agha nke ebo umu Naftali bu Ahira nwa Inan.
Numbers10:28 Ndia bu nbuli-ije nke umu Israel
Numbers10:29 Moses we si Hobab
Numbers10:30 Ọ we si ya
Numbers10:31 Ọ we si
Numbers10:32 O gēru kwa
Numbers10:33 Ha we si n'ugwu Jehova bulie ije-ha je ije ubọchi atọ; ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu nke Jehova nēbuli kwa ije n'iru ha ije ubọchi atọ
Numbers10:34 Igwe-oji nke Jehova we di n'elu ha n'ehihie
Numbers10:35 O rue
Numbers10:36 Ma mb͕e o zuru ike
Numbers11:1 Ndi Israel we di ka ndi nātamu ntamu
Numbers11:2 Ndi Israel we tikue Moses; Moses we kpere Jehova ọku ahu we bilata.
Numbers11:3 Ewe kpọ aha ebe ahu Tabera: n'ihi na ọku nke Jehova nēre n'etiti ha.
Numbers11:4 Ìgwè ndi gwara ọgwa nke nọ n'etiti ha we chọ ajọ ọchichọ: umu Israel we kwa kwa ákwá ọzọ
Numbers11:5 Ayi nēcheta azù nke ayi nēri n'Ijipt nāzughi azú; ya na cucumbers na melons
Numbers11:6 ma ub͕u a nkpuru-obi ayi akpọwo nku
Numbers11:7 Ma manna ahu
Numbers11:8 Ndi Israel jeghariri
Numbers11:9 Mb͕e igirigi dakwasiri ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu n'abali
Numbers11:10 Moses we nu ndi Israel ka ha nākwa ákwá n'ab͕uru nile ha
Numbers11:11 Moses we si Jehova
Numbers11:12 Ọ̀ bu mu onwem turu ime ndi nka nile? ọ̀ bu mu onwem muru ha
Numbers11:13 Òle ebe m'gēsi nwe anu inye ndi nka nile? n'ihi na ha nākwasom ákwá
Numbers11:14 Apughm
Numbers11:15 Ma ọ buru na otú a ka Gi onwe-gi nēmem
Numbers11:16 Jehova we si Moses
Numbers11:17 M'gāridata
Numbers11:18 Gi si kwa ndi Israel
Numbers11:19 Ọ bughi otù ubọchi ka unu gēri anu
Numbers11:20 rue otù ọnwa zuru ezù
Numbers11:21 Moses we si
Numbers11:22 Ọ̀ bu ìgwè ewu na aturu na ìgwè ehi ka agēb͕uru ha
Numbers11:23 Jehova we si Moses
Numbers11:24 Moses we pua
Numbers11:25 Jehova we ridata n'igwe-oji ahu

Numbers11:30 Moses

Numbers11:32 Ndi Israel we bilie ubọchi ahu nile
Numbers11:33 Mb͕e anu ahu nādi n'etiti ezé-ha ub͕u a
Numbers11:34 Ewe kpọ aha ebe ahu Kibrot-hataava: n'ihi na n'ebe ahu ka ha lìri ndi Israel ndi nāchọ ajọ ọchichọ.
Numbers11:35 Ndi Israel siri na Kibrot-hataava bulie ije rue Hazerot; ha we nọ na Hazerot.
Numbers12:1 Miriam na Eron we kwue okwu megide Moses n'ihi nwayi Etiopia ahu ọ lutara: n'ihi na nwayi Etiopia ka ọ lutara.
Numbers12:2 Ha we si
Numbers12:3 Ma nwoke ahu

Numbers12:6 Ọ we si Biko

Numbers13:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu

Numbers19:2 Nka bu ukpuru nke iwu ahu nke Jehova nyeworo n'iwu
Numbers19:3 unu gēnye ya Eleeza
Numbers19:4 Eleeza
Numbers19:5 otù onye gēsure kwa nwa-ab͕ọghọ-ehi ahu ọku n'anya-ya; akpukpọ-ya
Numbers19:6 onye-nchu-àjà gēwere kwa osisi cedar
Numbers19:7 onye-nchu-àjà gāsu kwa uwe-ya
Numbers19:8 Onye ahu nke nēsure ya ọku gāsu kwa uwe-ya na miri
Numbers19:9 Nwoke nke di ọcha gāchikọta ntu nke nwa-ab͕ọghọ-ehi ahu
Numbers19:10 Onye ahu nke nāchikọta ntu nwa-ab͕ọghọ-ehi gāsu kwa uwe-ya
Numbers19:11 Onye nēmetu ozu nwuru anwu nke madu ọ bula aru gāru árú ubọchi asa:
Numbers19:12 onye ahu gēwere ya wepu nmehie-ya n'ubọchi nke-atọ
Numbers19:13 Onye ọ bula nke nēmetu onye nwuru anwu aru
Numbers19:14 Nka bu iwu mb͕e madu nwuru n'ulo-ikwū: onye ọ bula nke nāba n.ulo-ikwū ahu
Numbers19:15 Ihe ọ bula nke ghere oghe
Numbers19:16 Onye ọ bula nke nēmetu onye eji mma-agha b͕u
Numbers19:17 Ha gēwere kwa ufọdu nime ntu nsure-ọku àjà-nmehie ahu bayere onye ahu ruru árú
Numbers19:18 nwoke nke di ọcha gēwere kwa hyssop
Numbers19:19 onye ahu nke di ọcha gēfesa kwa onye ahu ruru árú n'ubọchi nke-atọ
Numbers19:20 Ma nwoke nke ruru árú
Numbers19:21 Ọ gābu-kwa-ra ha ukpuru ebighi-ebi; onye nēfesa miri nke idi-na-nsọ ahu gāsu kwa uwe-ya; onye nēmetu miri nke idi-na-nsọ ahu aru gāru kwa árú rue anyasi.
Numbers19:22 Ihe ọ bula onye ruru árú nēmetu aru gāru árú; madu nke nēmetu ya aru gāru árú rue anyasi.

Numbers26:52 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers26:53 Ndia ka agēkere ala ahu n'ihe-nketa
Numbers26:54 Ndi bara uba ka i gēme ka ala-nketa-ha rie nne
Numbers26:55 Nání ọ bu n'ife-nzà ka agēkè ala ahu: dika aha nile nke ebo nile nke ndi bu nna-ha si di ka ha gēketa.
Numbers26:56 Dika ife-nzà si di ka agēkè ihe-nketa-ha n'etiti ndi bara uba na ndi di ole-na-ole.
Numbers26:57 Ndia bu ndi agukọtara agukọta nke ndi Livai dika ab͕uru nile ha si di: nke Giashon bu ab͕uru ndi Giashon: nke Kohat bu ab͕uru ndi Kohat: nke Merari bu ab͕uru ndi Merari.

Numbers28:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers28:2 Nye umu Israel iwu
Numbers28:3 I gāsi kwa ha
Numbers28:4 Otù nime umu-aturu ahu ka i gāchu n'ututu
Numbers28:5 na otù uzọ n'uzọ iri nke otù ephah utu ọka flour agwara n'otù uzọ n'uzọ anọ nke otù hin nke manu asuru asu ka ọ buru onyinye-inata-iru-oma.
Numbers28:6 Ọ bu àjà-nsure-ọku anēsure mb͕e dum
Numbers28:7 Àjà-ihe-ọṅuṅu-ya kwa
Numbers28:8 Nwa-aturu nke-ọzọ ka i gāchu kwa n'etiti ehihie na anyasi: dika onyinye-inata-iru-ọma enyere n'ututu
Numbers28:9 N'ubọchi-izu-ike kwa: umu-aturu abua nke b͕ara otú arọ
Numbers28:10 nka bu àjà-nsure-ọku ubọchi-izu-ike kwa-ubọchi-izu-ike
Numbers28:11 Ọzọ
Numbers28:12 na uzọ atọ n'uzọ iri nke otù ephah utu ọka flour
Numbers28:13 na otù uzọ n'uzọ iri
Numbers28:14 Àjà-ihe-ọṅuṅu-ha gābu kwa nkera otù hin manya-vine iji chu otú oke-ehi
Numbers28:15 Otù nkpi kwa iji chu àjà-nmehie nye Jehova; agāchu ya tiyere àjà-nsure-ọku anēsure mb͕e dum
Numbers28:16 Ọzọ
Numbers28:17 N'ubọchi nke iri-na-ise nke ọnwa ahu ka ememe gādi: ubọchi asa ka agēri achicha ekoghi-eko.
Numbers28:18 N'ubọchi mbu nkpọkọta nsọ gādi; ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje:
Numbers28:19 ma unu gēweta nso àjà-ọku
Numbers28:20 na onyinye-inata-iru-ọma-ha
Numbers28:21 ọ bu kwa otù uzọ n'uzọ iri
Numbers28:22 na otù nkpi iji chu àjà-nmehie
Numbers28:23 Unu gāchu ndia nāgughi àjà-nsure-ọku ututu
Numbers28:24 Dika ihe ndia si di ka unu ganāchu kwa-ubọchi
Numbers28:25 N'ubọchi nke-asa nkpọkọta nsọ gādi-kwa-ra unu; ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfùfè unu gēje.
Numbers28:26 Ọzọ
Numbers28:27 unu gēweta kwa nso àjà-nsure-ọku ibu ihe ísì utọ anēsurere Jehova; umu-oke-ehi abua
Numbers28:28 na onyinye-inata-iru-ọma-ha
Numbers28:29 otù uzọ n'uzọ iri
Numbers28:30 otú nkpi
Numbers28:31 Unu gāchu ha nāgughi àjà-nsure-ọku anēsure mb͕e dum

Numbers29:2 Unu gēme àjà-nsure-ọku ibu ihe ísì utọ anēsurere Jehova; otù nwa-oke-ehi
Numbers29:3 na onyinye-inata-iru-ọma-ha
Numbers29:4 na otù uzọ n'uzọ iri iji chu nwa-aturu ọ bula nime umu-aturu asa ahu:

Numbers29:33 na onyinye-inata-ọma-ha

Numbers29:35 N'ubọchi nke-asatọ nb͕ochi gādiri unu: ọ dighi ozi ọ bula nke òfufè unu gēje:
Numbers29:36 ma unu gēweta nso àjà-nsure-ọku. bú àjà-ọku nke ihe ísì utọ anāchuru Jehova:' otú oke-ehi
Numbers29:37 onyinye-inata-iru-ọma-ha
Numbers29:38 na otù nkpi iji chu aja-nmehie; nāgughi àjà-nsure-ọku anēsure mb͕e dum
Numbers29:39 Ndia ka unu gēmere Jehova na mb͕e nile unu akara àkà

Numbers30:1 Moses we gwa ndi-isi nke ebo nile nke umu Israel okwu
Numbers30:2 Nwoke ọ bula
Numbers30:3 Nwayi kwa
Numbers30:4 nna-ya we nu nkwa-ya
Numbers30:5 Ma ọ buru na nna-ya si ya
Numbers30:6 Ma ọ buru na nwoke alua ya na nwunye ma-ọli
Numbers30:7 di-ya we nu ya
Numbers30:8 Ma ọ buru na di-ya si ya
Numbers30:9 Ma nkwa nke nwayi di-ya nwuru
Numbers30:10 Ma ọ buru na ọ bu n'ulo di-ya ka o kwere nkwa
Numbers30:11 di-ya we nu ya
Numbers30:12 Ma ọ buru na di-ya emebisia ha n'ubọchi ọ nuru ha; ihe ọ bula nke nēsi n'eb͕ub͕ere-ọnu-ya puta bayere nkwa-ya nile
Numbers30:13 Nkwa ọ bula
Numbers30:14 Ma ọ buru na di-ya ab͕achie ya nkiti site n'ubọchi rue ubọchi: o mewo kwa nkwa-ya nile
Numbers30:15 Ma ọ buru na o mebisia ha mb͕e ọ nusiri ha; ọ gēbu kwa ajọ omume nwayi ahu.
Numbers30:16 Ndia bu ukpuru
Numbers31:1 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers31:2 Bọrọ umu Israel ọ́bọ̀ n'aru ndi Mdian: emesia agāchikọta gi na umu-nna-gi n'ala-mọ.
Numbers31:3 Moses we gwa ndi Israel okwu
Numbers31:4 Nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri n'ebo n'ebo
Numbers31:5 Ewe si n'usu nnù abua na ọgu iri nile nke Israel rara nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri nke ebo ọ bula nye
Numbers31:6 Moses we ziga ha
Numbers31:7 Ha we buso Midian agha
Numbers31:8 Ndi-eze Midian ka ha b͕u-kwa-ra
Numbers31:9 Umu Israel we dọta ndinyom Midian na umu-ntakiri-ha n'agha; ọ bu kwa anu-ulo-ha nile
Numbers31:10 Ha sure-kwa-ra obodo-ha nile n'ebe-obibi nile ha
Numbers31:11 Ha we chiri ihe nile akwatara n'agha
Numbers31:12 Ha we wetara Moses
Numbers31:13 Moses
Numbers31:14 Moses we wesa ndi-nlekọta usu-ndi-agha ahu iwe
Numbers31:15 Moss we si ha
Numbers31:16 Le
Numbers31:17 Ma ub͕u a b͕uenu nwoke ọ bula n'etiti umu-ntakiri
Numbers31:18 Ma umu-ntakiri nile n'etiti ndinyom
Numbers31:19 Ma unu onwe-unu
Numbers31:20 Ma uwe ọ bula
Numbers31:21 Eleeza
Numbers31:22 otú ọ di
Numbers31:23 bú ihe ọ bula nke gānagide ọku
Numbers31:24 Unu gāsu kwa uwe-unu n'ubọchi nke-asa
Numbers31:25 Jehova we gwa Moses okwu
Numbers31:26 Guta ọnu-ọgugu ihe-nweta
Numbers31:27 kera ihe-nweta ahu; n'etiti ndi nēbu agha
Numbers31:28 unu gānara kwa n'aka ndi-agha ahu
Numbers31:29 na nkera-ha ka unu gānara ya
Numbers31:30 Na nkera nke umu Israel ka i gānara kwa otù ihe anaputara n'ọgu ihe abua na iri
Numbers31:31 Moses na Eleeza
Numbers31:32 Ma ihe-nweta ahu
Numbers31:33 ehi di kwa orú nnù uzọ iteghete;
Numbers31:34 inyinya-ibu di kwa orú nnù uzọ asa
Numbers31:35 madu kwa
Numbers31:36 Nkera ahu
Numbers31:37 útù atùru Jehova
Numbers31:38 Ehi di kwa orú nnù uzọ anọ na nnù iri; utu aturu Jehova site na ha we di ọgu atọ na iri na abua.

Joshua16:5 Ókè-ala umu Efraim

Joshua16:8 Ókè-ala ahu siri na Tapua je n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu rue miri-iyi Kena; ọpupu-ya we di n'oké osimiri. Nka bu ihe-nketa nke ebo umu Efraim dika ab͕uru nile ha si di;

Joshua17:4 Ha we biarue nso n'iru Eleeza
Joshua17:5 Òkè iri we dabara Manase
Joshua17:6 n'ihi na umu-ndinyom Manase ketara ihe-nketa n'etiti umu-ya ndikom: ala Gilead kwa
Joshua17:7 Ókè-ala Manase we si n'Asha rue Mikmetat
Joshua17:8 Manase nwe ala Tapua: ma umu Efraim nwe Tapua rue ókè-ala Manase.
Joshua17:9 Ókè-ala ahu we rida rue miri-iyi Kena
Joshua17:10 n'akuku Ndida ọ diri Efraim
Joshua17:11 Manase nwekwara obodo n'Isaka na n'Asha
Joshua17:12 Ma umu Manase apughi inapu ndi bi n'obodo ahu ala-ha; ma ndi Kenean jisiri ike ibiri n'ala ahu.
Joshua17:13 O rue
Joshua17:14 Umu Josef we gwa Joshua okwu
Joshua17:15 Joshua we si ha
Joshua17:16 Umu Josef we si
Joshua17:17 Joshua we gwa ulo Josef
Joshua17:18 n'ihi na ugwu ahu ka i gēnwe; n'ihi na oké ọhia ka ọ bu
Joshua18:1 Nzukọ nile nke umu Israel we kpọkọta onwe-ha na Shailo
Joshua18:2 Ebo asa we fọdu n'etiti umu Israel
Joshua18:3 Joshua we si umu Israel
Joshua18:4 Doronu onwe-unu ndikom atọ inọrọ ebo ọ bula: m'gēziga kwa ha
Joshua18:5 Ha gēkè kwa ya òkè asa: Juda gēguzo n'ókè-ala-ya na Ndida
Joshua18:6 Unu onwe-unu gēde kwa ala ahu n'akwukwọ n'òkè asa
Joshua18:7 N'ihi na ndi Livai enweghi òkè n'etiti unu; n'ihi na ọlu-nchu-àjà Jehova bu ihe-nketa-ha: Gad na Reuben na nkera ebo Manase anarawo kwa ihe-nketa-ha n'ofè Jọdan n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu
Joshua18:8 Ndikom ahu we bilie
Joshua18:9 Ndikom ahu we je
Joshua18:10 Joshua we fere ha nzà nime Shailo n'iru Jehova: Joshua we kère umu Israel ala n'ebe ahu dika esi kè ha n'òkè n'òkè.
Joshua18:11 Ife-nzà nke ebo umu Benjamin we puta dika ab͕uru nile ha si di; ókè-ala nke ihe-ife-nzà-ha we puta n'etiti umu Juda na umu Josef.
Joshua18:12 Ókè-ala ha nwere n'akuku Ugwu we site na Jọdan; ókè-ala ahu we rigo rue akuku Jeriko n'Ugwu
Joshua18:13 Ókè-ala ahu we si n'ebe ahu gabiga rue Luz
Joshua18:14 Ewe kpa ókè ahu
Joshua18:15 Akuku Ndida we site na nsọtu Kiriat-jearim
Joshua18:16 ókè-ala ahu we rida rue nsọtu ugwu ahu nke di n'iru ndagwurugwu nwa Hinom
Joshua18:17 ewe kpa ókè-ala ahu n'Ugwu
Joshua18:18 ọ gabiga rue akuku na ncherita-iru Araba n'akuku Ugwu
Joshua18:19 ókè-ala ahu we gabiga rue akuku Bet-họgla n'akuku Ugwu: ọpupu ókè-ala ahu di kwa n'ọnu-miri Ugwu nke Oké Osimiri Nnú
Joshua18:20 Jọdan bu kwa ókè-ala-ya n'akuku Iru-anyanwu. Nka bu ihe-nketa umu Benjamin
Joshua18:21 Ma obodo ebo umu Benjamin nwere dika ab͕uru nile ha si di bu Jeriko

Joshua18:23 na Avim
Joshua18:24 na Kefa-amoni
Joshua18:25 na Gibeon
Joshua18:26 na Mizpeh
Joshua18:27 na Rekem
Joshua18:28 na Zela

Joshua19:9 Site n'òkè umu Juda ka ihe-nketa umu Simeon di: n'ihi na òkè umu Juda riri nne kari ha: umu Simeon we keta ihe n'etiti ihe-nketa-ha.
Joshua19:10 Ife-nzà nke-atọ we putara umu Zebulun dika ab͕uru nile ha si di: ókè-ala ihe-nketa-ha we di rue Sarid:
Joshua19:11 ókè-ala-ha we rigo n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu

Joshua19:13 o si n'ebe ahu gabiga n'akuku Iru-anyanwu n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu rue Gat-hefa

Joshua19:30 na Uma

Joshua19:32 Ọ bu umu Naftali ka ife-nzà nke-isi putara
Joshua19:33 Ókè-ala-ha we site na Helef

Joshua19:38 na Iron

Judges1:1 O rue
Judges1:2 Jehova we si
Judges1:3 Juda we si Simeon
Judges1:4 Juda we rigo; Jehova we nye ndi Kenean na ndi-Perizait n'aka-ha: ha we tib͕ue ha nime Bezek
Judges1:5 Ha we hu Adoni-bezek nime Bezek: ha we buso ya agha
Judges1:6 Ma Adoni-bezek b͕alagara; ha we chua ya n'azu
Judges1:7 Adoni-bezek we si
Judges1:8 Umu Juda we buso Jerusalem agha
Judges1:9 Emesia umu Juda ridara ibuso ndi Kenean agha
Judges1:10 Juda we jekuru ndi Kenean ndi bi na Hebron: (ma aha Hebron na mb͕e gara aga bu Kiriat-aba:) na tib͕ue Sheshai
Judges1:11 O si n'ebe ahu jekuru ndi bi na Debia. (Ma aha Debia na mb͕e ara aga bu Kiriat-sefa.)
Judges1:12 Keleb we si
Judges1:13 Ọtniel nwa Kenaz
Judges1:14 O rue
Judges1:15 Ọ si ya
Judges1:16 Umu onye-Kinait
Judges1:17 Juda we je
Judges1:18 Juda were kwa Geza na ókè-ala-ya
Judges1:19 Jehova nọye-kwa-ra Juda; o we nweta ugwu; ma ọ pughi inapu ndi bi na ndagwurugwu ala-ha
Judges1:20 Ha we nye Keleb Hebron
Judges1:21 Ma umu Benjamin anapughi ndi Jebus ndi bi na Jerusalem ala-ha: ndi Jebus we biri n'etiti umu Benjamin nime Jerusalem
Judges1:22 Ma ulo Josef
Judges1:23 Ulo Josef we ziga iledo Bet-el. (Ma aha obodo ahu na mb͕e gara aga bu Luz.)
Judges1:24 Ndi nēche nche we hu otù nwoke ka o nēsi n'obodo ahu puta
Judges1:25 Ọ we gosi ha nbata obodo ahu
Judges1:26 Nwoke ahu we je ala ndi Het
Judges1:27 Manase anapughi ndi bi na Bet-shan na umu-obodo-ya
Judges1:28 O rue
Judges1:29 Efraim anapughi kwa ndi Kenean ndi bi na Gezea ala-ha; ndi Kenean we biri na Gezea n'etiti ha.
Judges1:30 Zebulun anapughi ndi bi na Kitron
Judges1:31 Asha anapughi kwa ndi bi n'Ako
Judges1:32 ndi Asha we biri n'etiti ndi Kenean
Judges1:33 Naftali anapughi kwa ndi bi na Bet-shemesh
Judges1:34 Ndi-Amorait we kpagide umu Dan n'ugwu: n'ihi na ha ekweghi ka ha rida na ndagwurugwu:
Judges1:35 ma ndi-Amorait jisiri ike ibiri n'ugwu Heres
Judges1:36 Ókè-ala ndi-Amorait we site na nrigo Akrabim
Judges2:1 Onye-ozi Jehova we si na Gilgal rigorue Bokim. Ọ we si

Judges2:3 M'we si kwa
Judges2:4 O rue
Judges2:5 Ha we kpọ aha ebe ahu Bokim: ha we chuara Jehova àjà n'ebe ahu.
Judges2:6 Joshua we zilaga ndi Israel
Judges2:7 Ndi Israel we fè Jehova òfùfè ubọchi nile nke Joshua
Judges2:8 Joshua nwa Nun
Judges2:9 Ha we lìe ya n'ókè-ala nke ihe-nketa-ya nime Timnat-heres
Judges2:10 Ewe chikọta kwa ọb͕ọ ahu nile na ndi bu nna-ha n'ala-mọ: ọb͕ọ ọzọ we bilie inọchi ha

Judges2:12 ha we rapu Jehova

Judges2:16 Jehova we me ka ndi-ikpé bilie
Judges2:17 Ọzọ kwa

Judges2:20 Iwe Jehova we di ọku megide Israel; O we si
Judges2:21 Mu onwem agaghi-anapu kwa onye ọ bula ala-ya n'iru ha ọzọ site na mba nile ndi Joshua rapuru mb͕e ọ nwuru:

Judges3:1 Ma ndia bu mba ndi Jehova rapuru
Judges3:2 nání ka ọb͕ọ nile nke umu Israel we mara
Judges3:3 bú ndi-isi ise nke ndi Filistia
Judges3:4 Ha di kwa ka ewere ha nwa Israel
Judges3:5 Umu Israel we biri n'etiti ndi Kenean
Judges3:6 ha we lutara onwe-ha umu-ha ndinyom na nwunye
Judges3:7 Umu Israel we me ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova
Judges3:8 Iwe Jehova we di ọku megide Israel
Judges3:9 Umu Israel we tikue Jehova
Judges3:10 Mọ nke Jehova we dikwasi ya
Judges3:11 Ala ahu we di jū ọgu arọ abua. Ọtniel nwa Kenaz we nwua.
Judges3:12 Umu Israel we me kwa ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova ọzọ: Jehova we me ka Eglon
Judges3:13 O we chikọtara onwe-ya umu Amon na Amalek
Judges3:14 Umu Israel we fè Eglon
Judges3:15 Umu Israel we tikue Jehova
Judges3:16 Ihud we mere onwe-ya mma-agha nke nwere ọnu abua
Judges3:17 Ọ weta onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu nso Eglon eze Moab: ma Eglon bu nwoke mara abuba nke-uku.
Judges3:18 O rue
Judges3:19 Ma ya onwe-ya si n'arusi apiri api ndi di na Gilgal laghachi
Judges3:20 Ihud we biakute ya; ma ya onwe-ya nānọdu nání ya n'ime-ulo-elu ọjuju-oyi nke o nwere. Ihud we si
Judges3:21 Ihud we setipu aka-ekpe-ya
Judges3:22 isi-mma we soro kwa iru-mma ba; abuba we b͕ochipu iru-mma
Judges3:23 Ihud we pua n'uzọ-nbata
Judges3:24 Ma mb͕e ya onwe-ya pusiri
Judges3:25 Ha we nēche rue mb͕e ihere mere ha: ma
Judges3:26 Ihud we wepuga onwe-ya mb͕e ọ nāb͕agwoju ha anya

1Samuel2:12 Ma umu-ndikom Ilai bu ndi jọb͕uru onwe-ha; ha amaghi Jehova.

1Samuel2:14 o we dubà ya n'ite ọku

1Samuel17:1 Ma ndi Filistia chikọtara ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ha ibu agha
1Samuel17:2 Sọl na ndikom Israel we chikọta onwe-ha
1Samuel17:3 Ndi Filistia we nēguzo n'ugwu n'otù akuku
1Samuel17:4 Onye-nputa-ọb͕ọ-agha we si n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ndi Filistia puta
1Samuel17:5 Okpu-agha ọla di kwa n'isi-ya
1Samuel17:6 Ihe-ọla eji kpuchi ukwu di kwa n'ukwu-ya abua
1Samuel17:7 Osisi ube-ya di kwa ka oké ókpòrò di arọ́ nke ọkpa-ákwà ji akpa ákwà; isi ube-ya di nnù shekel ígwè na ọgu iri: onye nēbu ọta-ya nēje n'iru ya.
1Samuel17:8 O we guzo kpọ usoro-agha nile nke Israel òkù
1Samuel17:9 Ọ buru na ọ puru ilusom ọ̀gù
1Samuel17:10 Onye Filistia ahu we si
1Samuel17:11 Sọl na Israel nile we nu okwu nile ndia nke onye Filistia
1Samuel17:12 Ma Devid bu nwa onye Efrat ahu nke Bet-lehem-juda
1Samuel17:13 Umu-ndikom atọ nke Jesi ndi bu okenye we je soro Sọl ibu agha: aha umu-ya ndikom atọ ndi jere agha bu Elaiab ọkpara-ya
1Samuel17:14 Ma Devid
1Samuel17:15 Ma Devid nējekuru Sọl
1Samuel17:16 Onye Filistia ahu nābiaru kwa nso n'isi-ututu na n'anyasi
1Samuel17:17 Jesi we si Devid nwa-ya
1Samuel17:18 buga-kwa-ra onye-isi usu nnù ndikom na ọgu ise nke ha cheese iri ndia
1Samuel17:19 Ma Sọl
1Samuel17:20 Devid we bilie n'isi-ututu
1Samuel17:21 Israel na ndi Filistia we do onwe-ha n'usoro-agha izute usoro-agha.
1Samuel17:22 Devid we zitu ihe nile o bu rapu n'aka onye nēdebe ihe
1Samuel17:23 Ma mb͕e ya na ha nēkwu okwu
1Samuel17:24 Ndikom nile nke Israel
1Samuel17:25 Ndikom Israel we si

1Samuel27:1 Devid we si obi-ya. Ub͕u a agēkpochapum otù ubọchi site n'aka Sọl: ọ dighi ihe dirim nma kari iwepugasi onwem ba n'ala ndi Filistia; Sọl agaghi-atukwasi kwa obi-ya n'arum

2Samuel12:1 Jehova we zìe Netan jekuru Devid. O we biakute ya
2Samuel12:2 Ọgaranya ahu nwere ìgwè ewu na aturu na ìgwè ehi bara uba nke-uku.
2Samuel12:3 Ma ob͕eye ahu enweghi ihe ọ bula

2Samuel20:1 Ma ọ dabatara otù nwoke jọb͕uru onwe-ya inọ n'ebe ahu
2Samuel20:2 Ndikom nile nke Israel we si n'iso Devid rigo
2Samuel20:3 Devid we biarue ulo-ya na Jerusalem; eze we chiri ndinyom iri ahu
2Samuel20:4 Eze we si Amasa
2Samuel20:5 Amasa we je ikpọkọta Juda: ma ọ nọrọ ọdù kari mb͕e akara àkà nke ọ kaworo ya.
2Samuel20:6 Devid we si Abishai
2Samuel20:7 Ndikom Joab we soro ya pua
2Samuel20:8 Mb͕e ndi ahu nọ n'akuku nkume uku nke di na Gibeon
2Samuel20:9 Joab we si Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Ma Amasa elezighi anya na mma-agha nke di n'aka Joab: o we were ya tie ya n'okpuru ọgiriga nke-ise
2Samuel20:11 Ma otù nwoke n'etiti umu-okorọbia Joab guzoro n'akuku ya
2Samuel20:12 Ma Amasa nāturu n'ọbara n'etiti uzọ atuliri atuli. Nwoke ahu we hu na ndi Israel nile guzoro
2Samuel20:13 Mb͕e ebupusiri ya n'uzọ atuliri atuli
2Samuel20:14 O we gabiga n'ebo nile nke Israel rue Ebel
2Samuel20:15 Ha we bia nọchigide ya n'agha n'Ebel Bet-meaka
2Samuel20:16 Otù nwayi nke mara ihe we si n'obodo ahu kpọ òkù
2Samuel20:17 O we biarue ya nso; nwayi ahu we si
2Samuel20:18 Nwayi ahu we kwue
2Samuel20:19 Mu onwem bu otù onye nime ndi-udo ndi kwesiri ntukwasi-obi n'Israel: gi onwe-gi nāchọ ime ka otù obodo na otù nne n'Israel nwua: n'ìhi gini ka i gēloda ihe-nketa Jehova?
2Samuel20:20 Joab we za
2Samuel20:21 Ọ bughi otú a ka okwu a di: kama otù nwoke nke sitere n'ugwu Efraim
2Samuel20:22 Nwayi ahu we biakute ndi obodo ahu nile n'amam-ihe-ya. Ha we bipu isi Sheba nwa Bikri
2Samuel20:23 Ma Joab bu onye-isi usu-ndi-agha nile nke Israel: Benaia nwa Jehoiada bu onye-isi ndi Keret
2Samuel20:24 Adoram bu onye-isi usu ndi nēfè òfùfè: Jehoshafat nwa Ahailud bu onye-ncheta:
2Samuel20:25 Sheva bu ode-akwukwọ: Zedok na Abaiata bu ndi-nchu-àjà.
2Samuel20:26 ọzọ kwa

2Samuel21:5 Ha we si eze
2Samuel21:6 ka enye ayi ndikom asa sitere n'umu-ya
2Samuel21:7 Ma eze nwere ọmiko n'aru Mefiboshet
2Samuel21:8 Eze we chiri umu-ndikom abua nke Rizpa nwa-nwayi Aia
2Samuel21:9 o we nye ha n'aka ndi Gibeon
2Samuel21:10 Rizpa nwa-nwayi Aia we chiri ákwà-nkpe
2Samuel21:11 Ewe gosi Devid ihe Rizpa nwa Aia
2Samuel21:12 Devid we je chiri ọkpukpu Sọl na ọkpukpu Jonatan nwa-ya n'aka ndi-nwe Jebesh-gilead
2Samuel21:13 o we si n'ebe ahu chigota ọkpukpu Sọl na ọkpukpu Jonatan nwa-ya; ha chikọta-kwa-ra ọkpukpu ndi akwubara.
2Samuel21:14 Ha we lìe ọkpukpu Sọl na Jonatan nwa-ya n'ala Benjamin nime Zela
2Samuel21:15 Ma ndi Filistia nwere agha ọzọ ha nēbuso Israel; Devid we rida
2Samuel21:16 Ishbi-benob
2Samuel21:17 Ma Abishai nwa Zeruaia yere ya aka
2Samuel21:18 O rue

2Samuel21:20 Agha we di ọzọ na Gat
2Samuel21:21 Ọ ta Israel uta
2Samuel21:22 Madu anọ ndia ka amuru nye Rafa nime Gat; ha we da site n'aka Devid
2Samuel22:1 Devid we gwa Jehova okwu nile nke abù a n'ubọchi Jehova naputara ya n'ọbu-aka ndi-iro-ya nile na n'ọbu-aka Sọl:
2Samuel22:2 ọ we si
2Samuel22:3 Ọ bu Chineke nke oké nkumem
2Samuel22:4 Onye-anēto eto ka Ọ bu
2Samuel22:5 N'ihi na ebili-miri nke ọnwu b͕aram buruburu
2Samuel22:6 Udọ̀ nile nke ala-mọ dim buruburu; Ọnyà nile nke ọnwu biara n'irum.
2Samuel22:7 Anamakpọku Jehova nime nkpà kparam
2Samuel22:8 Ala we me nkpatu ma kwa jijiji
2Samuel22:9 Anwuru-ọku rigoro n'imi-Ya
2Samuel22:10 O rulata-kwa-ra elu-igwe
2Samuel22:11 O we nọkwasi n'elu cherub dika inyinya
2Samuel22:12 O we do ọchichiri buruburu Ya ka ọ buru ulo-ntu
2Samuel22:13 Site n'onwunwu nke nēnwu n'iru Ya Afunwuru icheku ọku.
2Samuel22:14 Jehova si n'elu-igwe nāma éb͕è-elu-igwe
2Samuel22:15 O we b͕a àkú-Ya
2Samuel22:16 Ewe hu ebe osimiri si erù
2Samuel22:17 O si n'elu zìe
2Samuel22:18 Ọ nānaputam n'aka onye-irom di ike
2Samuel22:19 Ha nābia n'irum n'ubọchi nhuju-anyam: Ma Jehova burum ihe-ndabere.
2Samuel22:20 O we me ka m'puta rue ebe sara mbara: Ọ nādọputam
2Samuel22:21 Jehova nēnyeghachim dika ezi ọmumem si di: Dika idi-ọcha akam abua si di
2Samuel22:22 N'ihi na edebewo uzọ nile nke Jehova
2Samuel22:23 N'ihi na ikpé-Ya nile di n'irum: Ukpuru-Ya kwa
2Samuel22:24 M'we zue okè n'ebe Ọ nọ
2Samuel22:25 Jehova we meghachim dika ezi omumem si di; Dika idi-ọcham n'anya-Ya si di.
2Samuel22:26 N'ebe onye-ebere nọ I gēgosi Onwe-gi onye-ebere
2Samuel22:27 N'ebe onye di ọcha nọ I gēgosi Onwe-gi onye di ọcha; Ma n'ebe onye b͕agọro ab͕agọ nọ I gēgosi Onwe-gi Onye-nb͕á.
2Samuel22:28 I gāzọputa kwa ndi ewedara n'ala: Ma anya-Gi abua dikwasi ndi di elu
2Samuel22:29 N'ihi na Gi onwe-gi bu oriọnam
2Samuel22:30 N'ihi na m'nēsite na Gi b͕a ọsọ ichu usu ndi nāpunara madu ihe: Anamesite na Chinekem wubiga mb͕idi.
2Samuel22:31 Chineke
2Samuel22:32 N'ihi na ònye bu Chineke
2Samuel22:33 Chineke bu ebem siri ike nke di ike nke-uku: Ọ nākwazu kwa uzọm.
2Samuel22:34 O nēdozi ukwum ka ha di ka ukwu nne-ele: N'elu ebem di elu ka Ọ nēguzokwam.
2Samuel22:35 O nēzí akam abua ibu agha; Ogwe-akam abua nārọgọ kwa uta ọla.
2Samuel22:36 I nyewokwam ọta nzọputa-Gi: Ume-ala-n'obi nke Gi nēmekwam ka m'ba uba.
2Samuel22:37 I nēme ka nzọ-ukwum sa mbara n'okpurum
2Samuel22:38 Ka m'chua ndi-irom
2Samuel22:39 M'we me ka ha gwusia
2Samuel22:40 I nēji kwa ike kem dika ihe-ọkiké ibu agha: I nēme ka ndi nēbili imegidem ruru ala n'okpurum.
2Samuel22:41 Ndi-irom
2Samuel22:42 Ha nāgha anya
2Samuel22:43 Anamesu kwa ha me ka ha di ka ájá ala
2Samuel22:44 I we me ka m'b͕apu n'ilu-ọ̀gù nile nke ndim; I nēdebem ka m'buru isi mba nile ọzọ: Ndi m'nāmaghi gēfèm òfùfè.
2Samuel22:45 Ndi ala ọzọ nērube isi aghughọ n'okpurum: Mb͕e ha nuru na nti ha nēgem nti.
2Samuel22:46 Ndi ala ọzọ nāta aru
2Samuel22:47 Jehova nādi ndu; Onye agọziri agọzi ka oké nkumem bu kwa; Chineke nke oké nkume nzọputam di kwa elu:
2Samuel22:48 Bú Chineke ahu Nke nābọrọm ọ́bọ̀
2Samuel22:49 Onye nēme kwa ka m'si n'aka ndi-irom pua: I nēwelikwam elu kari ndi nēbili imegidem: I nānaputam n'aka madu nēme ihe ike.
2Samuel22:50 N'ihi nka ka m'gēkele Gi
2Samuel22:51 Ọ nēme ka nzọputa eze-Ya di uku: Ọ nēme-kwa-ra onye nke Ya etere manu ebere
2Samuel23:1 Ma ndi a bu okwu ikpe-azu nke Devid. Ihe nke si n'ọnu Devid nwa Jesi puta
2Samuel23:2 Mọ nke Jehova kwuru site n'ọnum
2Samuel23:3 Chineke Israel siri
2Samuel23:4 Ọ di kwa ka ìhè ututu
2Samuel23:5 N'ihi na ọ bughi otú a ka ulom di n'ebe Chineke nọ; N'ihi na ọb͕ub͕a-ndu ebighi-ebi ka Ọ b͕aworo nyem
2Samuel23:6 Ma ndi jọb͕uru onwe-ha di ka ogwu anēkopu ekopu
2Samuel23:7 Ma nwoke nke nēmetu ha aka Gēnweju ígwè na osisi ube aka: Agēwere kwa ọku suresia ha n'ọnọdu-ha.
2Samuel23:8 Ndia bu aha ndi-dike
2Samuel23:9 Nke so ya bu Eleeza nwa Dodai nwa onye Ahoa
2Samuel23:10 onye ahu biliri
2Samuel23:11 Nke so ya bu Shama nwa Agi onye-Hararait. Ndi Filistia we chikọta onwe-ha n'usu
2Samuel23:12 O we guzo onwe-ya n'etiti òkè ahu
2Samuel23:13 Ndikom atọ n'etiti orú ndi-isi na iri ahu we rida
2Samuel23:14 Ma Devid nọ n'ebe ahu ewusiri ike mb͕e ahu
2Samuel23:15 Devid we chọsie ike
2Samuel23:16 Ndi-dike atọ ahu we wapue ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ndi Filistia
2Samuel23:17 Ọ si
2Samuel23:18 Ma Abishai
2Samuel23:19 Àdighi-asọpuru ya kari ndikom atọ ahu? o we ghọrọ ha onye-isi: ma o rughi ndikom atọ mbu ahu.
2Samuel23:20 Benaia kwa
2Samuel23:21 Onye ahu tib͕u-kwa-ra nwoke ahu
2Samuel23:22 Ihe ndia ka Benaia nwa Jehoiada mere
2Samuel23:23 Anāsọpuru ya kari orú ndikom na iri ahu
2Samuel23:24 Asahel nwa-nne Joab bu otù onye n'etiti orú ndikom na iri ahu; Elhanan nwa Dodo nke Bet-lehem;
2Samuel23:25 Shama onye Harod
2Samuel23:26 Hilez onye-Paltait
2Samuel23:27 Abieza onye Anatot
2Samuel23:28 Zalmon onye Ahoa
2Samuel23:29 Hileb nwa Beana onye Netofa
2Samuel23:30 Benaia onye Piraton
2Samuel23:31 Abi-albon onye Araba
2Samuel23:32 Eliahba onye Shaalabin
2Samuel23:33 Shama onye-Hararait
2Samuel23:34 Elifelet nwa Ahasbai
2Samuel23:35 Hezro onye Kamel
2Samuel23:36 Igal nwa Netan nke Zoba
2Samuel23:37 Zelek onye Amon
2Samuel23:38 Ira onye Jeta
2Samuel23:39 Uraia onye Het: ha nile di orú ndikom na iri na asa.
2Samuel24:1 Iwe Jehova we di kwa ọku ọzọ megide Israel
2Samuel24:2 Eze we si Joab
2Samuel24:3 Joab we si eze
2Samuel24:4 Ma okwu eze di ike n'ebe Joab nọ
2Samuel24:5 Ha we gabiga Jọdan
2Samuel24:6 ha we biarue Gilead
2Samuel24:7 biarue ebe ewusiri ike nke Taia
2Samuel24:8 Ha we jegharia n'ala nile
2Samuel24:9 Joab we nye eze ọnu-ọgugu nke ngukọta ọ gukọtara ndi Israel: ma orú nnù ndikom ọgu uzọ ise di n'Israel
2Samuel24:10 Obi Devid we ta ya uta mb͕e ọ gusiri ndi Israel. Devid we si Jehova
2Samuel24:11 Devid we bilie n'ututu
2Samuel24:12 Je gwa Devid okwu
2Samuel24:13 Gad we biakute Devid
2Samuel24:14 Devid we si Gad
2Samuel24:15 Jehova we tiye ajọ ọria nēfe efe n'aru Israel site n'ututu we rue na mb͕e ákàrà: orú nnù ndikom uzọ asatọ na nnù iri-na-ise we nwua n'etiti ndi Israel site na Dan we rue Bia-sheba.
2Samuel24:16 Mọ-ozi we setipu aka-ya n'ebe Jerusalem di ibibi ya
2Samuel24:17 Devid we gwa Jehova okwu
2Samuel24:18 Gad we biakute Devid n'ubochi ahu
2Samuel24:19 Devid we rigo dika okwu Gad si di
2Samuel24:20 Arọna we le anya
2Samuel24:21 Arọna we si
2Samuel24:22 Arọna we si Devid
2Samuel24:23 ihe a nile onye-nwem eze ka Arọna
2Samuel24:24 Eze we si Arọna
2Samuel24:25 Devid we wuere Jehova ebe-ichu-àjà n'ebe ahu
1Kings1:1 Ma eze
1Kings1:2 Ndi-orù-ya we si ya
1Kings1:3 Ha we chọ nwa-ab͕ọghọ mara nma n'ókè-ala nile nke Israel
1Kings1:4 Nwa-ab͕ọghọ ahu mara nma nke-uku; o we nēkposo eze aru ọku
1Kings1:5 Ma Adonaija nwa Hagit nēweli onwe-ya elu
1Kings1:6 Ma ọ dighi mb͕e nna-ya mere ihe nēwuta ya n'ubọchi ndu-ya nile
1Kings1:7 Okwu-ya we di n'ebe Joab nwa Zeruaia nọ
1Kings1:8 Ma Zedok
1Kings1:9 Adonaija we chiri ìgwè ewu na aturu na ìgwè ehi na anu mara abuba chua àjà n'akuku nkume Zohelet
1Kings1:10 ma ọ kpọghi Netan
1Kings1:11 Netan we gwa Bat-sheba
1Kings1:12 Ma ub͕u a
1Kings1:13 Je bakwuru eze
1Kings1:14 Le
1Kings1:15 Bat-sheba we bakuru eze rue ime-ulo: ma eze aghọwo agadi nke-uku: Abishag
1Kings1:16 Bat-sheba we rube isi
1Kings1:17 Ọ si ya
1Kings1:18 Ma ub͕u a
1Kings1:19 o we chiri ehi na anu mara abuba na ìgwè ewu na aturu riri nne chua àjà
1Kings1:20 Ma gi onwe-gi
1Kings1:21 Ma emeghi otú a
1Kings1:22 Ma
1Kings1:23 Ha we gosi eze
1Kings1:24 Netan we si
1Kings1:25 N'ihi na ọ ridawo ta
1Kings1:26 Ma ọ kpọghm
1Kings1:27 Ọ̀ gābu na ihe a sitere n'aka onye-nwem
1Kings1:28 Eze
1Kings1:29 Eze we ṅua iyi
1Kings1:30 n'ezie dika m'were Jehova
1Kings1:31 Bat-sheba we rube isi kpuchie iru-ya n'ala
1Kings1:32 Eze
1Kings1:33 Eze we si ha
1Kings1:34 ka Zedok
1Kings1:35 Unu gēso kwa ya n'azu rigota
1Kings1:36 Benaia nwa Jehoiada we za eze
1Kings1:37 Dika Jehova nọyeworo onye-nwem
1Kings1:38 Zedok
1Kings1:39 Zedok
1Kings1:40 Ndi Israel nile we so ya n'azu rigo
1Kings1:41 Adonaija na ndi nile akpọrọ
1Kings1:42 Mb͕e ọ nọ nēkwu okwu
1Kings1:43 Jonatan we za
1Kings1:44 eze we ziga Zedok
1Kings1:45 Zedok
1Kings1:46 Ọzọ kwa
1Kings1:47 Ọzọ kwa
1Kings1:48 Ọzọ kwa

1Kings1:50 Ma Adonaija turu egwu n'ihi Solomon; o we bilie
1Kings1:51 Ewe gosi Solomon
1Kings1:52 Solomon we si
1Kings1:53 Eze
1Kings2:1 Ma ubọchi Devid biaruru nso ka ọ nwua; o we nye Solomon
1Kings2:2 Mu onwem nēje n'uzọ uwa nile: ma di ike
1Kings2:3 debe kwa ihe-ndebe nke Jehova
1Kings2:4 ka Jehova we me ka okwu-Ya guzosie ike nke O kwuru bayerem
1Kings2:5 Ọzọ kwa
1Kings2:6 Gi me kwa dika amam-ihe-gi si di
1Kings2:7 Ma mere umu Bazilai
1Kings2:8 Ma
1Kings2:9 Ma ub͕u a agula ya n'onye ikpe nāmaghi
1Kings2:10 Devid we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu
1Kings2:11 Ma ubọchi Devid bu eze Israel di ọgu arọ abua: arọ asa ka ọ bu eze na Hebron
1Kings2:12 Solomon we nọkwasi n'oche-eze Devid nna-ya: ewe me ka ala-eze-ya guzosie ike nke-uku.
1Kings2:13 Adonaija nwa Hagit we biakute Bat-sheba nne Solomon. Ọ si
1Kings2:14 Ọ si kwa
1Kings2:15 Ọ si
1Kings2:16 Ma ub͕u a otù aririọ ka mu onwem nāriọ n'aka-gi
1Kings2:17 Ọ si
1Kings2:18 Bat-sheba we si
1Kings2:19 Bat-sheba we bakuru eze
1Kings2:20 Ọ si
1Kings2:21 Ọ si
1Kings2:22 Eze
1Kings2:23 Eze
1Kings2:24 Ma ub͕u a Jehova nādi ndu
1Kings2:25 Eze
1Kings2:26 Eze we si Abaiata
1Kings2:27 Solomon we chupu Abaiata ka ọ ghara iburu Jehova onye-nchu-àjà; ka o we me ka okwu Jehova rè
1Kings2:28 Akukọ ahu we rue Joab nti: n'ihi na Joab wezugara onwe-ya iso Adonaija n'azu
1Kings2:29 Ewe gosi eze
1Kings2:30 Benaia we biarue Ulo-ikwū Jehova
1Kings2:31 Eze we si ya
1Kings2:32 Jehova gēme kwa ka ọbara-ya laghachi n'isi-ya
1Kings2:33 Ọbara-ha gālaghachi kwa n'isi Joab
1Kings2:34 Benaia nwa Jehoiada we rigo
1Kings2:35 Eze we tiye Benaia nwa Jehoiada n'ọnọdu-ya ka ọ buru onye-isi usu-ndi-agha: Zedok
1Kings2:36 Eze we ziga kpọ Shimai
1Kings2:37 O gēru kwa
1Kings2:38 Shimai we si eze
1Kings2:39 O rue
1Kings2:40 Shimai we bilie
1Kings2:41 Ewe gosi Solomon na Shimai esiwo na Jerusalem je rue Gat
1Kings2:42 Eze we ziga kpọ Shimai
1Kings2:43 Ọ̀ bu kwa gini mere i nēdebeghi iyi Jehova
1Kings2:44 Eze si-kwa-ra Shimai
1Kings2:45 Ma eze
1Kings2:46 Eze we nye Benaia nwa Jehoiada iwu; ọ pua
1Kings3:1 Solomon we ghọ ọgọ Fero eze Ijipt
1Kings3:2 Nání na ndi Israel nāchu àjà n'ebe nile di elu
1Kings3:3 Ma Solomon huru Jehova n'anya
1Kings3:4 Eze we jerue Gibeon ichu àjà n'ebe ahu; n'ihi na nke ahu bu oké ebe di elu: nnù àjà-nsure-ọku abua na ọgu iri ka Solomon surere n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà ahu.
1Kings3:5 Na Gibeon ka Jehova mere ka Solomon hu Ya anya na nrọ nke abali: Chineke we si
1Kings3:6 Solomon we si
1Kings3:7 Ma ub͕u a
1Kings3:8 Orù-Gi nọ kwa n'etiti ndi-Gi I rọputaworo
1Kings3:9 Ma nye orù-Gi obi nānu ihe ikpe ndi-Gi ikpe
1Kings3:10 Okwu-ya we di nma n'anya Onye-nwe-ayi
1Kings3:11 Chineke we si ya
1Kings3:12 le
1Kings3:13 Ọzọ kwa
1Kings3:14 Ọ buru kwa na i je ije n'uzọm nile

1Kings3:16 Mb͕e ahu ndinyom abua
1Kings3:17 Otù nwayi we si
1Kings3:18 O rue
1Kings3:19 Nwa nwayi a we nwua n'abali; n'ihi na o dinakwasiri ya.
1Kings3:20 O we bilie n'etiti abali
1Kings3:21 M'we bilie n'ututu inye nwam ara
1Kings3:22 Nwayi nke-ọzọ we si
1Kings3:23 Eze we si
1Kings3:24 Eze we si
1Kings3:25 Eze we si

1Kings4:1 Eze
1Kings4:2 Ma ndia bu ndi-isi o nwere; Azaraia nwa Zedok bu onye-nchu-àjà;
1Kings4:3 Elihoref na Ahaija
1Kings4:4 Benaia nwa Jehoiada bu onye-isi usu-ndi-agha; Zedok na Abaiata bu ndi-nchu-àjà;
1Kings4:5 Azaraia nwa Netan bu onye-isi nke ndi edoro ndi-isi; Zabud nwa Netan bu onye-isi n'ije ozi na eyì eze;
1Kings4:6 Ahisha bu onye-isi ulo eze; Adonairam nwa Abda bu onye-isi usu ndi nēfè òfùfè.
1Kings4:7 Solomon nwe-kwa-ra ndikom iri na abua edoro ndi-isi Israel nile
1Kings4:8 Ndia bu kwa aha-ha: Ben-hua
1Kings4:9 Ben-deka
1Kings4:10 Ben-hesed
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadab
1Kings4:12 Beana nwa Ahailud
1Kings4:13 Ben-geba
1Kings4:14 Ahinadab nwa Ido
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz
1Kings4:16 Beana nwa Hushai
1Kings4:17 Jehoshafat nwa Parua
1Kings4:18 Shimai nwa Ila
1Kings4:19 Gebea nwa Uri
1Kings4:20 Juda na Israel di ọtutu
1Kings4:21 Solomon we nāchi ala-eze nile site n'Osimiri rue ala ndi Filistia
1Kings4:22 Ihe-oriri Solomon nke diri otù ubọchi bu kwa orú ọtùtù ọka na iri nke utu ọka flour
1Kings4:23 ehi iri mara abuba
1Kings4:24 N'ihi na ya onwe-ya nwere ike n'aru ndi nile bi n'ofè Osimiri
1Kings4:25 Juda na Israel we biri na ntukwasi-obi
1Kings4:26 Solomon nwe-kwa-ra orú nnù ulo uzọ ise nke inyinya diri ub͕ọ-ala-ya
1Kings4:27 Ndi ahu edoro ndi-isi zù-kwa-ra eze
1Kings4:28 Ha nēweta kwa ọka barley na okporo-ọka n'ebe ndi ahu edoro ndi-isi nọ
1Kings4:29 Chineke nye-kwa-ra Solomon amam-ihe na nghọta riri nne nke-uku
1Kings4:30 Amam-ihe Solomon we ba uba kari amam-ihe umu Iru-anyanwu nile
1Kings4:31 Ọ we mara ihe kari madu nile; kari Itan onye-Ezrahait
1Kings4:32 Ọ tua nnù ilu asa na ọgu iri: abù-ya di kwa nnù abua na ọgu iri na abù ise.
1Kings4:33 O kwu-kwa-ra okwu bayere osisi
1Kings4:34 Ha we si na ndi nile bia inu amam-ihe Solomon
1Kings5:1 Hairam
1Kings5:2 Solomon we zigara Hairam ozi
1Kings5:3 Gi onwe gi amawo Devid
1Kings5:4 Ma ub͕u a Jehova
1Kings5:5 Ma
1Kings5:6 Ma ub͕u a nye iwu ka ha b͕utuerem osisi cedar site na Lebanon; ndi-orùm gēso kwa ndi-orù-gi; m'gēnye kwa gi ugwọ-ọlu ndi-orù-gi dika ihe nile si di nke i gāsim: n'ihi na gi onwe-gi amawo na ọ dighi nwoke n'etiti ayi mara ib͕utu osisi dika ndi Zaidon.
1Kings5:7 O rue
1Kings5:8 Hairam we zigara Solomon ozi
1Kings5:9 Ndi-orùm gēsi na Lebanon buputa ha oké osimiri: mu onwem gāb͕a kwa ha ka ha se n'elu oké osimiri rue ebe ahu nke i gēziterem ozi
1Kings5:10 Hairam we nēnye Solomon osisi cedar na osisi fir
1Kings5:11 Solomon we nye Hairam orú nnù ọtùtù ọka uzọ abua na nnù iri nke ọka wheat iburu ulo-ya ihe-oriri
1Kings5:12 Jehova nye-kwa-ra Solomon amam-ihe
1Kings5:13 Eze
1Kings5:14 O ziga ha na Lebanon
1Kings5:15 Solomon nwe-kwa-ra orú nnù ndikom uzọ asatọ na nnù iri-na-ise ndi nēbu ibu
1Kings5:16 nāgughi ndi-isi nke ndi edoro ndi-isi
1Kings5:17 Eze we nye iwu
1Kings5:18 Ndi-owu-ulo nke Solomon na ndi-owu-ulo nke Hairam na ndi Gebal we
1Kings6:1 O rue
1Kings6:2 Ma ulo ahu nke eze
1Kings6:3 Uzọ-nbata kwa nke di n'iru ulo uku nke ulo ahu
1Kings6:4 O we mere ulo ahu window ufọdu di obosara nime
1Kings6:5 O wu-kwa-ra okpukpu-ulo n'akuku mb͕idi ulo ahu buruburu
1Kings6:6 Okpukpu-ulo nke dikarisiri ala
1Kings6:7 Ulo ahu
1Kings6:8 Ọnu-uzọ nke ulo ntà nke akuku nke-etiti di n'akuku aka-nri nke ulo ahu: ha we si n'uzọ-nrigo nke nāga buruburu nārigo n'ulo ntà nke-etiti
1Kings6:9 O we wue ulo ahu
1Kings6:10 O wue okpukpu-ulo n'aru ulo ahu nile
1Kings6:11 Okwu Jehova we biakute Solomon
1Kings6:12 Ulo a nke gi onwe-gi nēwu
1Kings6:13 M'gēbi kwa n'etiti umu Israel
1Kings6:14 Solomon we wue ulo ahu
1Kings6:15 O were ibo osisi cedar wue mb͕idi ulo ahu nime; site n'ala ulo rue mb͕idi nke okpukpu
1Kings6:16 O were ibo osisi cedar wue ebe di orú cubit n'azu ulo ahu
1Kings6:17 Ulo ahu
1Kings6:18 Osisi cedar di kwa n'aru ulo ahu nime
1Kings6:19 O dozi-kwa-ra ime-ime-ulo n'etiti ulo ahu nime
1Kings6:20 Ma n'iru ime-ime-ulo ahu di orú cubit n'ogologo
1Kings6:21 Solomon we were ọla-edo makarisiri nma machita ulo ahu nime: o me ka iyab͕a ọla-edo gabiga n'iru ime-ime-ulo ahu; ọ machita kwa ya ọla-edo.
1Kings6:22 Ọ machita-kwa-ra ulo ahu nile ọla-edo
1Kings6:23 O me-kwa-ra cherubim abua nke osisi manu olive n'ime-ime-ulo ahu
1Kings6:24 Cubit ise ka otù nku cherub di
1Kings6:25 Cubit iri ka cherub nke-ọzọ di kwa: cherubim abua ahu nwere otù ọtùtù na otù ọpipi.
1Kings6:26 Idi-elu otù cherub di cubit iri
1Kings6:27 O we tiye cherubim n'etiti ime-ulo: ha we b͕asa nkù cherubim ahu
1Kings6:28 Ọ machita cherubim ọla-edo.
1Kings6:29 Ọ tu-kwa-ra mb͕idi nile nke ulo ahu buruburu n'eb͕ub͕u nke ihe-ọpipi
1Kings6:30 Ọ machita-kwa-ra ala ulo ahu ọla-edo
1Kings6:31 O me ibo-uzọ osisi manu olive tiye n'ọnu-uzọ ime-ime-ulo ahu: ọfiere-uzọ na awara-uzọ abua bu otù uzọ n'uzọ ise nke mb͕idi.
1Kings6:32 Ibo-uzọ abua ahu bu osisi manu olive; ọ pia n'elu ha ihe-ọpipi
1Kings6:33 Otú a ka o me-kwa-ra awara-uzọ abua nke osisi manu olive itiye n'ọnu-uzọ ulo uku Chineke
1Kings6:34 na ibo-uzọ abua nke osisi fir; ibewa-uzọ abua nke otù ibo-uzọ nāga buruburu
1Kings6:35 Ọ pia n'elu ha cherubim na nkwu na okoko-osisi wara awa: ọ were ọla-edo nke emere ka ọ dabà n'elu ihe eb͕uru eb͕ub͕u machita ha.
1Kings6:36 O were akuku nkume awara awa atọ na otù ariri osisi cedar awara awa wue ogige ime-ime.
1Kings6:37 N'arọ nke-anọ ka atọrọ ntọ-ala ulo Jehova
1Kings6:38 Ma n'arọ nke-iri-na-otù
1Kings7:1 Ma Solomon nọ arọ iri na atọ n'iwu ulo nke aka ya
1Kings7:2 O we wue ulo oké ọhia Lebanon; ọgu cubit ise ka ogologo-ya di
1Kings7:3 Ewere osisi cedar kpuchie ya n'elu
1Kings7:4 Ọnọdu window di kwa n'akuku atọ
1Kings7:5 Ọnu-uzọ nile na awara-uzọ nile nwere akuku anọ ra nrata
1Kings7:6 O me-kwa-ra uzọ-nbata nke ogidi; ọgu cubit abua na iri ka ogologo-ya di
1Kings7:7 Ọ me-kwa-ra uzọ-nbata nke oche-eze ebe ọ ganēkpe ikpe
1Kings7:8 Ma ulo-ya ebe o nēbi
1Kings7:9 Eji nkume di oké ọnu-ahia wu ndia nile
1Kings7:10 Ntọ-ala-ya bu kwa nkume di oké ọnu-ahia
1Kings7:11 Nkume nke di oké ọnu-ahia di kwa n'elu
1Kings7:12 Ogige uku nke di buruburu nwe-kwa-ra akuku atọ nke nkume awara awa
1Kings7:13 Eze Solomon we ziga si na Taia kuputa Hairam.
1Kings7:14 Nwa nke nwayi di-ya nwuru ka ọ bu
1Kings7:15 O we kpua ogidi ọla abua
1Kings7:16 O me-kwa-ra isi abua nke ọla awuru awu
1Kings7:17 Ihe-ọkpukpa
1Kings7:18 O me ogidi abua ahu; akuku abua dikwasi otù ihe-ọkpukpa buruburu
1Kings7:19 Isi nke di n'elu ogidi n'uzọ-nbata ahu bu ihe emere ka ha yie urodi
1Kings7:20 Ma isi di kwa n'elu ogidi abua ahu n'elu
1Kings7:21 O guzo ogidi abua ahu n'uzọ-nbata nke ulo uku Chineke: o guzo ogidi aka-nri
1Kings7:22 Ma n'elu ogidi ihe di nke emere ka o yie urodi: ewe luzue ọlu ogidi abua ahu.
1Kings7:23 O me-kwa-ra oké osimiri awuru awu
1Kings7:24 Afufa-ọhia di kwa n'okpuru ọnu-ya buruburu nke nāb͕a ya buruburu
1Kings7:25 Ọ nēguzo n'elu ehi iri na abua
1Kings7:26 Ib͕idi-ya di otù ntù-ọbu-aka; emere ọnu-ya dika anēme ọnu iko
1Kings7:27 Ọ me ihe-ndọkwasi iri nke ọla; cubit anọ ka ogologo otù ihe-ndọkwasi di
1Kings7:28 Ma nka bu otú emere ihe-ndọkwasi: ha nwere ihe-njikọ
1Kings7:29 ọdum na ehi na cherubim di n'ihe-njikọ nke di n'etiti nkwukọta ahu; ihe-ndọkwasi dikwasi na nkwukọta n'elu: ihe aturu atu nke emere ka o yie ihe-nkwuba di kwa n'okpuru ọdum nile na ehi nile.
1Kings7:30 Ihe-ndọkwasi ọ bula nwere wheel ọla anọ
1Kings7:31 Ọnu-ya nime isi-ya na n'elu di otù cubit: ọnu-ya di kwa buruburu
1Kings7:32 Wheel anọ ahu di n'okpuru ihe-njikọ: aka wheel di n'ihe-ndọkwasi: idi-elu otù wheel di otù cubit na nkera cubit.
1Kings7:33 Otú emere wheel nile di ka esi eme wheel ub͕ọ-ala: aka nile ha
1Kings7:34 Ubu anọ di na nkuku anọ nke ihe-ndọkwasi ọ bula: ubu-ya sitere n'ihe-ndọkwasi ahu.
1Kings7:35 Ihe di gburugburu gburugburu
1Kings7:36 O b͕ue eb͕ub͕u cherubim na ọdum na nkwu n'elu mbadamba aka-ya nile
1Kings7:37 Otú a ka o mere ihe-ndọkwasi iri ahu: ha nile nwere otù ọwuwu
1Kings7:38 O me kwa ite ọsisa-miri iri nke ọla: ọgu bath abua ka otù ite ọsisa-miri nānagide: cubit anọ ka ite ọsisa-miri ọ bula di: otù ite ọsisa-miri di n'elu ihe-ndọkwasi ọ bula n'ihe-ndọkwasi iri ahu.
1Kings7:39 O tiye ihe-ndọkwasi ahu
1Kings7:40 Hairam me-kwa-ra ite ọsisa-miri nile

1Kings7:42 na nnù pomegranate ahu nke diri ihe-ọkpukpa abua ahu; bú akuku pomegranate abua bayere otù ihe-ọkpukpa

1Kings7:44 na otù oké osimiri ahu
1Kings7:45 na ite nile

1Kings8:47 ha we chegharia n'obi-ha n'ala ebe adọtara ha n'agha

2Kings15:1 N'arọ nke-orú-na-asa nke Jeroboam
2Kings15:2 Arọ iri na isi ka ọ b͕ara mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; ọ buru eze ọgu arọ abua iri na abua nime Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Jekolaia nke Jerusalem.
2Kings15:3 O me ihe ziri ezi n'anya Jehova
2Kings15:4 Nání na ewezugaghi ebe di elu: ndi Juda nọ nāchu àjà nēsure kwa ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'ebe di elu nile.
2Kings15:5 Jehova we tie eze ahu ihe
2Kings15:6 Ma okwu Azaraia nile nke fọduru
2Kings15:7 Azaraia we so nna-ya-ha dina n'ọnwu; ha we lìe ya n'ebe elìri nna-ya-hà n'obodo Devid: Jotam nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya.

2Kings21:1 Manase b͕ara arọ iri na abua mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze ọgu arọ abua na iri na ise nime Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Hefzi-ba.
2Kings21:2 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova
2Kings21:3 Ebe di elu nke Hezekaia nna-ya mere ka ha la n'iyì
2Kings21:4 O wu-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-àjà di iche n'ulo Jehova
2Kings21:5 O wu-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-àjà nye usu nile nke ihe elu-igwe n'ogige abua nke ulo Jehova.
2Kings21:6 O me-kwa-ra ka nwa-ya mwoke gabiga nime ọku
2Kings21:7 Ọ dọba-kwa-ra arusi apiri api nke Ashera
2Kings21:8 M'gaghi-eme kwa ka ukwu Israel si n'ala nke M'nyere ndi bu nna-ha waghari ọzọ; nání ọ buru na ha elezi anya ime dika ihe nile si di nke M'nyeworo ha n'iwu

2Kings21:14 M'gārapu kwa ndi fọduru nke ihe-nketam

2Kings24:6 Jehoiakim we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu: Jehoiakin nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya.
2Kings24:7 Ma eze Ijipt esighi n'ala-ya puta ọzọ ma-ọli: n'ihi na eze Babilon ewerewo ihe nile eze Ijipt nwere site na miri-iyi Ijipt rue osimiri Yufretis.
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakin b͕ara arọ iri na asatọ mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze nime Jerusalem ọnwa atọ: aha nne-ya bu Nehushta nwa Elnetan nke Jerusalem.
2Kings24:9 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova
2Kings24:10 Na mb͕e ahu ka ndi-orù Nebukadneza
2Kings24:11 Nebukadneza
2Kings24:12 Jehoiakin
2Kings24:13 O si n'ebe ahu chipu àkù nile nke ulo Jehova

2Kings24:15 O me-kwa-ra ka Jehoiakin je biri na Babilon; nne eze
2Kings24:16 Ndikom nile kwa ndi bu dìnkpà
2Kings24:17 Eze Babilon we me Matanaia nwa-nne nna-ya eze n'ọnọdu ya
2Kings24:18 Zedekaia b͕ara orú arọ na otù mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze arọ iri na otù nime Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Hamutal nwa Jeremaia nke Libna.
2Kings24:19 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova

1Chronicles18:12 Abishai nwa Zeruaia tib͕u-kwa-ra Edom nime Ndagwurugwu Nnù. orú nnù ndikom uzọ abua na nnù ise.
1Chronicles18:13 O we tiye ebe-nguzo-ndi-agha n'Edom; Edom nile we ghọrọ Devid ndi-orù. Jehova we nāzọputa Devid ebe ọ bula o jere.

1Chronicles27:1 Ma umu Israel
1Chronicles27:2 Onye-isi òkè mbu nke diri ọnwa mbu bu Jashọbeam nwa Zabdiel: orú nnù ndikom uzọ atọ di kwa n'òkè-ya.
1Chronicles27:3 O sitere n'umu Perez
1Chronicles27:4 Ma onye-isi òkè nke ọnwa nke-abua bu Dodai onye Ahoa
1Chronicles27:5 Onye-isi usu-ndi-agha nke-atọ nke diri ọnwa nke-atọ bu Benaia nwa Jehoiada onye-nchu-aja
1Chronicles27:6 Onye ahu bu Benaia nke bu dike nke orú ndikom na iri ahu
1Chronicles27:7 Onye-isi nke-anọ nke diri ọnwa nke-anọ bu Asahel nwa-nne Joab
1Chronicles27:8 Onye-isi nke-ise nke diri ọnwa nke-ise bu Shamhut onye-Izrahait: orú nnù ndikom uzọ atọ di kwa n'òkè-ya.
1Chronicles27:9 Onye-isi nke-isi nke diri ọnwa nke-isi bu Ira nwa Ikesh onye Tekoa: orú nnù ndikom uzọ atọ di kwa n'òkè-ya.
1Chronicles27:10 Onye-isi nke-asa nke diri ọnwa nke-asa bu Hilez onye-Pelonait
1Chronicles27:11 Onye-isi nke-asatọ nke diri ọnwa nke-asatọ bu Sibekai onye Husha
1Chronicles27:12 Onye-isi nke-iteghete nke diri ọnwa nke-iteghete bu Abieza onye Anatot
1Chronicles27:13 Onye-isi nke-iri nke diri ọnwa nke-iri bu Maharai onye Netofa
1Chronicles27:14 Onye-isi nke-iri-na-otù nke diri ọnwa nke-iri-na-otù bu Benaia onye Piraton
1Chronicles27:15 Onye-isi nke-iri-na-abua nke diri ọnwa nke-iri-na-abua bu Heldai onye Netofa
1Chronicles27:16 Ndi-isi kwa nke ebo nile nke Israel: nke ndi Reuben
1Chronicles27:17 nke Livai
1Chronicles27:18 nke Juda
1Chronicles27:19 nke Zebulun
1Chronicles27:20 nke umu Efraim
1Chronicles27:21 nke nkera ebo Manase di na Gilead
1Chronicles27:22 nke Dan
1Chronicles27:23 Ma Devid agutaghi ọnu-ọgugu-ha site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ we rida: n'ihi na Jehova siri na Ọ gēme ka Israel ba uba dika kpakpando nke elu-igwe.
1Chronicles27:24 Joab nwa Zeruaia malitere iguta ha
1Chronicles27:25 Onye-isi ulo-àkù nile nke eze bu Azmavet nwa Adiel: onye-isi ulo-àkù nile nke di n'ọhia
1Chronicles27:26 onye-isi ndi nēje ozi ubi ilu ọlu ala-ubi bu Ezri nwa Kelub:
1Chronicles27:27 onye-isi ubi-vine nile bu Shimai onye Rema: onye-isi nke ihe di n'ubi-vine itiye n'ulo nile anēdebe manya-vine bu Zabdi onye Shefam:
1Chronicles27:28 onye-isi osisi olive nile na osisi sycomore nile nke di n'ebe di ala ala bu Beal-hanam onye Geda: onye-isi ulo nile anēdebe manu bu Joash:
1Chronicles27:29 onye-isi ìgwè ehi nke nāta nri nime Sheron bu Shitrai onye Sheron: onye-isi ìgwè ehi nke di nime ndagwurugwu nile bu Shefat nwa Adlai:
1Chronicles27:30 onye-isi camel nile bu Obil onye Ishmael: onye-isi inyinya-ibu nile bu Jehdeia onye Meronot:
1Chronicles27:31 onye-isi ìgwè ewu na aturu bu Jaziz onye Haga. Ndia nile bu ndi-isi àkù nke Devid nwere.
1Chronicles27:32 Jonatan nwa-nne nna Devid bu onye nādu ọdu
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofel bu kwa onye nādu eze ọdu: Hushai onye-Akait bu eyì eze:
1Chronicles27:34 ma nke nēso Ahitofel bu Jehoiada nwa Benaia

1Chronicles28:2 Devid
1Chronicles28:3 Ma Chineke sirim
1Chronicles28:4 Ma Jehova
1Chronicles28:5 ma n'etiti umum ndikom nile
1Chronicles28:6 O we sim
1Chronicles28:7 M'gēme kwa ka ala-eze-ya guzosie ike rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi
1Chronicles28:8 Ma ub͕u a
1Chronicles28:9 Ma gi onwe-gi
1Chronicles28:10 Ub͕u a le anya; n'ihi na Jehova arọputawo gi iwu ulo ibu ebe nsọ: di ike
1Chronicles28:11 Devid we nye Solom nwa-ya ihe-atù nke uzọ-nbata ulo uku Chineke
1Chronicles28:12 na ihe-atù ihe nile nke di n'aka-ya site na Mọ Nsọ bayere ogige nile nke ulo Jehova
1Chronicles28:13 baye-kwa-ra òkè nile nke ndi-nchu-àjà na ndi Livai

2Chronicles13:9 Ùnu akwapughi ndi-nchu-àjà Jehova

2Chronicles14:1 Abaija we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu
2Chronicles14:2 Esa we me ezi ihe nke zi-kwa-ra ezi n'anya Jehova

2Chronicles14:4 ọ si Juda ka ha chọ Jehova
2Chronicles14:5 O si-kwa-ra n'obodo nile nke Juda wezuga ebe nile di elu na arusi-anyanwu nile: ala-eze-ya we di jū n'iru ya.

2Chronicles14:13 Esa na ndi ya na ha nọ we chua ha rue Gera: ọtutu nime ndi Etiopia we da
2Chronicles14:14 Ha we tib͕ue obodo nile di Gera buruburu; n'ihi na oké egwu nke Jehova dakwasiri ha: ha we luta ihe obodo nile n'agha; n'ihi na ọtutu ihe-nluta-n'agha di nime ha.

2Chronicles25:23 Joash
2Chronicles25:24 Ọ chiri ọla-edo na ọla-ọcha nile
2Chronicles25:25 Amazaia nwa Joash
2Chronicles25:26 Ma ihe nile nke Amazaia mere nke fọduru
2Chronicles25:27 Ma site na mb͕e Amazaia siri n'iso Jehova wezuga onwe-ya ha kekọtara nkekọta-madu imegide ya nime Jerusalem; o we b͕alaga na Lekish: ha we ziga ichuso ya rue Lekish
2Chronicles25:28 Ha we bute ya n'elu inyinya
2Chronicles26:1 Ndi nile nke Juda we were Uzaia
2Chronicles26:2 Ya onwe-ya wuru Ilot
2Chronicles26:3 Arọ iri na isi ka Uzaia b͕ara mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze ọgu arọ abua na iri na abua nime Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Jekilia nke Jerusalem.
2Chronicles26:4 O me ihe ziri ezi n'anya Jehova
2Chronicles26:5 O we nọ n'ichọ Chineke n'ubọchi Zekaraia
2Chronicles26:6 O we pua
2Chronicles26:7 Chineke we yere ya aka imegide ndi Filistia
2Chronicles26:8 Ndi Amon we nye Uzaia onyinye-inata-iru-ọma: aha-ya we rue nbata Ijipt; n'ihi na o mere onwe-ya ka ọ di ike ri nne.
2Chronicles26:9 Uzaia wu-kwa-ra ulo-elu nime Jerusalem n'ọnu-uzọ-ama nkuku
2Chronicles26:10 O wu-kwa-ra ulo-elu ufọdu n'ọzara
2Chronicles26:11 Uzaia nwe-kwa-ra usu-ndi-agha ndi nēbu agha
2Chronicles26:12 Ọnu-ọgugu nile nke ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna
2Chronicles26:13 Ma n'okpuru aka-ha ka usu nke usu-ndi-agha di
2Chronicles26:14 Uzaia we doziere ha
2Chronicles26:15 O me kwa nime Jerusalem ihe-agha echèputara
2Chronicles26:16 Ma mb͕e ọ di ike
2Chronicles26:17 Azaraia
2Chronicles26:18 ha we guzo imegide Uzaia
2Chronicles26:19 Uzaia we wee iwe; ma ihe eji esure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ di n'aka-ya isure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ; ma mb͕e o nēkosa ndi-nchu-àjà ọnuma
2Chronicles26:20 Azaraia
2Chronicles26:21 Uzaia
2Chronicles26:22 Ma ihe nile nke Uzaia mere nke fọduru
2Chronicles26:23 Uzaia we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu; ha we lìe ya n'ebe elìri nna-ya-hà n'ọhia olìlì nke ndi-eze nwere; n'ihi na ha siri
2Chronicles27:1 Orú arọ na ise ka Jotam b͕ara mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze arọ iri na isi nime Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Jerusha nwa-nwayi Zedok.

2Chronicles28:1 Orú arọ ka Ehaz b͕ara mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze arọ iri na isi nime Jerusalem: ma o meghi ihe ziri ezi n'anya Jehova

2Chronicles28:3 Onye ahu sure-kwa-ra ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì isì utọ nime ndagwurugwu nwa Hinom

2Chronicles30:5 Ha we guzo okwu a
2Chronicles30:6 Ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ we were akwukwọ-ozi sitere n'aka eze na ndi-isi-ya jeghari n'Israel na Juda nile
2Chronicles30:7 Unu adi-kwa-la ka nna-unu-hà
2Chronicles30:8 Ub͕u a unu ekwesila olu-unu ike

2Chronicles30:15 Ha we b͕ue anu ngabiga n'ubọchi nke-iri-na-anọ nke ọnwa nke-abua: ma ihere mere ndi-nchu-àjà na ndi Livai
2Chronicles30:16 Ha we guzo n'ebe-nguzo-ha

2Chronicles30:21 Umu Israel ndi ahuru nime Jerusalem we me ememe achicha ekoghi-eko ubọchi asa n'ọṅù uku: ndi Livai na ndi-nchu-àjà nēto kwa Jehova kwa-ubọchi
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekaia we gwa ndi Livai nile okwu nābà ha n'obi
2Chronicles30:23 Nkpọkọta ahu nile we nara idu-ọdu ime ememe ubọchi asa ọzọ: ha we were ọṅù me ememe ubọchi asa ọzọ.

2Chronicles32:2 Hezekaia we hu na Senakerib abiawo
2Chronicles32:3 o we me ndi-isi-ya na ndi-dike-ya ka ha dua ya ọdu
2Chronicles32:4 Ewe chikọta ndi di ọtutu
2Chronicles32:5 O we me onwe-ya ka ọ di ike
2Chronicles32:6 O we do ndi-ọchi-agha ka ha buru ndi-isi ndi-ya

2Chronicles32:8 nke nọyere ya bu ogwe-aka nke anu-aru; ma Nke nọyere ayi bu Jehova

2Chronicles32:25 Ma ọ bughi dika nmeso emesoro ya ka Hezekaia nyeghachiri; n'ihi na obi-ya di elu: iwe we dikwasi ya

2Chronicles33:1 Manase b͕ara arọ iri na abua mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze ọgu arọ abua na iri na ise nime Jerusalem.
2Chronicles33:2 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova
2Chronicles33:3 Ebe di elu nke Hezekaia nna-ya kwaturu
2Chronicles33:4 O wu-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-àjà di iche iche n'ulo Jehova
2Chronicles33:5 O wu-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-àjà nye usu nile nke ihe elu-igwe n'ogige abua nke ulo Jehova.
2Chronicles33:6 Onye ahu me-kwa-ra ka umu-ya ndikom gabiga nime ọku nime ndagwurugwu nwa Hinom: o ji-kwa-ra igwe-oji tu isi ọma na isi ọjọ
2Chronicles33:7 Ọ dọba-kwa-ra arusi apiri api nke oyiyi-ihe ahu
2Chronicles33:8 M'gaghi-esi kwa n'elu ala nke M'guzoro nye nna-unu-hà wezuga ukwu Israel ọzọ: nání ọ buru na ha elezi anya ime nile nke M'nyeworo ha n'iwu

2Chronicles33:10 Jehova we gwa Manase okwu
2Chronicles33:11 Jehova we me ka ndi-isi usu-ndi-agha nke eze Asiria nwere biakwasi ha
2Chronicles33:12 Ma mbe anākpab͕u ya
2Chronicles33:13 O we kpere Ya; O we kwe ka ọ riọta ihe ọ riọrọ

2Chronicles33:15 O wezuga-kwa-ra chi nile nke ala ọzọ
